nama: Fútar Tiafilus: Tárfár árém mwighé yaitotaménd ménát faroghét némé té kufrotawét téfefaf.
english: Since many have undertaken to set in order a narrative concerning those matters which have been fulfilled among us ,

nama: Yémofem yafrotaménd kétamé némé si té yinjoyénd ufroghan a emofem yéfarotaménd.
english: even as those who from the beginning were eyewitnesses and servants of the word delivered them to us ,

nama: Yéndon té merkéráye téfandawan méinyotio yam kétándmé ufrogh, mer kéretau tayot faroghét ménát merkéráye ndenéfifi némé té kufrotau. Yéndon yafrotan feyot minde merfifi Tiafilus,
english: it seemed good to me also , having traced the course of all things accurately from the first, to write to you in order , most excellent Theophilus ;

nama: Yéndon yéné yafrotan ménát fém so mat ném efalo si méinyotio árkéméné fém té káyáretau. Jon walitogh ár yáne áráféghmén si afrogh
english: that you might know the certainty concerning the things in which you were instructed .

nama: Yéné efghon Erod njam témorwén Judiamén warsagh ár, kété témorwén ghéngén wárogh ár yétkwén Jakaraya efe tafnyangérwén ghéngén wárogh ár Abiane mérén, yáne amaf Elisabet Aron ákimén.
english: There was in the days of Herod , the king of Judea , a certain priest named Zacharias , of the priestly division of Abijah. He had a wife of the daughters of Aaron, and her name was Elizabeth .

nama: Jakaraya a Elisabet Ngánjánene ghékfan mer ghérsaye tamorarwén, méinyotio Yurane nák tawaitoghét.
english: They were both righteous before God , walking blamelessly in all the commandments and ordinances of the Lord .

nama: Wénde ambumofnar tarwén, ménamén Elisabetéf mwinu tárwén, a fá bulu náyáteyayénd.
english: But they had no child , because Elizabeth was barren , and they both were well advanced in years .

nama: Ámb efghon Jakarayane mérénta ghéngén ásáfogh efogh nawerai, yémon ghéngén wárogh ásáfogh yérnyai Ngánján sáfrére.
english: Now while he executed the priest’s office before God in the order of his division

nama: Yéfene túmén témndan Ngánjánam taferngai ménát mer wimafé rokar wároghét Ngánján wáwefnogh méngo kénjút.
english: according to the custom of the priest’ s office , his lot was to enter into the temple of the Lord and burn incense .

nama: Njam efogh náwerai mer wimafé rokar wároghét, méinyotio ár náumendaménd wáwefnogh méngo sifayan Ngánjánafé oraighét.
english: The whole multitude of the people were praying outside at the hour of incense .

nama: Féyo Ngánjánene njafar si résagh ár nufaryéng yáfaf, nokayoyéng ghéngén wárogh séki tambénta.
english: An angel of the Lord appeared to him , standing on the right side of the altar of incense .

nama: Njam Jakarayam yinjoyéng, fá sélngwél yémormén a férféram yifoyéng.
english: Zacharias was troubled when he saw him , and fear fell upon him .

nama: Wénde njafar si résagh árom yémndayéng, “Yau férfér ném, Jakaraya, fene Ngánjánafé orayégh si té náyárang. Fene amaf Elisabet so nésle ghakér ambum, fémon táf yétkwén taram Jon.
english: But the angel said to him , “Don’ t be afraid , Zacharias , because your request has been heard . Your wife , Elizabeth , will bear you a son , and you shall call his name John .

nama: Fá so yém áuwégh a remngogh feyot, a tárfár so náuwetat ménamén yáne éslaghmén.
english: You will have joy and gladness , and many will rejoice at his birth .

nama: Fá ndimbal so yém Ngánjánene ghékfan, wéri nénefnar a ámb táikér nu, a fá so yém Ngánján Mbérmbér wafoghkaf kétándmayo éslagh.
english: For he will be great in the sight of the Lord , and he will drink no wine nor strong drink . He will be filled with the Holy Spirit , even from his mother ’ s womb .

nama: Tárfár ár Israilmén yémon so ewangote kétán Yuré yéfenjo Ngánjánefaf.
english: He will turn many of the children of Israel to the Lord their God .

nama: A fá so yéngém Yurane frondeta, mbérmbéran a waftayan ndenanit Elaija kés témorwén, ménát afafene tikéf wangoghét kétán yéfenjo ambumafefaf, a ayáréghofnaye ghérsata wangoghét kétán káfeté; efalo ghérsat táfrendau Yurai.”
english: He will go before him in the spirit and power of Elijah , ‘ to turn the hearts of the fathers to the children ,’ and the disobedient to the wisdom of the just ; to prepare a people prepared for the Lord .”

nama: Jakarayam yémotai njafar si résagh ár, “Ndernáye wét yénd mat so kamndan yénémamén? Yénd swém bulu wém a tane amaf siyém ndenéyameyo ausé.”
english: Zacharias said to the angel, “ How can I be sure of this ? For I am an old man , and my wife is well advanced in years .”

nama: Njafar si résagh árom yawangoi, “Yénd wém Geibrél. Yénd Ngánjáne kaka wakai a yénd kwénmáfárete siafé sái kémaufron yéné mer si.
english: The angel answered him , “ I am Gabriel , who stands in the presence of God . I was sent to speak to you and to bring you this good news .

nama: A sénonjo fém kékmbo métar a yau noraya kétánotio yéné ufroghene efogh kawerangé ménamén fémo efalo yau tane si so táyáto. Árkéméné so efalo kénamndangi yánjo efghon.”
english: Behold , you will be silent and not able to speak until the day that these things will happen , because you didn’ t believe my words , which will be fulfilled in their proper time .”

nama: Yéné tekan árém Jakaraya njam tanjetawét a mwighé uwérsoghan tamorwén ménamén tekfifi télawangérwén wáwefnogh méngo kénjún.
english: The people were waiting for Zacharias , and they marveled that he delayed in the temple .

nama: Njam fá nétoryéng, fá yau korayau yéfefaf. Yémofem yáyámngoyénd ménamén yémon ghékéf waingégh Ngánján yinjoi wáwefnogh méngo kénjún, fá siofnar namndai yéfeyot ngángayero tawaweindau.
english: When he came out , he could not speak to them . They perceived that he had seen a vision in the temple . He continued making signs to them , and remained mute .

nama: Njam yáne wáwefnogh efogh nefoyénd, fá néngangoi méngot.
english: When the days of his service were fulfilled, he departed to his house .

nama: Soramé yáne amaf Elisabet namndai suafé a 5 ghérare méngo kénjúnro témorangérwén yau kétonau.
english: After these days Elizabeth his wife conceived , and she hid herself five months , saying ,

nama: Elisabet norayai, “Yuram yéné tafrote tayot, yéné efghon Ngánjánam yauyafoi yáne ménde a yitérmboi tane wáiwáiafé yam árfe tambén.” Yesuene áráféghmén si afrogh
english: “ Thus has the Lord done to me in the days in which he looked at me , to take away my reproach among men .”

nama: Táf Elisabetene 6 ghérareyan, Ngánjánam yáfáretam njafar si résagh ár Geibrél Najaret Galili yuwot,
english: Now in the sixth month , the angel Gabriel was sent from God to a city of Galilee named Nazareth ,

nama: yéné méinyo mérésoefaf efe yéreindaménd awerghét Josefefaf, Deifidene mérén kénjút, yáne yétkwén témorwén Meri.
english: to a virgin pledged to be married to a man whose name was Joseph , of David ’s house . The virgin ’s name was Mary .

nama: Njafar si résagh ár yéngmormén Meri yémndai, “Mer frengégh siafé! Yuré siyém fefaf yém.”
english: Having come in , the angel said to her , “ Rejoice , you highly favored one ! The Lord is with you . Blessed are you among women!”

nama: Meri ndimbal sélngwél yémorméng yáne sian a mwighé uwérsoghét yéméindai ndernáye yéné áuwéghfifi so yém.
english: But when she saw him , she was greatly troubled at the saying , and considered what kind of salutation this might be .

nama: Wénde njafar si résagh árom yémndai, “Yau férfér ném, Meri, fémon Ngánjánene ménde té yinjo.
english: The angel said to her , “Don’ t be afraid , Mary , for you have found favor with God .

nama: Fém so ném ambumafé a fém so nésle ghakér ambum, a yétkwén táf taram Yesu.
english: Behold , you will conceive in your womb and give birth to a son , and shall name him ‘ Jesus .’

nama: Fá so yém ndimbal a so yémndetat Minde tukén Ambum. Yuré Ngánjánam so tiyátongé warsagh ár ndenáye fété yáne áki Deifid kés témorwén.
english: He will be great and will be called the Son of the Most High . The Lord God will give him the throne of his father David ,

nama: A fá so yém Israil limánégh ár tuotot. Yáne méngotu yau so yiyato!”
english: and he will reign over the house of Jacob forever . There will be no end to his Kingdom.”

nama: Merim yémotai njafar si résagh ár, “Ndernáye so yéné yém, ménamén yénd swém méinyo mérés?”
english: Mary said to the angel, “ How can this be , seeing I am a virgin ?”

nama: Njafar si résagh árom yawangoi, “Efalo, Ngánján Mbérmbér fefaf so yéném, a Minde Tukén waftayam fém so kémafarngé. Yéné téfnan njúnnjúnofnar ambum so yémndetat Ngánjánene Ambum.
english: The angel answered her , “ The Holy Spirit will come on you , and the power of the Most High will overshadow you . Therefore also the holy one who is born from you will be called the Son of God .

nama: Elisabet fene mérénmén ambumafé so yém ausayan a efe témndetawét ndené mwiné téfnár yém, sénonjo suafé yém 6 ghérare kénjún.
english: Behold , Elizabeth your relative also has conceived a son in her old age ; and this is the sixth month with her who was called barren .

nama: Yénémamén Ngánjáneyot yau táikér yém.”
english: For nothing spoken by God is impossible .”

nama: Merim yawangoi, “Yénd wém Yurane faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Féyotaro so nufrote némé té wémndé.” Si soramé njafar si résagh árom yéfrangoi. Merim yiyafoi Elisabet
english: Mary said , “ Behold , the servant of the Lord ; let it be done to me according to your word .” Then the angel departed from her .

nama: Yéné efghon Meri wékeye álighét náfrendam tesenot Judia tunakéf yuwot.
english: Mary arose in those days and went into the hill country with haste , into a city of Judah ,

nama: Fá nélawai Jakarayane méngot a frengégh si yaramai Elisabete.
english: and entered into the house of Zacharias and greeted Elizabeth .

nama: Njam Elisabet náyárai Meriene frengégh si, ambum táf nalinai fút kénjún, a táf Elisabet témorwén Ngánján Mbérmbér wafoghkaf.
english: When Elizabeth heard Mary ’s greeting, the baby leaped in her womb ; and Elizabeth was filled with the Holy Spirit .

nama: Fá tuk kéme norayai, “Frengéghkaf ném méinyotio amaf kénjún, a frengéghafé ambum fémon so yéráfteǃ
english: She called out with a loud voice and said , “ Blessed are you among women , and blessed is the fruit of your womb !

nama: Némamén yénd méndefé wém, tane Yurane amé sái yéném tafaf?
english: Why am I so favored, that the mother of my Lord should come to me ?

nama: Njam fene frengégh si náyárai, táf ambum tane fút kénjún notanai áuwéghafé.
english: For behold , when the voice of your greeting came into my ears , the baby leaped in my womb for joy!

nama: Nderé áuwéghafé yém yáyot si némé té norayai Ngánjánene efalo si sái nufrota yáfaf.” Meriene wagh
english: Blessed is she who believed , for there will be a fulfillment of the things which have been spoken to her from the Lord !”

nama: Meri norayai, “Tane tikfam Yuré yuwete
english: Mary said , “ My soul magnifies the Lord .

nama: a tane mbérmbér áuwéghan yém Ngánján tane Wanjarégh ár kénjún,
english: My spirit has rejoiced in God my Savior ,

nama: ménamén yémon yénd wafarotam yuwan ghérsafé yáne ásáfogh mérés! Yénandmé sénonjo méinyotio árém so wémndetat yénd ndené frengéghmén ném,
english: for he has looked at the humble state of his servant . For behold , from now on , all generations will call me blessed .

nama: ménamén Minde tukén waftafé sélngwélafé yam tayot yafrotam. Yáne yétkwén yém njúnnjúnofnar.
english: For he who is mighty has done great things for me . Holy is his name .

nama: Yáne ghérghérsisé so néngusamngote yéfeyot emofem férférafé yéfandat fá kétándmé ámb ár saté kétánotio ámb ár saté.
english: His mercy is for generations and generations on those who fear him .

nama: Yémon té yuyafotam muyé yánjo ngángaye, yémon té ewafarnai fá efe tuktuk mwighé emarghan tamorwén.
english: He has shown strength with his arm . He has scattered the proud in the imagination of their hearts .

nama: Yémon té eweworyéng yuwot limánégh ár yéfenjo limánégh ámnjogh sifayata, wénde euyoyéng tukét métar ár.
english: He has put down princes from their thrones , and has exalted the lowly .

nama: Yémon té eremngoi siogh ár tárfár rokare wénde engwatembayéng wemár ár sotro.
english: He has filled the hungry with good things . He has sent the rich away empty .

nama: Yémon té yáutánam yánjo faiofnar ásáfogh ár Israil yafarotai ghérghérsisaye.
english: He has given help to Israel , his servant , that he might remember mercy ,

nama: Ebraamefaf a yánjo mérénfaf tuot, ndernáye té nénorayayéng téfene afafefaf.”
english: as he spoke to our fathers , to Abraham and his offspring + 1:55 or, seed forever .”

nama: Merif emorarmén Elisabetfé nambio ghérare soramé Meri néngangoi méngotuot. Jon walitogh ár yáne áráféghmén si
english: Mary stayed with her about three months , and then returned to her house .

nama: Elisabetene efogh njam nawerai yáne ambummén, fá náráftam ghakér.
english: Now the time that Elizabeth should give birth was fulfilled, and she gave birth to a son .

nama: Yáne kaka ár a fútaréf náyárayénd ndené Yuram ndimbal ghérghérsisé yuyafoi a fá káuwétawét yémafé.
english: Her neighbors and her relatives heard that the Lord had magnified his mercy toward her , and they rejoiced with her .

nama: 8 efogh nawerayéng fá engmormén ghéngan néfghét a yémofem yétkwén yéramayénd yárefé Jakaraya soramé,
english: On the eighth day , they came to circumcise the child ; and they would have called him Zacharias , after the name of his father .

nama: wénde yátmé norayai, “Yau! Yáne yétkwén so yém Jon.”
english: His mother answered , “ Not so ; but he will be called John .”

nama: Yémofem yémndayénd, “Ámb yéné yétkwén yau yém féfene mérnan.”
english: They said to her , “ There is no one among your relatives who is called by this name .”

nama: Yémofem ngángaye yéngwaghnyayénd yárefai ménát ambumoe yétkwén ramghét.
english: They made signs to his father , what he would have him called .

nama: Fá namotayéng farogh fefat ngángé awaunyéghe, méinyotio ár sélngwél emorméng yémon yéfarotam, “Yáne yétkwén siyém Jon.”
english: He asked for a writing tablet , and wrote , “ His name is John .” They all marveled .

nama: Táf fété Jakaraya si néngufngoi a tuwetau Ngánján.
english: His mouth was opened immediately and his tongue freed, and he spoke , blessing God .

nama: Ár fútar Ngánján férféram ewifoi, Judia yu árém taruindawét yéné yammén.
english: Fear came on all who lived around them , and all these sayings were talked about throughout all the hill country of Judea .

nama: Méinyotio ár efe náyárayénd mwighé uwérsoghan tamorwén, a namotayénd, “Efe yéné ambum so yém?” Ménamén Yurane ngángé kété témorwén. Jakarayane wagh
english: All who heard them laid them up in their heart , saying , “ What then will this child be ?” The hand of the Lord was with him .

nama: Yárefé Jakaraya Ngánján Mbérmbéram yafoi si nufngoi,
english: His father Zacharias was filled with the Holy Spirit , and prophesied , saying ,

nama: “Áuwégh yém Yurai, Israilmén Ngánján! Fá té téném yánjo ár wanjarghét.
english: “ Blessed be the Lord , the God of Israel , for he has visited and redeemed his people ;

nama: Fá yénmáfáretam téfe wanjarégh ár yáne faiofnar ásáfogh ár Deifid yáne mérénmén.
english: and has raised up a horn of salvation for us in the house of his servant David

nama: Némé fá norayai yáne Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kénjúmé tándái,
english: ( as he spoke by the mouth of his holy prophets who have been from of old),

nama: Wanjarégh yém kétándmé téfene mék téfnárafene ngángata emofem méndméndat yénfandat yénd.
english: salvation from our enemies and from the hand of all who hate us ;

nama: Ghérghérsisé yuyafoi téfene afafefaf a ewafarotai yánjo njúnnjúnofnar árnyégh.
english: to show mercy toward our fathers , to remember his holy covenant ,

nama: Wengéghofnar si norayai téfene afé Ebraamefaf.
english: the oath which he swore to Abraham our father ,

nama: Yénd yénmutoryéng kétándmé mék téfnárfene ngángata a yénméindai yénd yáyot férférofnar yam wafarerghét:
english: to grant to us that we, being delivered out of the hand of our enemies , should serve him without fear,

nama: njúnnjúnofnar a mbarkánd kér ro Ngánjáne sáfan méinyotio téfene efghon.
english: in holiness and righteousness before him all the days of our life.

nama: Fém, tane ambum, so ném Minde Tuk Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár, so ném Yurane sáfréré end frengéghét yáyot,
english: And you , child , will be called a prophet of the Most High ; for you will go before the face of the Lord to prepare his ways ,

nama: yánjo árét so ewaramete wanjarégh mat yéfene yaufi wányányégh kénjúmé.
english: to give knowledge of salvation to his people by the remission of their sins,

nama: Ménamén téfene Ngánjánene ghérghérsisé njafar tambén árnyégh efogh so yéném téfefaf.
english: because of the tender mercy of our God , by which the dawn from on high will visit us ,

nama: So télálángé fá efe kwéfkwéfan em a kér mbanmbanan efe em so engwambete téfene kafkaf krufrát endmé.”
english: to shine on those who sit in darkness and the shadow of death ; to guide our feet into the way of peace .”

nama: Ambum nanotam a muyafé namndai mbérmbéran, a fá tékmangérwén fanfne yuwon kétánotio marataye nufaryéng Israilét.
english: The child was growing and becoming strong in spirit , and was in the desert until the day of his public appearance to Israel .

nama: Yéné efghon Kaisar Augustusam muyé si yéramai marataye yétkwén kayoghét Rom yuwon.
english: Now in those days , a decree went out from Caesar Augustus that all the world should be enrolled.

nama: Yéné simormén frondefifi yam yétkwén kayoghét njam Kwirinius gafana témorwén Sirian.
english: This was the first enrollment made when Quirinius was governor of Syria .

nama: Méinyotio ár nuwanoyénd yéfenjo tesenot yétkwén yáuwéghét.
english: All went to enroll themselves , everyone to his own city .

nama: Féyo, ménamén Josef siyém Deifidene ákimén, fá néngwanoi Najaret tesenta Galili yuwot kétán Betliem Judia kénjút, yéné tesen siyém ánde Deifid nanotam.
english: Joseph also went up from Galilee , out of the city of Nazareth , into Judea , to David ’s city , which is called Bethlehem, because he was of the house and family of David ,

nama: Fá nuwaneyayénd Merifé yétkwén kayoghét, efe té yémndayénd awerghét Josefefaf a táf áráféghétro témorwén ambum.
english: to enroll himself with Mary , who was pledged to be married to him as wife, being pregnant.

nama: Njamandio tarwén kété, efogh nawerai ambum áráfghét,
english: While they were there , the day had come for her to give birth .

nama: a fá fronde sénko ambum náráftam. Sálámeye yéfiyaryéng ambum yéflayéng wérárafene njamke téruan ménamén kété yau sifayé témorwén yéfeyot méngon. Sif wanjengégh ár a njafar si résagh ár
english: She gave birth to her firstborn son . She wrapped him in bands of cloth and laid him in a feeding trough, because there was no room for them in the inn .

nama: A sif wanjengégh ár tékmangérwén kaka sifayan ghékéf tawafayotawét sifafet sémbáran.
english: There were shepherds in the same country staying in the field, and keeping watch by night over their flock .

nama: Yurane njafar si résagh ár sélngwéle nufaryéng yéfefaf a Yurane ndimbal kwayaghayam etremngoi, a fá férfér tamorwén.
english: Behold, an angel of the Lord stood by them , and the glory of the Lord shone around them , and they were terrified .

nama: Wénde njafar si résagh árom emndai fá, “Férfér yau em. Yéndon enwarsan mer si féfeyot ndimbal áuwégh méinyotio árét.
english: The angel said to them , “Don’ t be afraid , for behold , I bring you good news of great joy which will be to all the people .

nama: Sénonjo Deifidene tesen kénjún Wanjarégh ár té káráfte féfeyot, fá yém Yuré Keriso.
english: For there is born to you today , in David ’ s city , a Savior , who is Christ the Lord .

nama: Yéné siyém féfeyot wayamngoghét: fémofem so tinjongi ambum sáláme fiyaréghkaf wérárafene njamke téruan.”
english: This is the sign to you : you will find a baby wrapped in strips of cloth, lying in a feeding trough.”

nama: Sélngwélafé minde tárfár njafar si résagh ár nufaryénd yéné njafar si résagh árfé, tuwetawét Ngánján a korayawét,
english: Suddenly , there was with the angel a multitude of the heavenly army praising God and saying ,

nama: “Áuwégh yém Ngánjáneyot minde tukén, yéné mbandan krufrát yém yéfeyot yáne méndefé árét.”
english: “ Glory to God in the highest , on earth peace , good will toward men .”

nama: Njam njafar si résagh árém efrangoyénd a nuwanoyénd njafarot, sif wanjengégh ár fáro norayayénd, “Kuwanongém Betliemét fandaghét némé yam nufrote kété, árkémamén Yuram té yénmaufroi.”
english: When the angels went away from them into the sky , the shepherds said to one another , “ Let ’ s go to Bethlehem, now , and see this thing that has happened , which the Lord has made known to us .”

nama: Sif wanjengégh ár nuwanoyénd wékeye ewinjoyénd Meri, Josef, a tosé efe tékmangérwén wérárafene téruan.
english: They came with haste and found both Mary and Joseph , and the baby was lying in the feeding trough.

nama: Yémofem njam yinjoyénd fá, si yétarnayénd némé njafar si résagh árom té ewaufroyéng yéné ambumoenemén.
english: When they saw it , they publicized widely the saying which was spoken to them about this child .

nama: Efe méinyotio náyárayénd sélngwél emormén némé sif wanjengégh árém ewafroyénd yéfeyot.
english: All who heard it wondered at the things which were spoken to them by the shepherds .

nama: Meriene tikfan si tamorwén a mé kawafarotau.
english: But Mary kept all these sayings , pondering them in her heart .

nama: Sif wanjengégh ár nangoyénd áuwéghafé tuwetawét Ngánján ménamén némé náyárayénd a ghékfe yinjoyénd, árkémamén té yéfe ewaufroyénd. Yesu témorwén wáwefnogh méngo kénjún
english: The shepherds returned , glorifying and praising God for all the things that they had heard and seen , just as it was told them .

nama: Ménayan 8 efghon, efogh nawerayéng yáne ghéngan néfghét, yáne yétkwén Yesu, njafar si résagh árom fronde yétkwén yaramai soramé su nawanai.
english: When eight days were fulfilled for the circumcision of the child , his name was called Jesus , which was given by the angel before he was conceived in the womb .

nama: Njam efogh nawerai wányányégh téménd wafroghét ndernáye Mosesene nák témorwén, Josef a Meri ambum yérséménd Jerusalemét Yurafaf wateghét
english: When the days of their purification according to the law of Moses were fulfilled, they brought him up to Jerusalem to present him to the Lord

nama: Yurane nák ndernáye té yéfarotam, “Méinyotio fronde sénko ghakér ambum wateghét Yurafaf.”
english: ( as it is written in the law of the Lord , “ Every male who opens the womb shall be called holy to the Lord ”),

nama: A fá nuwanoyénd ghéngén ramghét ménamén Yurane nák ndernáye noraye ménát sómbio mamuot o sómbio duf tosat. Simionene afrogh si
english: and to offer a sacrifice according to that which is said in the law of the Lord , “ A pair of turtledoves , or two young pigeons .”

nama: Ár témorwén Jerusalem kénjún yétkwén Simion, efe témorwén mbarkándro a Ngánján férférafé ár. Fá kawanjetau ménát Israil wanjarghét, a témorwén Ngánján Mbérmbér wafoghkaf.
english: Behold , there was a man in Jerusalem whose name was Simeon . This man was righteous and devout , looking for the consolation of Israel , and the Holy Spirit was on him .

nama: Ngánján Mbérmbéram mwighé yaramai, “Fém yau so kér ném fronde Yurane Keriso so tinjo.”
english: It had been revealed to him by the Holy Spirit that he should not see death before he had seen the Lord ’ s Christ .

nama: Ngánján Mbérmbéram yimndai Simion kétán wáwefnogh méngo kénjút. Njam yárefafem ambum Yesu yérséménd kétán túmén yam wafroghfaf ánde témorwén nákan,
english: He came in the Spirit into the temple . When the parents brought in the child , Jesus , that they might do concerning him according to the custom of the law ,

nama: Simioném ambum yambnai ngángaye a áuwégh yawangoyéng Ngánjáne táf norayai,
english: then he received him into his arms and blessed God , and said ,

nama: “Wanjarégh ár Yuré, fémon némé té wémndai, sénonjo yénd fene faiofnar ásáfogh ár kér so wém áuwéghafé.
english: “ Now you are releasing your servant , Master , according to your word , in peace ;

nama: Ménamén tane ghékfam fene wanjarégh té yinjo,
english: for my eyes have seen your salvation ,

nama: ménát méinyotio árém so yéfandat árkéméné fémon té néusénam.
english: which you have prepared before the face of all peoples ;

nama: Fá so yém ndenanit kwayaghé sái yuyafotam fene efalofifi Téndo árét, a yémon so eméinde ár sái nemnat tukén Israil árfenemén.”
english: a light for revelation to the nations , and the glory of your people Israel .”

nama: Ambumoe yárefé a yátmé sélngwél ermén némé Simion té norayai yánemén.
english: Joseph and his mother were marveling at the things which were spoken concerning him .

nama: Simioném efrendai fá a yémndai Meri, yátmé, “Yéné ambumom so eméinde ámb Israil ár sái nékmbotat Ngánján efalo yiyátoghét, a tárfár ár so kawengongi Ngánjánefaf a fá so yém waufarogh ménát mat yátoghét árét wénde tárfár árém so yékenat fá.
english: Simeon blessed them , and said to Mary , his mother , “ Behold , this child is appointed for the falling and the rising of many in Israel , and for a sign which is spoken against .

nama: Ménát tárfár árfene tikéfta yaufi mwighé so nufanat. Yaufi wafroghyam yémofem so ewafrotat yáfaf árkéménayam so tawaramangé ndimbal ghérghérsisé.” Annane ghérsamén afrogh si
english: Yes , a sword will pierce through your own soul , that the thoughts of many hearts may be revealed.”

nama: Kété témorwén Ngánjánene mat yátogh amaf, Anna, Fanuelene mérés, Aserene mérénmén. Fá témorwén auséfifi, a fá enmorarmén yánjarfé sefen yunjfro.
english: There was one Anna, a prophetess , the daughter of Phanuel , of the tribe of Asher ( she was of a great age , having lived with a husband seven years from her virginity ,

nama: A kwiré náyátoi kétánotio 84 yunjéf namndayéng. Yémon yau yéfrangoi wáwefnogh méngo wénde táwefnotau sémbár a efghon Ngánjánafé koraiwét a kawafarmetau.
english: and she had been a widow for about eighty-four years ), who didn’ t depart from the temple , worshiping with fastings and petitions night and day .

nama: Yéné efogh féneféneyan yénmormén yéfefaf, yémon kánjo yaramai Ngánjáne a ewaufroi ambumoenemén efe kawanjetawét Jerusalem wanjarghét.
english: Coming up at that very hour , she gave thanks to the Lord , and spoke of him to all those who were looking for redemption in Jerusalem .

nama: Njam Yurane nák némé wafroghét tamorwén Merifém Josefé té ewifeyayénd, fá táf nangeyayénd Galili yuwot yéfenjo tesenot Najaret.
english: When they had accomplished all things that were according to the law of the Lord , they returned into Galilee , to their own city , Nazareth .

nama: Ambum nanotam muyafé namndai, fá káfeté mwighé wafoghkaf témorwén, Ngánjánene ngárám yáfaf témorwén. Ghakér ambum Yesu wáwefnogh méngon
english: The child was growing, and was becoming strong in spirit , being filled with wisdom , and the grace of God was upon him .

nama: Méinyotio yunjfan yárefaf tayowéng Jerusalemét Waingégh téméndfaf.
english: His parents went every year to Jerusalem at the feast of the Passover .

nama: Njam fá 12 yunjéf namndai, fá nuwanoyénd kétán, túmén yam wafarogh téméndfaf.
english: When he was twelve years old , they went up to Jerusalem according to the custom of the feast ;

nama: Téménd soramé njam yárefaf kénangowét méngotuot, ghakér ambum Yesu nawangsoi Jerusalemén, wénde mat yau tarwén ambumoenemén.
english: and when they had fulfilled the days , as they were returning , the boy Jesus stayed behind in Jerusalem . Joseph and his mother didn’ t know it ,

nama: Fá kéma kemarwét ndené mérne kar álighan kénangotawét, ámbiro efogh eyoméng. Yémofem ronjagh yafngeyayénd yéfenjo mérén kénjún a fútarfefaf.
english: but supposing him to be in the company , they went a day ’s journey ; and they looked for him among their relatives and acquaintances .

nama: Njam yau fá yinjeyayénd, fá nangeyayénd Jerusalemét yá ronjaghét.
english: When they didn’t find him , they returned to Jerusalem , looking for him .

nama: Nambio efogh soramé yémofem yinjeyayénd wáwefnogh méngon, témorangérwén watamegh téfnárafé, káyáretau yéfefaf a ámogh si tawarametau.
english: After three days they found him in the temple , sitting in the middle of the teachers , both listening to them and asking them questions .

nama: Méinyotio emofem tiyáretawét fá emormén sélngwél yáne uwangoghan mwighé kwayaghé térsawét.
english: All who heard him were amazed at his understanding and his answers.

nama: Njam yárefafem yinjeyayénd fá, sélngwél ermén, a yatmam yémndai, “Ambum, ndené fémo némamén yénmafrowé? Yénd afafé ténre ndémkefé fe ronjaghan.”
english: When they saw him , they were astonished ; and his mother said to him , “ Son , why have you treated us this way ? Behold , your father and I were anxiously looking for you .”

nama: Yesum ewawangeyai, “Némémén yénd fémofem wéronjét? Fém mat fiya tarwén ndené yénd tane Afane méngo kénjún wém.”
english: He said to them , “ Why were you looking for me ? Didn’ t you know that I must be in my Father ’s house?”

nama: Wénde fá mé katambarwét némé si yémon té tamndéwéng.
english: They didn’ t understand the saying which he spoke to them .

nama: Fá nuwanoyénd Najaretét yárefafé a fá áyárégh ár náyátoi yárefafefaf. Wénde yatmam méinyotio si ewanai yánjo tikéf kénjút.
english: And he went down with them and came to Nazareth . He was subject to them , and his mother kept all these sayings in her heart .

nama: Yesu nanotam fifiyan a káfeté mwighayan a yáne ménde Ngánjánafé a ár.
english: And Jesus increased in wisdom and stature , and in favor with God and men .

nama: Njam tuk warsagh ár Kaisar Tiberiusém télimndau Rom 15 yunjéf, táf Fontius Failet témorwén Judiamén gafana, Erod témorwén limánégh ár Galili yuwon, Erode yánngén Filif témorwén limánégh ár Itulia a Trakonitisan a Lisanias témorwén limánégh ár Abileneyan,
english: Now in the fifteenth year of the reign of Tiberius Caesar , Pontius Pilate being governor of Judea , and Herod being tetrarch of Galilee , and his brother Philip tetrarch of the region of Ituraea and Trachonitis , and Lysanias tetrarch of Abilene,

nama: a táf Anas a Kayafas ghéngén wárogh sénko ár tarwén, Buk si yénmormén Jonefaf Jakarayane ambumoefaf fanfne yuwon.
english: during the high priesthood of Annas and Caiaphas , the word of God came to John , the son of Zacharias , in the wilderness .

nama: Yémon yarendam méinyotio Joden yu, si táitotau walitoghmén a tawalitotau yaufita awengoghét.
english: He came into all the region around the Jordan , preaching the baptism of repentance for remission of sins.

nama: Ndernáye yéfarotaménd Buk sian Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Aisayane si, “Ámb ár ke nutne fanfne yuwon, 'End frengéghét Yuraye álighét, wafrogh mbarkánd end yáyot.
english: As it is written in the book of the words of Isaiah the prophet , “ The voice of one crying in the wilderness , ‘ Make ready the way of the Lord . Make his paths straight .

nama: Méinyotio yékwyékw wéfángéghét a méinyotio mband tunakéf fénarghét a fafatot. Méinyotio ménjuté end so em mbarkánd a yaufi end so em frengéghkaf.
english: Every valley will be filled . Every mountain and hill will be brought low . The crooked will become straight , and the rough ways smooth .

nama: A méinyotio árém so tinjongi Ngánjánene wanjarégh.'”
english: All flesh will see God ’s salvation .’”

nama: Jon norayai ár mérénfaf árké tanmorwén nuwot walitoghét yáfaf, “Fém kamban ghérsafé ár mérén! Emon fém emndai Ngánjánene nékwta sái kenngongi?
english: He said therefore to the multitudes who went out to be baptized by him , “ You offspring of vipers , who warned you to flee from the wrath to come ?

nama: Yénayam so ewafrotati árkéménayam féfe so tayaufrongi ndené té nawengongi yaufita. A yau yaufi si kufngongi féfenjo kénjún ndené, 'Ebraam siyém téfene áki.' Yéndo emndetan fém ndené yéné wím tambén Ngánjánam so tautorngé ambum Ebraameyot.
english: Therefore produce fruits worthy of repentance , and don’ t begin to say among yourselves , ‘ We have Abraham for our father ;’ for I tell you that God is able to raise up children to Abraham from these stones !

nama: Mbilé siyém frengéghkaf yém wén sérémb néfghét, a árké wénam yau njam mer mbwe yéfuna yéné wén siyém néfghét a fését wighét.”
english: Even now the ax also lies at the root of the trees . Every tree therefore that doesn’ t produce good fruit is cut down and thrown into the fire .”

nama: Ár mérnam yémotayénd, “Némé yéndfem so yafrotam yénandmé?”
english: The multitudes asked him , “ What then must we do ?”

nama: Joném ewawangoi, “Ár efe sómbio sodafé njam yém ámb ároe so taramangé, a efe njamkefé yém ndenéyameyo so yafrote.”
english: He answered them , “ He who has two coats , let him give to him who has none . He who has food , let him do likewise .”

nama: Mani kafégh ár ndenéyameyo enmormén nu walitoghét, fá namotayénd, “Watamegh ár, némé so yafrotam?”
english: Tax collectors also came to be baptized, and they said to him , “ Teacher , what must we do ?”

nama: Yémon emndai fá, “Yau féfenjo méndeye takafangi kétamé némé té engémndan.”
english: He said to them , “ Collect no more than that which is appointed to you .”

nama: Ámb fiyaram wéi yémotayéng, “Yéndfem némé so yafrotam?” Yémo ewawangoi, “Yau ewarémnati maniot ár o ekafetati unyéghe a eremngotati féfenjo fayam.”
english: Soldiers also asked him , saying , “ What about us ? What must we do ?” He said to them , “Extort from no one by violence, neither accuse anyone wrongfully. Be content with your wages .”

nama: Ár kawanjetawét oyárghafé a méinyotio tikfan kéwérsotawét nde Jon némé Keriso namndé.
english: As the people were in expectation , and all men reasoned in their hearts concerning John , whether perhaps he was the Christ ,

nama: Joném ewawangoi méinyotioat, “Yéndon ewalitotan fém nue. Wénde efe tane soramé yéném tane muyé so taindangé, endene sandol ángégh fénaghét yénd féyotarofnar wém. Yémon so ewalitote fém Ngánján Mbérmbére a fése.
english: John answered them all , “ I indeed baptize you with water , but he comes who is mightier than I , the strap of whose sandals I am not worthy to loosen. He will baptize you in the Holy Spirit and fire .

nama: Fá siyém frengéghkaf yém njénro faloghét kétándmé fifiyafé mbwe yánjo foke. Kétándmé yémon so yésámbune saf, so euménde fifiyafé mbwe yánjo méngo kénjún, wénde so tawarongé njénro kémboghofnar fése.”
english: His winnowing fan is in his hand , and he will thoroughly cleanse his threshing floor, and will gather the wheat into his barn; but he will burn up the chaff with unquenchable fire .”

nama: A ámb tárfár sie Joném tawawéngsotau ár a mer si tawawaitotau yéfeyot.
english: Then with many other exhortations he preached good news to the people ,

nama: Wénde njam Joném yarnam Erod limánégh ár ménamén yémon nawerai yánngnoene amaf, Erodias a ámb yaufiyam ewafrotam,
english: but Herod the tetrarch , being reproved by him for Herodias , his brother’s wife , and for all the evil things which Herod had done ,

nama: Erodém yasamngoi yénandmé yéfefaf. Jon yélawayénd kwéfkwéf méngon. Yesuene walitoghmén
english: added this also to them all , that he shut up John in prison .

nama: Njam méinyotio ár ewalitotam, Yesu wéi yálitotam. Njam fá Ngánjánafé oraighan témorwén njafar táf nasawéryéng,
english: Now when all the people were baptized, Jesus also had been baptized and was praying . The sky was opened,

nama: a Ngánján Mbérmbér néneworyéng Yesuefaf men kénjúmé ndenanit mamu. Si yénmormén kétándmé njafarta, “Fém ném tane uwéghafé ambum, yénd minde náuwétan fefaf.” Yesuene ákiafenemén
english: and the Holy Spirit descended in a bodily form like a dove on him ; and a voice came out of the sky , saying “ You are my beloved Son . In you I am well pleased .”

nama: Yesu namndai 30 yunjéf táf yánjo ásáfogh yérnyai. Yesu maratan nakmai ndené Josefene ambum yém Josef témorwén Eliene ambum,
english: Jesus himself, when he began to teach, was about thirty years old , being the son ( as was supposed ) of Joseph , the son of Heli ,

nama: Matatene ambum, Lefiene ambum, Melkiene ambum, Yanaiene ambum, Josefene ambum,
english: the son of Matthat , the son of Levi , the son of Melchi , the son of Jannai , the son of Joseph ,

nama: Matatiasene ambum, Amosene ambum, Nakumene ambum, Esliene ambum, Nagaiene ambum,
english: the son of Mattathias , the son of Amos, the son of Nahum , the son of Esli , the son of Naggai ,

nama: Matene ambum, Matatiasene ambum, Semeinene ambum, Josekene ambum, Jodene ambum,
english: the son of Maath , the son of Mattathias , the son of Semein , the son of Joseph , the son of Judah ,

nama: Joananene ambum, Resane ambum, Jerufafelene ambum, Sialtielene ambum, Neriene ambum,
english: the son of Joanan, the son of Rhesa , the son of Zerubbabel , the son of Shealtiel , the son of Neri ,

nama: Melkiene ambum, Adiene ambum, Kosamene ambum, Elmadamene ambum, Erene ambum,
english: the son of Melchi , the son of Addi, the son of Cosam , the son of Elmodam , the son of Er ,

nama: Josuane ambum, Elieserene ambum, Jorimene ambum Matatene ambum, Lefiene ambum.
english: the son of Jose, the son of Eliezer , the son of Jorim , the son of Matthat , the son of Levi ,

nama: Simionene ambum, Judane ambum, Josefene ambum, Jonamene ambum, Eliakimene ambum,
english: the son of Simeon , the son of Judah , the son of Joseph , the son of Jonan , the son of Eliakim ,

nama: Meliane ambum, Menane ambum, Matatane ambum, Natanene ambum, Deifidene ambum,
english: the son of Melea , the son of Menan , the son of Mattatha , the son of Nathan , the son of David ,

nama: Jesiene ambum, Obedene ambum, Boasene ambum, Samonene ambum, Nasunene ambum,
english: the son of Jesse , the son of Obed , the son of Boaz , the son of Salmon, the son of Nahshon ,

nama: Aminadafene ambum, Ramene ambum, Ejronene ambum, Feresene ambum, Judane ambum,
english: the son of Amminadab, the son of Aram, the son of Hezron , the son of Perez , the son of Judah ,

nama: Jeikofene ambum, Aisekene ambum, Ebraamene ambum, Terane ambum, Naorene ambum,
english: the son of Jacob , the son of Isaac , the son of Abraham, the son of Terah , the son of Nahor ,

nama: Serukene ambum, Reuene ambum, Felekene ambum, Eferene ambum, Selane ambum,
english: the son of Serug, the son of Reu , the son of Peleg , the son of Eber, the son of Shelah ,

nama: Keinanene ambum, Afasadene ambum, Semene ambum, Noane ambum, Lamekene ambum,
english: the son of Cainan , the son of Arphaxad, the son of Shem , the son of Noah , the son of Lamech ,

nama: Metuselane ambum, Inokene ambum, Jaredene ambum, Maalalelene ambum, Kenanene ambum,
english: the son of Methuselah , the son of Enoch , the son of Jared , the son of Mahalaleel , the son of Cainan ,

nama: Enosene ambum, Setene ambum, Edémene ambum, Ngánjánene ambum.
english: the son of Enos , the son of Seth , the son of Adam, the son of God .

nama: Yesu, Ngánján Mbérmbér afoghkaf, kangotau Jodenta a Ngánján Mbérmbéram yalimai fanfne yuwomé,
english: Jesus , full of the Holy Spirit , returned from the Jordan and was led by the Spirit into the wilderness

nama: 40 efghon fá yufotam Sáifram. Yémon yau enetam yéné efghon, yéné soramé siogh témorwén.
english: for forty days , being tempted by the devil . He ate nothing in those days . Afterward, when they were completed, he was hungry .

nama: Sáifram yémndai, “Fém njam ném Ngánjánene ambum, yéné wím tengo njamkeyot.”
english: The devil said to him , “ If you are the Son of God , command this stone to become bread.”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, “Buk sian yékai, 'Ár njamkeyero yau so yémor.'”
english: Jesus answered him , saying , “ It is written , ‘ Man shall not live by bread alone , but by every word of God .’”

nama: Sáifram yalimai mband tunakfot a yauyafotam yáyot méinyotio mband marat.
english: The devil, leading him up on a high mountain, showed him all the kingdoms of the world in a moment of time .

nama: Sáifram yémndai, “Yéndon so kémaraman méinyotio muyé a meryam, ménamén tane em, so tawaraman méndefé árfet ende téu.
english: The devil said to him , “ I will give you all this authority and their glory , for it has been delivered to me , and I give it to whomever I want .

nama: Fémon njam kwáwefno ta, méinyotio fene so em.”
english: If you therefore will worship before me , it will all be yours .”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, “Buk sian yékai, 'Yáwefnota fene Yuré Ngánjánoe a yausáfota yandro.'”
english: Jesus answered him , “ Get behind me , Satan! For it is written , ‘ You shall worship the Lord your God , and you shall serve him only .’”

nama: Sáifram yalimai Jerusalemét a nokayoi minde tukén wáwefnogh méngon. Yémon yémndai, “Fém njam ném Ngánjánene ambum, fém yénamé kátna yuwot.”
english: He led him to Jerusalem and set him on the pinnacle of the temple , and said to him , “ If you are the Son of God , cast yourself down from here ,

nama: Buk sian yékai ndené, “Yémon so enwáfárete njafar si résagh ár fe wambghét,
english: for it is written , ‘ He will put his angels in charge of you , to guard you ;’

nama: yémofem so kémerangi yéfenjo ngángaye, ménát fene kafkaf yau so kawambangi wíman.”
english: and , ‘ On their hands they will bear you up , lest perhaps you dash your foot against a stone .’” + 4:11 Psalms 91:11-12

nama: Yesum yawangoi, “Ndené noraye, fémo yau yékmeta fenjo Yuré Ngánján ufoghan.”
english: Jesus answering, said to him , “ It has been said , ‘ You shall not tempt the Lord your God .’”

nama: Njam Sáifram yánjo ufogh yam ewifoi Yesu táf yéfrangoi ámb efghot. Yesu yékenayénd Najaretén
english: When the devil had completed every temptation , he departed from him until another time .

nama: Yesu nénangoi Galili yuwot Ngánján Mbérmbérene waftafé, si marat náyátoi yánemén méinyotio yuwomé.
english: Jesus returned in the power of the Spirit into Galilee , and news about him spread through all the surrounding area.

nama: Yémon tawatametau yéfenjo áumengégh méngomé, a méinyotio árém tuwetawét fá.
english: He taught in their synagogues , being glorified by all .

nama: Fá nuwanoi Najaretét, ánde fá nanotam, Safatan nuwanoi nélawai áumengégh méngot yáne túmén yam témorwén. Fá nokayoi wafghét.
english: He came to Nazareth , where he had been brought up . He entered , as was his custom , into the synagogue on the Sabbath day , and stood up to read.

nama: Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Aisayane kanéghkaf buk témorwén yaramayénd. Yémon yéferyéng a yinjoyéng si tékayongérwén,
english: The book of the prophet Isaiah was handed to him . He opened the book , and found the place where it was written ,

nama: “Yurane Mbérmbér siyém tafaf yém, ménamén yénd yémon wékafai mer si waitoghét yauyau árét. Yémon yénd kwamáfárete siot yéfeyot efe kwéfkwéf méngon elau wanjarghét, kwéfkwéf ár so kretangé, kérté téfnár so em ofé,
english: “ The Spirit of the Lord is on me , because he has anointed me to preach good news to the poor . He has sent me to heal the broken hearted, + 4:18 NU omits “to heal the broken hearted” to proclaim release to the captives, recovering of sight to the blind , to deliver those who are crushed,

nama: yéné yunjfan Ngánjánene ménde nufrotam.”
english: and to proclaim the acceptable year of the Lord .”

nama: Féyo yémon yéknam kénaghkaf buk, ewawangoi áumengégh méngo wanjengégh árét a námnjoyéng si waitogh sifayan. Méinyotio árfene ghékfam téfandawét fá áumengégh méngo kénjún.
english: He closed the book , gave it back to the attendant , and sat down . The eyes of all in the synagogue were fastened on him .

nama: Fá si orayégh nufngoi yéfefaf, “Sénonjo yéné si efalo náyáto féfene áyárégh kénjún.”
english: He began to tell them , “ Today , this Scripture has been fulfilled in your hearing .”

nama: Méinyotio korayawét yánemén frengégh si a sélngwélafé mer simén emormén yáne mbírmbírta njam nétoryéng. Yémofem namotayénd, “Yéné Josefene ambum yém?”
english: All testified about him and wondered at the gracious words which proceeded out of his mouth ; and they said , “Isn’ t this Joseph ’s son ?”

nama: Yesum emndai fá, “Fémofem so tanangi yéné káfeté si tafaf, 'Jokté, fémyo káfrenda!' A Fémofem so kwémndangi, 'Tafrota yéna fenjo tesenan némé yénd náyárangém ndené fémo némé tafrote Kafenamén.'”
english: He said to them , “Doubtless you will tell me this proverb , ‘ Physician , heal yourself ! Whatever we have heard done at Capernaum , do also here in your hometown .’”

nama: Yémon yasamngoi, “Efalo ewaufrotan, méinyotio Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár yau eumyoi yánjo méngotuot.
english: He said , “Most certainly I tell you , no prophet is acceptable in his hometown .

nama: Yéndon fém mat eyátotan ndené kété tárfár kwiré tamorwén Israilén Elaijane efghon, njam nu yau kafamndau nambio yunjéf a mbarmbar yafrotai ámb yunjéf. Kété táf káukáu nuyai yuwon.
english: But truly I tell you , there were many widows in Israel in the days of Elijah , when the sky was shut up three years and six months , when a great famine came over all the land .

nama: Wénde Elaija yau yáfáretaménd ámb Jumén ároefaf, wénde kwirafaftro Jarefatét Sidon kénjún.
english: Elijah was sent to none of them , except to Zarephath , in the land of Sidon , to a woman who was a widow .

nama: Kété tamorwén tárfár Israilén yaufi ghéngan enjnefé Elisane efghon, efe ámb yau mer témorwén Naamanro Siriamén.”
english: There were many lepers in Israel in the time of Elisha the prophet , yet not one of them was cleansed , except Naaman , the Syrian .”

nama: Méinyotio ár áumengégh méngo kénjún nékw tamorwén yéné sian njam yiyárayénd
english: They were all filled with wrath in the synagogue as they heard these things .

nama: Fá nékwafé nafghetaménd yifnayénd tesenta, yerayénd mband tunakéffaf ánde méngotu témorwén, kétándmé sái titawét yékwét.
english: They rose up , threw him out of the city , and led him to the brow of the hill that their city was built on , that they might throw him off the cliff .

nama: Wénde fá tiotau ár mérén kénjúmé a kété néngwanoi. Yesum ewifnam yaufi mbérmbér
english: But he , passing through the middle of them , went his way .

nama: Féyo fá nuwanoi kétán Káfenam tesen Galili yu kénjún a Safatan ár watamegh ewafngoi.
english: He came down to Capernaum , a city of Galilee . He was teaching them on the Sabbath day ,

nama: Fá tamorwén sélngwél yáne watameghan, ménamén yáne si waitogh témorwén muyafé.
english: and they were astonished at his teaching , for his word was with authority .

nama: Áumengégh méngon kété témorwén ár tasérmbotau yaufi mbérmbéram. Fá nutnayéng minde tukén.
english: In the synagogue there was a man who had a spirit of an unclean demon ; and he cried out with a loud voice ,

nama: “A! Fém némat ménde ném téfefaf, Yesu Najaretmén? Fém téfe wasérmboghét kéném? Yénd mat wém fém efe ném. Fém ném Ngánjánene njúnnjúnofnar ár.”
english: saying, “Ah! what have we to do with you , Jesus of Nazareth ? Have you come to destroy us ? I know who you are : the Holy One of God !”

nama: Yesum yarnam, “Métar mé! Kéntor yá tambén.” Féyo yaufi mbérmbéram ár yétarmai árfe ghékfan a néngtoryéng yéfrangoi ár wasérmboghofnar.
english: Jesus rebuked him , saying , “ Be silent and come out of him !” When the demon had thrown him down in the middle of them , he came out of him , having done him no harm.

nama: Ár méinyotio sélngwél emormén a korayawét fáro, “Némé watamegh yéné yém? Muyafé a waftafé yémon yaufi mbérmbér ewitrote a fá néngtonat!”
english: Amazement came on all and they spoke together , one with another , saying , “ What is this word ? For with authority and power he commands the unclean spirits , and they come out !”

nama: A si yánemén marat namndai kaka méngotuamé Yesum mer táyátotau tárfár ár
english: News about him went out into every place of the surrounding region .

nama: Yesum yéfrangoi áumengégh méngo a nuwanoi kétán Saimonene méngot. Saimone yánat témorwén minde waftafé enjne, a yémofem Yesu yamnendayénd yá wáutárghét.
english: He rose up from the synagogue and entered into Simon ’s house . Simon ’s mother-in-law was afflicted with a great fever , and they begged him to help her .

nama: Fá náwefnoi yáfaf a enjne yémndai, “Kitér!” a yéfrangoi minde waftafé enjneyam. Fá nurtotam táf fété a yémon njamke ewaneyam yéfeyot.
english: He stood over her and rebuked the fever , and it left her . Immediately she rose up and served them .

nama: Njam efogh ngironau, árém tánémnjawét Yesuefaf méinyotio efe tamorwén fénaté enjnefé, a ngángé tafayongai yéfefaf, mer káyátotawét.
english: When the sun was setting , all those who had any sick with various diseases brought them to him ; and he laid his hands on every one of them , and healed them .

nama: Yaufi mbérmbér kétonawét tárfár ár tambén, kutnawét, “Fém ném Ngánjánene ambum!” Wénde Yesum ekmboi fá siofnar, ménamén fá mat tamorwén ndené Keriso yém.
english: Demons also came out of many , crying out and saying , “ You are the Christ , the Son of God !” Rebuking them , he didn’ t allow them to speak , because they knew that he was the Christ .

nama: Faurghan Yesu nuwanoi fanfne yuwot. Árém téronjawét Yesu a njam fá enmormén kétán ánde Yesu témormén, yémofem yékmboyénd fá ménát yau so tafrangongai fá.
english: When it was day , he departed and went into an uninhabited place and the multitudes looked for him , and came to him , and held on to him , so that he wouldn’ t go away from them .

nama: Wénde yémon emndai, “Yéndon so yaitotan mer si Ngánjánene limánéghmén ámb tesenan, ménamén yénat yénd wémáfáretam.”
english: But he said to them , “ I must preach the good news of God ’s Kingdom to the other cities also . For this reason I have been sent .”

nama: Mé fá témorwén si waitogh áumengégh méngon Judian.
english: He was preaching in the synagogues of Galilee .

nama: Ámb efghon Yesu témorwén Genesaret arakaf téndon tákáyongérwén, ár mérénafé tamorwén yarendayénd a Buk sifaf káyáretawét.
english: Now while the multitude pressed on him and heard the word of God , he was standing by the lake of Gennesaret .

nama: Yémon ewinjeyai sómbio bout nu téndon, efrangeyayénd kété susi árém, efe tarwén yéfenjo net umbarghan.
english: He saw two boats standing by the lake , but the fishermen had gone out of them and were washing their nets .

nama: Fá nuflai ámb boutan, árké témorwén Saimonene, yémndayéng bout witroghét kor némbnare. Féyo fá námnjoi a ár watamegh ewafngoi bout kénjúta.
english: He entered into one of the boats , which was Simon ’s, and asked him to put out a little from the land . He sat down and taught the multitudes from the boat .

nama: Njam yémon si ewifoi, Saimonefaf norayai, “Sumbét tangérsa net a tanwam wagifot.”
english: When he had finished speaking , he said to Simon , “ Put out into the deep and let down your nets for a catch.”

nama: Saimoném yawangoi, “Watamegh ár, sémbár tombé téfé násáfotam a némé ámb yau ernyangém. Wénde ménamén fém té kés noraya, yénd so wéngém net tanwaman.”
english: Simon answered him , “ Master , we worked all night and caught nothing ; but at your word I will let down the net .”

nama: Njam yémofem yafrotaménd némat té engémndai, yémofem ereindaménd tárfár wagif a yéfene net aftéraréghétro tamorwén.
english: When they had done this , they caught a great multitude of fish , and their net was breaking.

nama: Yénémamén yémofem engwaunyeyayénd yéfe fútarfet ámb boutot wáutárghét, fá enmormén a sómbio boutan tawaflitawét minde tárfár wagif a olitoghétro tárwén.
english: They beckoned to their partners in the other boat , that they should come and help them . They came and filled both boats , so that they began to sink .

nama: Njam Saimon Fitam yinjoi yéné, yémon yáwefnoi Yesue budme a norayai, “Nguwano ta tambén, Yuré, yénd wém yaufiyamafé ár!”
english: But Simon Peter , when he saw it , fell down at Jesus ’ knees , saying , “ Depart from me , for I am a sinful man, Lord .”

nama: Fá a méinyotio yáne wáutárégh ár yéné wagif arnyéghmén sélngwél emormén,
english: For he was amazed , and all who were with him , at the catch of fish which they had caught ;

nama: ndenéyameyo wéi Jems a Jon, Jebediene ambum a Saimonene fútaréf. Yesu norayai Saimonefaf, “Yau férfér ném. Sénonjo yénandmé fém so ném ár tárfár rényégh ár.”
english: and so also were James and John , sons of Zebedee , who were partners with Simon . Jesus said to Simon , “Don’ t be afraid . From now on you will be catching people alive.”

nama: Yémofem yéfenjo bout tunat engwimndangeyayénd a méinyotio rokar eureyayénd yéngwaitoyénd fá. Yesum mer yiyátoi yaufi ghéngan enjnefé ár
english: When they had brought their boats to land , they left everything , and followed him .

nama: Njamandio Yesu témorwén ámb tesenan, ámb ár yaufi ghéngan enjnefé témorwén. Yémo njam Yesu yinjoi, fá yáne sáfe nuyai mbandot a yamnendai, “Yuré, fém njam ménde ném, fémon mer kwiyáto yénd.”
english: While he was in one of the cities , behold , there was a man full of leprosy . When he saw Jesus , he fell on his face and begged him , saying , “ Lord , if you want to , you can make me clean .”

nama: Yesum ngángé ewatembai a yiyánjai ár a norayai, “Yénd ménde fété wém. So mer ném!” A táf fété yaufi ghéngan enjneyam yéfrangoi.
english: He stretched out his hand and touched him , saying , “ I want to . Be made clean .” Immediately the leprosy left him .

nama: Yesum yémndai fá, “Ende yau taufro, téu nguwano, kauyafo fémyo ghéngén wárogh téfnárafefaf a ghéngén taram némé Mosesene nákan noraye frengéghmén ánde árém so kémwinjongi ndené fene ghéngan mer té namndé.”
english: He commanded him to tell no one , “ But go your way and show yourself to the priest , and offer for your cleansing according to what Moses commanded , for a testimony to them .”

nama: Wénde si yánemén marat náyátoi. Ár tárfár tanmorwén áyárghét yáfaf a tárfár frengégham tarsau enjne téfnár.
english: But the report concerning him spread much more , and great multitudes came together to hear and to be healed by him of their infirmities.

nama: Wénde Yesu túmén kitérmbongai métar sifayat Ngánjánafé oraighét. Yesum mer yiyátoi akényégh ár
english: But he withdrew himself into the desert and prayed .

nama: Ámb efghon njamandio Yesum tawatametau, Farasi ár a nák watamegh ár, efe té enmormén fénaté méngotuta Galili yumén, Judiamén a Jerusalemén tamorangérwén. Yurane wafté kété témorwén ménát enjne téfnár frengéghét.
english: On one of those days , he was teaching ; and there were Pharisees and teachers of the law sitting by who had come out of every village of Galilee , Judea , and Jerusalem . The power of the Lord was with him to heal them .

nama: Ámb árém térsawét aknyégh ár yame sutafé yéta résaghét téngrametawét kétán méngot Yesuene sáfrére kémghét.
english: Behold , men brought a paralyzed man on a cot, and they sought to bring him in to lay before Jesus .

nama: Wénde yémofem yau ámb end yinjoyénd ménamén ár tárfármén, yénémamén tarmbotawét méngo sémsot tukét, a kend enendayénd némbne fénemé ángéghe tewénawét ár néndkfot Yesuene sáfrére.
english: Not finding a way to bring him in because of the multitude , they went up to the housetop and let him down through the tiles with his cot into the middle before Jesus .

nama: Njam Yesum ewawinjoi yéfene ndimbal mwighé, fá norayai, “Fútar, fene yaufi té wawalinda.”
english: Seeing their faith , he said to him , “Man, your sins are forgiven you .”

nama: Farasi ár a nák watamegh ár mwighé tawaitotawét yéfenjomén, “Efe yéné ár yém wanyogh si kés noraye? Efe yaufi so tawalindangé wénde Ngánjánamro?”
english: The scribes and the Pharisees began to reason , saying , “ Who is this who speaks blasphemies? Who can forgive sins, but God alone ?”

nama: Yesu mat té náyátoi fá némé kemnawét a emotai, “Fém némamén nemnati féfene tikfan?
english: But Jesus , perceiving their thoughts , answered them , “ Why are you reasoning so in your hearts ?

nama: Árkéméné áfrátaye yém sái korayangén, 'Fene yaufi sem wawalingéghkaf em,' o sái korayangén, 'Kokai a kuano'?
english: Which is easier to say , ‘ Your sins are forgiven you ,’ or to say , ‘ Arise and walk ’?

nama: Wénde fém mat so em ndené Ároene Ambum muyafé yém yéné mbandan ménát yaufi wawalingéghét.” Fá norayai akényégh ároefaf, “Yéndon némndetan fém, kokai, tané fenjo yame a kuano méngot.”
english: But that you may know that the Son of Man has authority on earth to forgive sins,” he said to the paralyzed man , “ I tell you , arise , take up your cot, and go to your house .”

nama: Táfandio fá fété nénokayoi yéfe sáfrére, yékafai némayan té tékmangérwén a néngwanoi méngot Ngánján ténguwetau.
english: Immediately he rose up before them , and took up that which he was laying on , and departed to his house , glorifying God .

nama: Méinyotio ár sélngwél emormén a Ngánjánoe áuwégh tawangotawét. Fá Ngánján férféram ewafoi a norayayénd. “Yéndfem téfé efandam sélngwélafé yam sénonjo!” Yesum yékafai Lefi
english: Amazement took hold on all , and they glorified God . They were filled with fear , saying , “ We have seen strange things today .”

nama: Yéné soramé, Yesu néngwanoi a yinjoi mani kafégh ár yétkwén Lefi témorangérwén mani kafégh sifayan. Yesum yémndai fá, “Kwénmaito yénd.”
english: After these things he went out and saw a tax collector named Levi sitting at the tax office, and said to him , “ Follow me !”

nama: A Lefi nokayoi, efrangoi méinyotio rokar a yáitoi fá.
english: He left everything , and rose up and followed him .

nama: Kétándmé Lefim ndimbal téménd néusénam Yesueyot yánjo méngon, a ndimbal mérén mani kafégh ár a ámb kés em njamke tánetawét yémafé.
english: Levi made a great feast for him in his house . There was a great crowd of tax collectors and others who were reclining with them .

nama: Wénde Farasi ár a nák watamegh ár káwatarnawét yáne waitogh árfefaf, “Némamén fémofem enetati njamke a nu mani kafégh árfé a yaufiyam wafrogh árfé?”
english: Their scribes and the Pharisees murmured against his disciples , saying , “ Why do you eat and drink with the tax collectors and sinners?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, “Yau mer árém njokté yarawetat wénde enjne téfnáramro.
english: Jesus answered them , “ Those who are healthy have no need for a physician , but those who are sick do .

nama: Yénd yau mbarkánd ár moghét wénmormén, wénde yaufiyam ár wengoghét.” Yesu yémotayénd awafarmanéghmén
english: I have not come to call the righteous , but sinners, to repentance .”

nama: Yémofem norayayénd yáfaf, “Jonene waitogh ár túmén awafarmanéghan a Ngánjánafé oraighan em a wéi ndenéyameyo Farasi árfene waitogh ár, wénde fene sem njamke a nu néneyanro em.”
english: They said to him , “Why do John ’s disciples often fast and pray , likewise also the disciples of the Pharisees , but yours eat and drink ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi, “Féyotaro fémofem so taméindangi awerégh ároene wan téfnár awafarmanéghét njamandio yémafé em?
english: He said to them , “ Can you make the friends of the bridegroom fast while the bridegroom is with them ?

nama: Wénde efogh yéna yéném njam awerégh ár so nguwanongé yéfe tambén, yéné efghon fá so nawafarmetat.”
english: But the days will come when the bridegroom will be taken away from them . Then they will fast in those days .”

nama: Yesum tawaufrotau yéné rengerenge si, “Emo yau so tétirarngé totér sálámeta mbékwbékwot tékayongé namghét tándáwár sálámeyan. Njam yémon yafrota, yémo so tétirarngé totér sáláme, a yau so katmangé tándáwár sálámeyan.
english: He also told a parable to them . “ No one puts a piece from a new garment on an old garment , or else he will tear the new , and also the piece from the new will not match the old .

nama: A emon yau so yararoté totér wéri nu tándáwár wéri nu ndimbayan. Njam yémon yafrota, totér wéri nu so tétembarngé a taghnangé wéri nu ndimbé, wéri nu so nasune a wéri nu ndimbé so taghnangé.
english: No one puts new wine into old wineskins, or else the new wine will burst the skins, and it will be spilled and the skins will be destroyed.

nama: Yau, totér wéri nu fété so yararote totér wéri nu ndimbat.
english: But new wine must be put into fresh wineskins, and both are preserved.

nama: A yau efe ámb tándáwár wéri nu néne soramé wéi ménde so yéngém totrot, ménamén fá ndené noraye, 'Tándáwár siyém merfifi.'”
english: No man having drunk old wine immediately desires new , for he says , ‘ The old is better .’”

nama: Ámb Safatan Yesu tiotau mbwe ndawan, a yánjo waitogh árém ámb wén mbwe kafégh ewafngoyénd, yéfenjo ngángaye tasénawét mbwe a tánetawét.
english: Now on the second Sabbath after the first , he was going through the grain fields . His disciples plucked the heads of grain and ate , rubbing them in their hands .

nama: Ámb Farasi árém yémotayénd, “Némamén fémo nák eráfne Safatan?”
english: But some of the Pharisees said to them , “ Why do you do that which is not lawful to do on the Sabbath day ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangoi yéfeyot, “Fémofem yau yaftaménd némé Deifidém tafrotau njam fá a yánjo mérnafé siogh tamorwén?
english: Jesus , answering them , said , “Haven’ t you read what David did when he was hungry , he and those who were with him ,

nama: Fá nélawai Ngánjánene méngot, a yékafai frengéghkaf féskaf flawé, yémon enetam árké nák témorwén yéfe ghéngén wárogh árfetro nénet. A yémon wéi ewaramai ámb yánjo mérnat.”
english: how he entered into God ’s house , and took and ate the show bread, and gave also to those who were with him , which is not lawful to eat except for the priests alone ?”

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, “Ároene Ambum siyém Safatoe Yuré.”
english: He said to them , “ The Son of Man is lord of the Sabbath .”

nama: Ámb Safatan fá nénguwanoi áumengégh méngo kénjút a watamegh ewafngoi, a ár kété témorwén endene tambén ngángé akényégh áre tamorwén.
english: It also happened on another Sabbath that he entered into the synagogue and taught . There was a man there , and his right hand was withered .

nama: Farasi ár a nák watamegh árém téfén tronjawét Yesue éwighét, féyo yémofem ghékéf tafayotawét ménát yémon ámb frengégh ásáfogh kar so tawafrotau Safatan.
english: The scribes and the Pharisees watched him , to see whether he would heal on the Sabbath , that they might find an accusation against him .

nama: Wénde Yesu mat náyátoi yéfene mwighé némé kemnawét a norayai ngángé aknyégh ároefaf, “Kunjé a kokai méinyotio ár safan.” Féyo fá nunjai a nokayoi kété.
english: But he knew their thoughts ; and he said to the man who had the withered hand , “ Rise up and stand in the middle .” He arose and stood .

nama: Féyo Yesu norayai yéfefaf, “Yéndo emotan fém, árkéméné yém nák Safatan: mer wafroghét o yaufi wafroghét, ghérsé wanjarghét o wirorghét?”
english: Then Jesus said to them , “ I will ask you something: Is it lawful on the Sabbath to do good , or to do harm ? To save a life , or to kill?”

nama: Yémon ghékfe fá tafandau méinyotio, a norayai ároefef, “Fenjo ngángé tásáfo.” Akényégh árom yafrotam ndené, a yáne ngángé táf mer namndai.
english: He looked around at them all , and said to the man , “ Stretch out your hand .” He did , and his hand was restored as sound as the other .

nama: Wénde fá tamorwén nékwafé a warunyégh yafngoyénd yéfene kénjúnro némé so tafrotawét Yesuefaf. 12 Yesuene muyafé ár
english: But they were filled with rage, and talked with one another about what they might do to Jesus .

nama: Ámb efghon Yesu néngwanoi mband tunakéf téndot Ngánjánafé oraighét, a korayau Ngánjánefaf sémbár tombé faurghétio.
english: In these days , he went out to the mountain to pray , and he continued all night in prayer to God .

nama: Njam akw efawéryéng, yémon emotai yánjo waitogh ár ewaferyéng 12ro, emo yéfe yétkwén ewaramai yánjo muyafé árét,
english: When it was day , he called his disciples , and from them he chose twelve , whom he also named apostles:

nama: Saimon ende yétkwén yaramai Fité, yánngén Endru, Jems, Jon, Filif, Batolome,
english: Simon , whom he also named Peter ; Andrew, his brother; James ; John ; Philip ; Bartholomew;

nama: Metyu, Tomas, Jems Alfesene ambum, Saimon efe ménde témorwén ndené Ju ár so kawanjetawét fáyo yau Rom waftayan,
english: Matthew ; Thomas ; James the son of Alphaeus; Simon who was called the Zealot ;

nama: Judas Jemsene ambum, Judas Iskariot efe namndai sén téfnár. Frengégh a tékrát
english: Judas the son of James ; and Judas Iscariot , who also became a traitor .

nama: Fá Yesufé néneworyénd tunakéfta a nokayoyénd fafat sifayan. Tárfár Yesuene waitogh ár kété tamorwén a tárfár wéi enmormén Judiamén, ndenáyo Jerusalem, Taire a Sidon arakaf téndomén,
english: He came down with them and stood on a level place , with a crowd of his disciples and a great number of the people from all Judea and Jerusalem and the sea coast of Tyre and Sidon , who came to hear him and to be healed of their diseases ,

nama: efe té enmormén si áyárghét yáfaf a yéfene enjneta mer yátoghét. Efe yaufi mbérmbéram tawasérmbotau mer náyátoyénd,
english: as well as those who were troubled by unclean spirits ; and they were being healed .

nama: a méinyotio árém yéta yanjaghét trametawét fá, ménamén wafté ngétonau Yesueta a mer ngáyátotawét.
english: All the multitude sought to touch him , for power came out of him and healed them all .

nama: Yémon tafandau yánjo waitogh ár a norayai, “Frengégh yém féfeyot efe em yauyau, ménamén féfeyot siyém Ngánjánene limánégh.
english: He lifted up his eyes to his disciples , and said : “ Blessed are you who are poor , for God ’s Kingdom is yours .

nama: Frengégh yém féfeyot efe em siogh sénonjo, ménamén fém so em remngoghkaf. Frengégh yém féfeyot efe ye nendat sénonjo, ménamén fém so em fénan.
english: Blessed are you who hunger now , for you will be filled . Blessed are you who weep now , for you will laugh .

nama: Frengégh yém féfeyot njam árém méndméndat efandat, njam árém ekarotat fém a ewasalitat, a ekenat fém emndetat yaufi mbérmbér em, ménamén Ároene Ambummén.
english: Blessed are you when men hate you , and when they exclude and mock you , and throw out your name as evil , for the Son of Man ’s sake .

nama: “Áuwégh yém yéné efghon a ermángégh áuwéghafé, ménamén fene fai siyém ndimbal njafaran. Ndenéyameyo yéfene ákifem takarotawét Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár.
english: Rejoice in that day and leap for joy , for behold , your reward is great in heaven , for their fathers did the same thing to the prophets .

nama: “Wénde tékrát yém féfeyot efe em wemár, ménamén fém té tamorwén áfrát ghérsaye.
english: “ But woe to you who are rich ! For you have received your consolation .

nama: Tékrat yém féfeyot efe remngoghkaf sénonjo em, ménamén fém siogh so engém. Tékrat yém féfeyot efe em fénan sénonjo, ménamén fém so em ghérghérsisayan a yeyan.
english: Woe to you , you who are full now , for you will be hungry . Woe to you who laugh now , for you will mourn and weep .

nama: Nderé mámáfi so yém féfeyot njam méinyotio árém norayat mer si féfenemén ndenáye yéfene ákifem tamndetawét unyégh mat yátogh ár. Euwetati mék téfnár
english: Woe , when men speak well of you , for their fathers did the same thing to the false prophets .

nama: “Wénde yéndon emndetan fém emofem wiyáretat yénd: Féfene mék téfnár euwetati, mer ewawafrotati yéfeyot emofem méndméndat efandat fém.
english: “ But I tell you who hear: love your enemies , do good to those who hate you ,

nama: Efrendati fá emofem ewafángotat fém, Ngánjánafé orayégh yéfeyot emofem ekenat féfe.
english: bless those who curse you , and pray for those who mistreat you .

nama: Njam ámb árém fétkaman kénésmangé, kawengo wéi witmé yáfaf. Njam ámb árém kémawanangé fene sénjté sodé, yau táf tékmbo téngéumyo a ámb sodé téngwaram.
english: To him who strikes you on the cheek , offer also the other ; and from him who takes away your cloak , don’ t withhold your coat also .

nama: Ewarameta méinyotio árét emofem némamnendat fém, emo njam kémawanangé fene némé yém, yau táf tango.
english: Give to everyone who asks you , and don’ t ask him who takes away your goods to give them back again .

nama: Ámb árét ewafrotati fene méndefé némé em árfeyot wénde so némawafrotat.
english: “ As you would like people to do to you , do exactly so to them .

nama: Njam fémofem euwetati fá emofem fém némuwetat, némamén fémofem frengégh so tanangi? Ndenéyameyo yaufiyam árém euwetat emofem fá euwetat.
english: “ If you love those who love you , what credit is that to you ? For even sinners love those who love them .

nama: A njam fémofem ewawafrotati mer yéfeyotro efe mer em féfefaf, némamén fémofem frengégh so tanangi? Ndené yam yaufiyam árém yéné ewafrotat.
english: If you do good to those who do good to you , what credit is that to you ? For even sinners do the same .

nama: A njam fém méghmégh em yéfefaf kétamé emofem fai so kémawangongi, némamén fémofem frengégh so tanangi? Ndenéyameyo yaufiyam árém méghméghafé so némanjetat fai wangoghét.
english: If you lend to those from whom you hope to receive , what credit is that to you ? Even sinners lend to sinners, to receive back as much.

nama: Wénde euwetati féfene mék téfnár, mer ewawafrotati yéfeyot, yau nawanjetati fai wangoghétro. Féyo féfene fai so yém ndimbal, a fém so em Minde tuk Ngánjánene Ambum, ménamén fá siyém mer yéfefaf kánjo si emofem yau yawangotat a em yaufian.
english: But love your enemies , and do good , and lend , expecting nothing back; and your reward will be great , and you will be children of the Most High ; for he is kind toward the unthankful and evil .

nama: Aem ghérghérsisafé, ndené fété Féferafé ghérghérsisafé kés yém. Wayamngogh ámb ár
english: “Therefore be merciful , even as your Father is also merciful .

nama: “Árfene yaufi yau ewaftati ménamén Ngánjánam féfene yaufi yau so ewafte. Ár yau ewafalngotati emndetati ndené yaufiyamafé em ménamén yau wéi fém so ewafalngotat. Tawawalindangé yéfene yaufimén, a féfene so wéi fá tawawalindangé.
english: Don’t judge , and you won’t be judged . Don’t condemn , and you won’t be condemned . Set free, and you will be set free.

nama: Ramégh ámb árét ménát Ngánjánam féfe wéi so tawaramangé. Fémofem njam yéné yam yafrotati so ewinjotati tárfár, so ewaramete kétán féfene ngángé afoghare so ewam a nasunat. Nderé tárfár fémofem njam ewarametati, ndenéyameyo féfe so ewaramete.”
english: “ Give , and it will be given to you : good measure , pressed down , shaken together , and running over , will be given to you . For with the same measure you measure it will be measured back to you .”

nama: Yesum tawaufrotau yéné rengerenge si, “Féyotaro kwéfkwéf árém so yémnje kwéfkwéf ár? Wét yau so kélawend yékwét?
english: He spoke a parable to them . “ Can the blind guide the blind ? Won’t they both fall into a pit ?

nama: Waitogh árém yau so taindangi yéfene watamegh ár, wénde efe njam ewatametat méinyotio yam, fá so em ndenáyo yéfene watamegh ár.
english: A disciple is not above his teacher , but everyone when he is fully trained will be like his teacher .

nama: “Némamén fémo yéfande fe fútarene ghékéf fémégh a yau nofande wén ténj féfenjo ghékfan?
english: Why do you see the speck of chaff that is in your brother’s eye , but don’ t consider the beam that is in your own eye ?

nama: Ndernáye fémo so fe fútar témnde, 'Fútar, kwumyo yénd fene ghékéf fémégh utorghét,' táf yéfande wén ténj fenjo ghékfan? Fém unyégh ár, fronde tutor wén ténj fenjo ghékfan, fém táf so kéreta kwayaghayan fe fútarene ghékéf fémégh utorghét. Wén a yáne mbwe
english: Or how can you tell your brother, ‘Brother, let me remove the speck of chaff that is in your eye ,’ when you yourself don’ t see the beam that is in your own eye ? You hypocrite ! First remove the beam from your own eye , and then you can see clearly to remove the speck of chaff that is in your brother’s eye .

nama: “Mer wénam yau efune yaufi mbwe, yaufi wénam yau efune mer mbwe.
english: “ For there is no good tree that produces rotten fruit , nor again a rotten tree that produces good fruit .

nama: Méinyotio wén so tawayamngo yéfenjo mbweyan. Árém yau so ekafetat wiwi kétándmé féfta o ás kétándmé mbita.
english: For each tree is known by its own fruit . For people don’ t gather figs from thorns, nor do they gather grapes from a bramble bush.

nama: Mer árom efune meryam mer tikéfta, a wéi ndenéyameyo yaufi árom yaufiyam efune yaufi tikéfta. Tikfan némé afoghare yém yéné noraye. Sómbio méngo ramégh ár
english: The good man out of the good treasure of his heart brings out that which is good , and the evil man out of the evil treasure of his heart brings out that which is evil , for out of the abundance of the heart , his mouth speaks .

nama: “Némamén wét yénd wémndetati 'Yuré, Yuré,' a yau ewafrotati ndenáye yéndon némé norayan?
english: “ Why do you call me , ‘ Lord , Lord ,’ and don’t do the things which I say ?

nama: Yéndon so safén tékman fá nderé safot nérete efe tafaf yéném tane si áyárghét a wafroghan yékmete.
english: Everyone who comes to me , and hears my words and does them , I will show you who he is like .

nama: Fá siyém ndenanit méngo ramégh ár, emo kénjkam yétanam a wíman méngo yeitam. Njam kéfér nénengoi, méngo yéta yutaryéng, wénde yau yésámbnetai, ménamén sotafé raméghmén tétnongérwén.
english: He is like a man building a house , who dug and went deep and laid a foundation on the rock . When a flood arose , the stream broke against that house , and could not shake it , because it was founded on the rock .

nama: Wénde emon njam tane si náyáreta a yau ekmete wafroghyaman, ndenanit yéné ár yém emo méngo yeitam faru mbandan. Njam kéfram yutaryéng yéné méngo, yiroryéng ambino.”
english: But he who hears and doesn’ t do , is like a man who built a house on the earth without a foundation , against which the stream broke, and immediately it fell ; and the ruin of that house was great .”

nama: Yesum njam si ewifoi árét, fá nuwanoi Káfenamét.
english: After he had finished speaking in the hearing of the people , he entered into Capernaum .

nama: Rom fiyaré sénko ároene faiofnar ásáfogh ár, efe tutémndawét ndimbal kéráye, yéné ár enjne témorwén a kaka témorwén krotro.
english: A certain centurion ’ s servant , who was dear to him , was sick and at the point of death.

nama: Rom fiyaré sénko ár náyárai Yesuenemén, yémo ewáfáretam Ju ndimbal ár yamnendai Yesu álighét enjne téfnárfaf frengéghét.
english: When he heard about Jesus , he sent to him elders of the Jews , asking him to come and save his servant .

nama: Njam fá nénuwanoyénd Yesuefaf, féyo yamnendayénd, “Yéné árom nénémnde álighét fém yá frengéghét,”
english: When they came to Jesus , they begged him earnestly , saying , “ He is worthy for you to do this for him ,

nama: ménamén yémon yuwetam téfene ndimbal yu a áumengégh méngo yeitam téfeyot.
english: for he loves our nation , and he built our synagogue for us .”

nama: Féyo Yesuf nuwanoyénd yémafé. Fá nayuofnar néngaflayénd méngota táf Rom fiyaré sénko árom njam ewáfáretam yá fútaréf yáfaf siot, “Yuré, mwighayan yau nuita fém. Yéndon yau so fém kénémndan tane méngo álighét ménamén yénd wém yaufiyam ár.
english: Jesus went with them . When he was now not far from the house , the centurion sent friends to him , saying to him , “ Lord , don’ t trouble yourself, for I am not worthy for you to come under my roof .

nama: Yéné téfnan yénd yau mer kafandan sái kwénmorwén fefaf. Wénde mé siro koraya táf tane faiofnar ásáfogh ár mer so káyátongé.
english: Therefore I didn’ t even think myself worthy to come to you ; but say the word , and my servant will be healed .

nama: Yénd yéndio wém muyayan, fiyaré em tane mbanmbanan. Yéndon némat tafaretangén yénat, 'Kuwano,' so kuwanongé. Yénat njam tafaretangén 'kénaf,' a fá so yéném a njam tafaretangén tane faiofnar ásáfogh ár, 'Yéné tafrota,' a yémon so yafrote.”
english: For I also am a man placed under authority , having under myself soldiers . I tell this one , ‘ Go !’ and he goes ; and to another , ‘ Come !’ and he comes ; and to my servant , ‘ Do this ,’ and he does it .”

nama: Njam Yesum náyárai sélngwélafé si yá tambén, a fá nawengoi kétán ár mérénfaf táitotawét, “Yéndo emndetan fém, yéndon yau yinjon ndené ndimbal mwighé Israil yuwon.”
english: When Jesus heard these things , he marveled at him , and turned and said to the multitude who followed him , “ I tell you , I have not found such great faith , no , not in Israel .”

nama: Táf ár nénangoyénd méngot a yinjoyénd faiofnar ásáfogh ár merro. Yesum yanoi kwirane ambum
english: Those who were sent , returning to the house , found that the servant who had been sick was well .

nama: Ámb efghon Yesuf nuwanoyénd yánjo waitogh árfé a ár mérnafé kétán tesen yétkwén Nain.
english: Soon afterwards , he went to a city called Nain . Many of his disciples , along with a great multitude , went with him .

nama: Fá njam kaka ufarghétro témorwén tesen sésafnefaf, yémofem yinjoyénd kwirane féfét ambum kér fu ténérsawét, a tesenmén ár mérnafé tamorwén.
english: Now when he came near to the gate of the city , behold , one who was dead was carried out , the only born son of his mother , and she was a widow . Many people of the city were with her .

nama: Yuram njam amaf yinjoi, fá ghérghérsisayam yifoi amafoefaf a yémndai, “Yau nenda.”
english: When the Lord saw her , he had compassion on her and said to her , “Don’ t cry.”

nama: Kaka nitroi taté yiyánjai, fá emofem ténérsawét nokayoyénd. Fá norayai, “Tot ambum, yéndon némndetan, kano!”
english: He came near and touched the coffin , and the bearers stood still . He said , “ Young man , I tell you , arise !”

nama: Kér ambum nanoyéng námnjoi a si nufngoi. Yesum yéngramai yatmafaf.
english: He who was dead sat up and began to speak . Then he gave him to his mother .

nama: Fá sélngwél emormén a soramé áuwégh nufngoyénd a norayayénd, “Ndimbal Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár té nufar téfefaf. Ngánján té nufar yánjo ár wáutárghét.”
english: Fear took hold of all , and they glorified God , saying , “ A great prophet has arisen among us !” and , “ God has visited his people !”

nama: Yéné si marat náyátoi Yesuenemén Judia yuwon a ámb yu kaka kés tamorwén. Yesu a Jon walitogh ár
english: This report went out concerning him in the whole of Judea and in all the surrounding region .

nama: Jonene waitogh árém yaufroyénd yá yéné yammén. Joném sómbio emotangeyai,
english: The disciples of John told him about all these things .

nama: yémon sómbio ár ewafareméng Yurafaf moghét, “Fém yénéf ném efe kéném, o so néngawanjetam ámb ároe?”
english: John , calling to himself two of his disciples , sent them to Jesus , saying , “ Are you the one who is coming , or should we look for another ?”

nama: Sómbio ár njam enérmén Yesuefaf, fá korayangénd, “Jon walitogh árém tanmafarwe fefaf moghét. 'Fém yénéf ném efe kéném o so néngawanjetam ámb ároe?'”
english: When the men had come to him , they said , “ John the Baptizer has sent us to you , saying , ‘ Are you he who comes , or should we look for another ?’”

nama: Ámb mer efghon Yesum tárfár ár efe fénataye enjnefé tanmorwén a yaufi mbérmbérafé mer táyátotau, a éregh ár náyátoyénd efe ghékéf kwéfkwéf tamorwén.
english: In that hour he cured many of diseases and plagues and evil spirits ; and to many who were blind he gave sight .

nama: Féyo yémo ewawangeyai si résagh árfet, “Ngangend a taufrend Jone némé fémofem tafandet a fénáyáret. Kwéfkwéf ár éregh ár káyátotawét, yaufi kafkaf téfnár áligh ár náyátoyénd, yaufi ghéngan téfnár mer náyátoyénd, téngan méngu áyárégh ár náyátoyénd, kér téfnár kanotawét, a yauyau árét mer si tawawaitotawét.
english: Jesus answered them , “ Go and tell John the things which you have seen and heard: that the blind receive their sight, the lame walk , the lepers are cleansed , the deaf hear, the dead are raised up , and the poor have good news preached to them .

nama: Frengégh ár yénéf em efe yau nékmbotat efalo yátoghét tafaf.”
english: Blessed is he who finds no occasion for stumbling in me .”
