english: He said , “Watch out that you don’ t get led astray , for many will come in my name , saying , ‘ I am he ,’ and , ‘ The time is at hand .’ Therefore don’ t follow them .

nama: Njam fém náyáretati mékmén a sélngwélafé yammén, yau táf férfér em. Yéné yam fété so nufrotat frondeyo, wénde mbandoene yátogh yau mé so yéném.”
english: When you hear of wars and disturbances, don’ t be terrified , for these things must happen first , but the end won’ t come immediately .”

nama: Féyo fá norayai yéfefaf, “Ámb yu a ámb yu, fá so násmét, ámb ndimbal yu a ámb ndimbal yu, fá so násmét.
english: Then he said to them , “ Nation will rise against nation , and kingdom against kingdom.

nama: Kété so yém ndimbal sokrere, káukáu, ndimbal enjne tárfár yuwomé a férférafé yam a ndimbal sélngwélafé yam njafaran.
english: There will be great earthquakes , famines , and plagues in various places . There will be terrors and great signs from heaven .

nama: “Wénde yémofem so kémerangi a kértayan kénékmangi fém soramé yéné yam so nufrotat. Fém so némumbetat áumengégh méngon a kémarmbnangi kwéfkwéf méngot, a néngemnjat warsagh ár a gafanafene sáfrére tane yétkwén téfnan.
english: But before all these things , they will lay their hands on you and will persecute you , delivering you up to synagogues and prisons , bringing you before kings and governors for my name ’s sake .

nama: Wénde yéné so fiyém efoghféneféne si waitoghét fene ndimbal mwighamén.
english: It will turn out as a testimony for you .

nama: Wénde fém mwighayam yau némaworsota frondeyo ndernáye fém so nawamarote fémyo.
english: Settle it therefore in your hearts not to meditate beforehand how to answer,

nama: Yéndo so kémaramangén si a káfeté mwighé ménát fene mék téfnáram yau so kémitrombongé o kénémndangé fém ném unyégh ár.
english: for I will give you a mouth and wisdom which all your adversaries will not be able to withstand or to contradict.

nama: Fém so sén erametat afafemyo, amafemyo, anafemyo, mérnamyo, fútaramyo a yémofem fém so ámb krot ekmetat.
english: You will be handed over even by parents , brothers, relatives , and friends . They will cause some of you to be put to death .

nama: Méinyotio árém fém so méndméndat efandat ménamén tanemén.
english: You will be hated by all men for my name ’s sake .

nama: Wénde fene ámbiro sénko séf yau so kolindangé.
english: And not a hair of your head will perish.

nama: Fém so taikrataye ewakai ménát fémo so tinjo efalo ghérsé.
english: “ By your endurance you will win your lives .

nama: “Fémofem njam Jerusalem tinjongi fiyaré warengéghkaf em táf fém so mat káyátongi nde yáne wasérmbogh siyém kaka yém.
english: “ But when you see Jerusalem surrounded by armies , then know that its desolation is at hand .

nama: Mat táyátongi efe Judiamén ár em táf kangongi kétán mband tunakfot, efe tesenan em táf kétorngi, efe em tesen sémta yau kélawangi tesenot.
english: Then let those who are in Judea flee to the mountains . Let those who are in the middle of her depart. Let those who are in the country not enter therein .

nama: Yéné efogh fifiyafé náyátoi árké tékrátmén yéfarotaménd.
english: For these are days of vengeance , that all things which are written may be fulfilled.

nama: Nderé mámáfi so yém suafé amafafet yéné efogh a mbrake amafafetǃ Kété so yém ndimbal tékrát yéné mbandan a nékw yéné árfefaf.
english: Woe to those who are pregnant and to those who nurse infants in those days ! For there will be great distress in the land and wrath to this people .

nama: Fá so enfetat naifaye krotio a ámb so eweretat kwéfkwéf méngo árot méinyotio ndimbal yuwot. Jerusalem so yésénat Téndo árém kétánotio Téndo árfene efogh ufroghfaf.
english: They will fall by the edge of the sword , and will be led captive into all the nations . Jerusalem will be trampled down by the Gentiles until the times of the Gentiles are fulfilled .

nama: Kété sélngwélafé yam so em efghan, ghérareyan a kéndafefaf. Mband tukén, méinyotio ndimbal yuwomé so yém mwighé ndémke a uwérsoghan ménamén arakaf sóf su kemén.
english: “ There will be signs in the sun , moon , and stars; and on the earth anxiety of nations , in perplexity for the roaring of the sea and the waves ;

nama: Ár férfére so nuitat, ménamén kérté némé yéném yéné mbandot, njafarmén fifi so násámbnetat.
english: men fainting for fear and for expectation of the things which are coming on the world , for the powers of the heavens will be shaken .

nama: Yéné efghon yémofem so tinjongi Ároene Ambum angoghan njafar kwamkwaman ménáyafé waftafé a ndimbal kwayaghafé.
english: Then they will see the Son of Man coming in a cloud with power and great glory .

nama: Njam yéné yam ufrogh kufngongi, kokayongi a tauyongi féfene sénko, ménamén féfene wanjarégh siyém kaka yém.”
english: But when these things begin to happen , look up and lift up your heads , because your redemption is near .”

nama: Yémon tawaufrotau yéné rengerenge si, “Téfandangi fig wén a méinyotio wén.
english: He told them a parable . “ See the fig tree and all the trees .

nama: Njam wén mbambam éwiwogh kufngongi, fémofem so tinjongi féfendio a mat kamndangi nde efogh yu siyém kaka yém.
english: When they are already budding, you see it and know by your own selves that the summer is already near .

nama: Yéné endeyo, njam yefandati yéné yam ufroghan, fém mat so kamndangi nde Ngánjánene limánégh siyém kaka yém.
english: Even so you also , when you see these things happening , know that God ’s Kingdom is near .

nama: “Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe efalo si, ámb ár mérén yéné satamén so mé em ghérsé njam méinyotio yam nufrotat.
english: Most certainly I tell you , this generation will not pass away until all things are accomplished .

nama: Njafar a mband so kawaindangend, wénde tane si yaufifi so kawaindangé.
english: Heaven and earth will pass away , but my words will by no means pass away .

nama: “Kor nawarawenati, féfenjo tikéf yau ewaghnati wéri nuye, wagh témnde a mbandoene méghméghe ménamén yéné efgham so táf kémerangé sunsune ndenanit urérnit.
english: “ So be careful , or your hearts will be loaded down with carousing, drunkenness , and cares of this life, and that day will come on you suddenly.

nama: Ménamén yéné efogh so yéném méinyotio yéfefaf efe emor yéné mbandan.
english: For it will come like a snare on all those who dwell on the surface of all the earth .

nama: Aya túmén ghékéf sénté aem néretati a Ngánjánafé orayégh ménát fém so kawanjarngi kétándmé némé ufroghét em, a fém so taikrataye ewakai Ároene Ambum sáfrére.”
english: Therefore be watchful all the time , praying that you may be counted worthy to escape all these things that will happen , and to stand before the Son of Man .”

nama: Méinyotio efghon Yesu témorwén watameghan wáwefnogh méngon, a fá tangmorwén méinyotio sémbáran Olif Mband tunakfan.
english: Every day Jesus was teaching in the temple , and every night he would go out and spend the night on the mountain that is called Olivet.

nama: Méinyotio ár tanmorwén túmén tándái akwan áyárghét yáfaf wáwefnogh méngot.
english: All the people came early in the morning to him in the temple to hear him .

nama: Minaghofnar flawamén téménd, yétkwén Waingégh téménd kaka kénamndetau.
english: Now the feast of unleavened bread, which is called the Passover , was approaching .

nama: Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a nák watamegh árém ámb end táronjawét Yesue werghét, ménamén fá férfér tamorwén árfenemén.
english: The chief priests and the scribes sought how they might put him to death, for they feared the people .

nama: Féyo Sáifér nélawai Judas Iskariotefaf, efe ámbiro nafaloi 12 ármén.
english: Satan entered into Judas , who was also called Iscariot , who was counted with the twelve .

nama: A Judas téngmorwén kétán limánégh ghéngén wárogh árfefaf a wáwefnogh méngo wanjengégh árfefaf a taruindawét yémafé ndernáye yémon so sén téramangai Yesu.
english: He went away and talked with the chief priests and captains about how he might deliver him to them .

nama: Fá káuwétawét a nuwangoyénd mani ramghét yáyot.
english: They were glad , and agreed to give him money.

nama: Judas nuwangoi a kéretau end táronjau Yesue werghét árofnar sifayan. Soramé njamke
english: He consented and sought an opportunity to deliver him to them in the absence of the multitude .

nama: Efogh nawerai Minaghofnaye flawamén árké yém Waingégh sif tosane ghéngénmén.
english: The day of unleavened bread came , on which the Passover must be sacrificed .

nama: Yesum ewafareméng Fité a Jon a norayai, “Kuwanend yéfrengéghét Waingégh njamke téfe nénet.”
english: Jesus sent Peter and John , saying , “ Go and prepare the Passover for us , that we may eat .”

nama: Yémofem yémotangeyayénd, “Ándan fene ménde yém téfeyot frengéghét?”
english: They said to him , “ Where do you want us to prepare ?”

nama: Yesum ewawangeyai, “Njam ngélawend tesenot, ár so tinjend nu séfkwénafé yémon so tafange. Fémofem téngwaitend árké méngot njam ngélawangé,
english: He said to them , “ Behold , when you have entered into the city , a man carrying a pitcher of water will meet you . Follow him into the house which he enters .

nama: a témndend méngo yuré, 'Watamegh árém namote, “Ánde yém wan téfnároene méngo saté, ánde yéndon so enetan Waingégh njamke tane waitogh árfé?”'
english: Tell the master of the house , ‘ The Teacher says to you , “ Where is the guest room , where I may eat the Passover with my disciples ?”’

nama: Yémon so tawauyafé féfe ndimbal méngo saté tukén, méinyotio teghkaf yém. Afrengégh kété ayém.”
english: He will show you a large , furnished upper room. Make preparations there .”

nama: Fá néwaneyayénd rokar ewinjeyayénd ndenáye fété Yesum ndernáye tamndéwéng. Féyo yémofem yéfrengéménd Waingégh njamke.
english: They went , found things as Jesus had told them , and they prepared the Passover .

nama: Njam efoghféneféne nawerai, Yesu a yánjo muyafé ár nénámnjoyénd njamke sifayan.
english: When the hour had come , he sat down with the twelve apostles.

nama: A Yesum emndai fá, “Yénd minde ménde kwém njamke nénet fémafé soramé tékrát so yéfandan.
english: He said to them , “ I have earnestly desired to eat this Passover with you before I suffer ,

nama: Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe, yéndon yau so enetan wéikor kétánotio yéné nufrota Ngánjánene limánéghan.”
english: for I tell you , I will no longer by any means eat of it until it is fulfilled in God ’s Kingdom.”

nama: Soramé kafusi yerai, yémon kánjo yaramai a norayai, “Tawanangi yéné a tafalotangi féfene kénjúnro.
english: He received a cup , and when he had given thanks , he said , “ Take this and share it among yourselves ,

nama: Yéndon ewaufrotan féfe yéndon yau so yéfértan wéri nu kor kétánotio Ngánjánene limánégh kénufarngé.”
english: for I tell you , I will not drink at all again from the fruit of the vine, until God ’s Kingdom comes .”

nama: Yémon féskaf flawé yerai, kánjo yaramai a etfoi, a ewaramai, yéné siafé, “Yéné siyém tane fifi, árkéméné so téraman féfeyot. Yéné yafrotati awafaroghét tanemén.”
english: He took bread, and when he had given thanks , he broke and gave it to them , saying , “ This is my body which is given for you . Do this in memory of me .”

nama: Ndené endeyo, njamke soramé yémon yerai kafusi, ndené siafé, “Yéné kafusi siyém totér rényégh tane férék kénjún árké so nasune féfeyot.
english: Likewise , he took the cup after supper , saying , “ This cup is the new covenant in my blood, which is poured out for you .

nama: Wénde yéné ár emo yénd so sén wéramuete siyém yéna yéndfé yénmorare.
english: But behold , the hand of him who betrays me is with me on the table .

nama: Ároene Ambum so kér yém Ngánjánene méndeyan, wénde nderé mámáfi yém yéné ároe emo sén yéramete.”
english: The Son of Man indeed goes as it has been determined , but woe to that man through whom he is betrayed !”

nama: Fá ámogh nufngoyénd yéfenjo kénjúnro efe yéna yafnyang téfefaf emon so sén yéramete.
english: They began to question among themselves which of them it was who would do this thing .

nama: Féyo éwigh nufngoyénd yéfenjo kénjúnro efe so yém ndimbal.
english: A dispute also arose among them , which of them was considered to be greatest .

nama: Yesu norayai yéfefaf, “Téndo árfene warsagh ár yuré kamndangi waftafé yéfenjo ár limánghét, wénde fá emndetat, 'Fútar em árfene.'
english: He said to them , “ The kings of the nations lord it over them , and those who have authority over them are called ‘ benefactors .’

nama: Wénde fém yau so ndené em. Wénde efe ndimbal yém so yém ndenanit ambumtosé, a efe limánégh ár yém fá so yém ndenanit faiofnar ásáfogh ár.
english: But not so with you . Rather , the one who is greater among you , let him become as the younger , and one who is governing, as one who serves .

nama: Efe yém ndimbal, yéné ár efe yémor kitarayan o yéné ár efe faiofnar ásáfogh ár yém? Yéné ár efe yémor kitarayan. Wénde yénd wáféin féfefaf faiofnar ásáfogh ár.
english: For who is greater , one who sits at the table, or one who serves ? Isn’ t it he who sits at the table? But I am among you as one who serves .

nama: Fém fá em efe tanwakai tafaf tane ufoghan.
english: “ But you are those who have continued with me in my trials .

nama: A Yéndon ewaraman féfe wafté Ngánjánene limánghét ndené fété tane Afam wafté waramai ta,
english: I confer on you a kingdom, even as my Father conferred on me ,

nama: ménát fémofem so enetati njamke a nu tane kitarayan Ngánjánene limánéghan, a so emorang limánégh ámnjogh sifayan, Israilmén 12 ár mérén moghan so ewakai. Yesu norayai Fitane kenaghmén
english: that you may eat and drink at my table in my Kingdom. You will sit on thrones , judging the twelve tribes of Israel .”

nama: Yémon yémndai, “Saimon, Saimon, Ngánjánam muyé yaramai Sáifére fe ufoghét ndenanit ndau téfnáram yafrote witrémboghét kétándmé mer mbweta yaufiot.
english: The Lord said, “ Simon , Simon , behold , Satan asked to have all of you , that he might sift you as wheat ,

nama: Wénde yénd Ngánjánafé koraiwam feyot, Saimon, nde fene ndimbal mwighé yau so kuyangé. Fém njam kénawengo tafaf, fémon so muyafé eyátote fengénéf.”
english: but I prayed for you , that your faith wouldn’ t fail . You , when once you have turned again , establish your brothers.”

nama: Wénde yémon yawangoi, “Yuré, yénd afrengéghkaf wém fémafé álighét kwéfkwéf sifayat a kétán krot.”
english: He said to him , “ Lord , I am ready to go with you both to prison and to death !”

nama: Yesum yawangoi, “Yéndon némndetan fém, Fité, fémon so kwékena nambinotmé nde fém mafina ném tanemén soramé ghakér kowi kutnangé sénonjo.”
english: He said , “ I tell you , Peter , the rooster will by no means crow today until you deny that you know me three times .”

nama: Féyo Yesum emotai fá, “Yéndon njam ewáfáretan fém mani yáfofnaye, awogh yáfofnaye o sandolofnaye, némé rokar ámb náláite?” Yémofem yawangoyénd, “Yau.”
english: He said to them , “ When I sent you out without purse, bag , and sandals , did you lack anything ?” They said , “ Nothing .”

nama: Yémon emndai fá, “Wénde táf sénonjo mani yáf tanangi a awogh yáf tawanangi, a njam yau ewam féfene náifé, sálámeyafé tétérnangi ámbiro náifat.
english: Then he said to them , “ But now , whoever has a purse, let him take it , and likewise a bag . Whoever has none , let him sell his cloak , and buy a sword .

nama: Buk si yékai, 'A fá témorwén waféghkaf yaufi árfe kénjún.' Yéndon ewaufrotan féfeyot nde yéné yam efalo so nufrote tafaf. Néméwét, némé yéfarotaménd tanemén so efalo nufrote.”
english: For I tell you that this which is written must still be fulfilled in me : ‘ He was counted with transgressors.’ For that which concerns me is being fulfilled .”

nama: Waitogh ár norayayénd, “Téfanda, Yuré, sómbio náifé sere.” Yémon ewawangoi, “Féyotaro ere.” Yesuf Ngánjánafé koraiwét Olif Mband tunakfan
english: They said , “ Lord , behold , here are two swords .” He said to them , “ That is enough .”

nama: Yesu tiotau túmén mband tunakéf yétkwén Olif, a yánjo waitogh árém yénamayo táitotawét fá.
english: He came out and went , as his custom was , to the Mount of Olives . His disciples also followed him .

nama: Njam nufaryénd yéné sifayan, yémon emndai fá, “Ngánjánafé norayatati ménát fém yau so kuyangi ufoghan.”
english: When he was at the place , he said to them , “ Pray that you don’ t enter into temptation .”

nama: Fá nitroi nayuofnaye yéfetambén a budme niyai Ngánjánafé oraighét,
english: He was withdrawn from them about a stone ’s throw , and he knelt down and prayed ,

nama: “Afé, fene ménde téu yém, yéné tékrát titro ta tambén, tane ménde yau, wénde fene méndero so nufrote.”
english: saying , “ Father , if you are willing , remove this cup from me . Nevertheless , not my will , but yours , be done .”

nama: Njafar si résagh ár nufaryéng yáfaf a yáutánam fá.
english: An angel from heaven appeared to him , strengthening him .

nama: Yesum ndimbal tékrát yáyárai, fá minde tikfe Ngánjánafé koraiwét a yáne mélmél témorwén ndenanit férék njélkéfnit kasunau mbandot.
english: Being in agony, he prayed more earnestly . His sweat became like great drops of blood falling down on the ground .

nama: Njam fá nokayoi Ngánjánafé orayéghta fá néngangoi yánjo waitogh árfefaf, yémon ewinjoi kémghan, yongnai ghérghérsisamén.
english: When he rose up from his prayer , he came to the disciples and found them sleeping because of grief ,

nama: Yesum emotai fá, “Némamén fém kémégh ekém? Kanongi a Ngánjánafé norayati ménát fém yau so ufogham tawutfongé.” Yesu yerayénd
english: and said to them , “ Why do you sleep ? Rise and pray that you may not enter into temptation .”

nama: Njamandio Yesu mé sian témorwén, ár mérén enmormén a ár yétkwén Judas efe témorwén 12 waitogh ármén, yémon tanlimndau fá. Yémon yánetai Yesu a yésnetai.
english: While he was still speaking , a crowd appeared . He who was called Judas , one of the twelve , was leading them . He came near to Jesus to kiss him .

nama: Wénde Yesum yémotayéng fá, “Judas, fémon sénot yafngo Ároene Ambum ménaye séneghé?”
english: But Jesus said to him , “ Judas , do you betray the Son of Man with a kiss ?”

nama: Njam Yesuene waitogh árém yinjoyénd némé ufroghétro témorwén, fá norayayénd, “Yuré, wét yéndfem so enfetam téfenjo naifaye?”
english: When those who were around him saw what was about to happen , they said to him , “ Lord , shall we strike with the sword ?”

nama: A ámb árom yanfai limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároene faiofnar ásáfogh ároene tambén téngan.
english: A certain one of them struck the servant of the high priest, and cut off his right ear .

nama: Wénde Yesu norayai, “Yéné yau yafrotatiǃ” A Yesum yéné ároene téngan yayanjai a mer yiyátoi fá.
english: But Jesus answered , “ Let me at least do this ” — and he touched his ear and healed him .

nama: Féyo Yesu norayai limánégh ghéngén wárogh árfefaf, wáwefnogh méngo wanjengégh ár a sénko ár, efe té enmormén yáyot, “Némé yénd áyárghofnar árfene sénko ár wém? Árkémamén fém taném naifayafé a timayafé?
english: Jesus said to the chief priests, captains of the temple , and elders , who had come against him , “ Have you come out as against a robber , with swords and clubs ?

nama: Méinyotio efghon yénd fémafé ténmorwén wáwefnogh méngon, fémofem yénd yau kwéfandawét nékwafé. Wénde sénonjo féfene efogh té nawer, njamandio kwéfkwéfoene wafté féfefaf yém.” Fitam yékenayéng Yesu
english: When I was with you in the temple daily , you didn’ t stretch out your hands against me . But this is your hour , and the power of darkness .”

nama: Yémofem yerayénd Yesu, yéngémnjoyénd kétán limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároene méngot. Fitam tangwaitotau nayu kéráye.
english: They seized him and led him away , and brought him into the high priest’s house . But Peter followed from a distance .

nama: A njam yémofem fés yuwaroyénd mogh sifayé néndkéfan a fá námnjoyénd mérne, Fité wéi námnjoi yéfefaf.
english: When they had kindled a fire in the middle of the courtyard and had sat down together , Peter sat among them .

nama: Ásáfogh mérsom yinjoi fá fés kwayaghayan témorangérwén. Mérsom yáyamngoi fá a yémndai, “Yéné ár ámb fiyém Yesue waitogh ár.”
english: A certain servant girl saw him as he sat in the light , and looking intently at him , said , “ This man also was with him .”

nama: Wénde yémon yanyotayéng a yémndai, “Mérés, yénd mafina wém fá.”
english: He denied Jesus , saying , “ Woman , I don’ t know him .”

nama: Tekofnaye ámb árom wéi yinjoi fáyo a yémndai, “Fém ámb yéné fékéném.” Yémon yawangoi, “Ár, yénd yauǃ”
english: After a little while someone else saw him and said , “ You also are one of them !” But Peter answered , “ Man , I am not !”

nama: Ámbiro efoghféneféne soramé ámb árom ménjtaye korayawét ndené, “Fá fété yém Yesue kaka ár, efe yém Galili yumén.”
english: After about one hour passed , another confidently affirmed , saying , “ Truly this man also was with him , for he is a Galilean !”

nama: Fitam yawangoi, “Ár, yénd mafina wém fém némamén norayeǃ” Njamandio korayau, ghakér kowi táf nutnayéng.
english: But Peter said , “ Man , I don’ t know what you are talking about !” Immediately , while he was still speaking , a rooster crowed .

nama: Yuré nawengoi téfandangé Fité. Fité nawafarotayéng Yurane si ndernáye yénémndai fá, “Fémon so kwékenang yénd nambinotmé soramé ghakér kowi so kutnangé sénonjo.”
english: The Lord turned and looked at Peter . Then Peter remembered the Lord ’ s word , how he said to him , “ Before the rooster crows you will deny me three times .”

nama: A fá nétoryéng sáfét ndimbal ye nendam. Wanjengégh árém si tawafrotawét Yesue
english: He went out , and wept bitterly .

nama: Árém emofem Yesu tanjetawét si tawafrotawét a ngi yafngoyénd.
english: The men who held Jesus mocked him and beat him .

nama: Yémofem ghékéf yawamoyénd a témndetawét, “Koraya! Emon nésém fém?”
english: Having blindfolded him , they struck him on the face and asked him , “ Prophesy ! Who is the one who struck you ?”

nama: A yémofem korayawét tárfár yaufi si yáfaf. Yesu yém Failetene a Erodene sáfrére
english: They spoke many other things against him , insulting him .

nama: Fauréghan árfene sénko ár náumendayénd limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a nák watamegh ár a yéfene sáfrére Yesu yéngémnjoyénd.
english: As soon as it was day , the assembly of the elders of the people were gathered together , both chief priests and scribes , and they led him away into their council , saying ,

nama: Fá norayayénd, “Fém njam Keriso ném, téfe ténmaufro.” Yesum ewawangoi, “Yéndon njam tawaufron féfe, fémofem yau so yénd efalo kwiyátongi,
english: “ If you are the Christ , tell us .” But he said to them , “ If I tell you , you won’t believe ,

nama: a yéndon njam fém tamotangén, fémofem yau so ta kwawangongi.
english: and if I ask , you will in no way answer me or let me go.

nama: Wénde sénonjo yénandmé Ároene Ambum so kámnjongé Minde waftafé Ngánjánene tambén téndon.”
english: From now on , the Son of Man will be seated at the right hand of the power of God .”

nama: Fá méinyotio namotayénd, “Fém fété ném Ngánjánene ambum?” Yémon ewawangoi, “Fém sian mbarkánd em fété yénd wém.”
english: They all said , “ Are you then the Son of God ?” He said to them , “ You say it , because I am .”

nama: Féyo yémofem norayayénd, “Yéndfem némé si so yéronjam ndenayu? Yéndfem téfendio té náyárangém yá tambén.”
english: They said , “ Why do we need any more witness ? For we ourselves have heard from his own mouth !”

nama: Méinyotio árém Yesu yénémnjoyénd Failetefaf.
english: The whole company of them rose up and brought him before Pilate .

nama: Yémofem Yesu usérmbogh yafngoyénd yéné sie, “Yéné árom ewarsote téfene ár yéné sie, 'Yau ekmetati mani Kaisarefaf, Rom tuk warsagh ároefaf a yéné yétkwénan nawarse nde yénd wém Keriso, warsagh ár.'”
english: They began to accuse him , saying , “ We found this man perverting the nation , forbidding paying taxes to Caesar , and saying that he himself is Christ , a king .”

nama: Féyo Failetém yémotayéng Yesu, “Fém fété ném Ju árfene warsagh ár?” Yesum yawangoi, “A, fém némé noraye.”
english: Pilate asked him , “ Are you the King of the Jews ?” He answered him , “ So you say .”

nama: Failetém marataye korayau limánégh ghéngén wárogh árfefaf a ár mérénafefaf, “Yéndon némé mámáfi yau yinjon yéné ároefaf.”
english: Pilate said to the chief priests and the multitudes , “ I find no basis for a charge against this man .”

nama: Wénde fá ménjtaye korayawét, “Yémon kértat taméinde ár méinyotio Judiamén yáne watameghe, kétándmé Galili yu a yénanotio Jerusalemǃ”
english: But they insisted, saying , “ He stirs up the people , teaching throughout all Judea , beginning from Galilee even to this place .”

nama: Njam Failetém náyárai yénémamén, fá namotai, “Yéné ár Galili yumén yém?”
english: But when Pilate heard Galilee mentioned, he asked if the man was a Galilean .

nama: Njam fá mat náyátoi nde Yesu témorwén Erodene limánégh mbanmbanan, Failetém yáfáretam Erodefaf, efe témorwén Jerusalemén yéné efghon.
english: When he found out that he was in Herod ’s jurisdiction , he sent him to Herod , who was also in Jerusalem during those days .

nama: Njam Erodém Yesu yinjoyéng, fá ndimbal áuwégh káuwetau ménamén fá teke kawanjetau Yesue winjoghét. Kétándmé Erodém némé té káyáretau yánemén, fá ménde témorwén ámb sélngwélafé yam fandaghét.
english: Now when Herod saw Jesus , he was exceedingly glad , for he had wanted to see him for a long time , because he had heard many things about him . He hoped to see some miracle done by him .

nama: Erodém tárfár ámogh si tarametau, wénde Yesum yau yawangoi.
english: He questioned him with many words , but he gave no answers.

nama: Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a nák watamegh ár tawakayongérwén kété, nékwafé témndetawét.
english: The chief priests and the scribes stood , vehemently accusing him .

nama: Féyo Erod a yánjo fiyaré si tawafrotawét a tasalitawét fá. Fá yamanetaménd Yesu warsagh árfene sáláme, yémofem táf kor yéngwangoyénd Failetefaf.
english: Herod with his soldiers humiliated him and mocked him . Dressing him in luxurious clothing , they sent him back to Pilate .

nama: Yéné efghon Erod a Failet fá fútar namndeyayénd, fronde kété fá tanérwén mék téfnár.
english: Herod and Pilate became friends with each other that very day , for before that they were enemies with each other .

nama: Failetém eumendai limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár, limánégh ár a ámb ár,
english: Pilate called together the chief priests, the rulers, and the people ,

nama: a norayai yéfefaf, “Fémofem ténémnjati Yesu tafaf efe témorwén kérté wafrogh ár. Wénde yéndon yéta témotan fá féfene sáfrére a ámb yaufi yau yinjon yáfaf árkémamén fém korayati yémo té tafrote.
english: and said to them , “ You brought this man to me as one that perverts the people , and behold , having examined him before you , I found no basis for a charge against this man concerning those things of which you accuse him .

nama: Erodém yau yaufi yawinjoi féyo yénmangoi téfefaf, 'Yéné ár yau so tékém krot.'
english: Neither has Herod , for I sent you to him , and see , nothing worthy of death has been done by him .

nama: -17 Yénémaménnde yéndon so yéfmotan soramé téngéfrangon.”
english: I will therefore chastise him and release him.”
Now he had to release one prisoner to them at the feast.

nama: Wénde ámbiro mwighayan fá nutnayénd, “Tésmetangi, Barabas ténmutorngi téfeyotǃ”
english: But they all cried out together , saying , “Away with this man ! Release to us Barabbas!”—

nama: Barabas yélawayénd kétán kwéfkwéf sifayat ménamén fá stémorwén ámb ár mérén limánégh ár Jerusalemén yéné efe kásmetawét Rom gafamanafé a ár ngimén.
english: one who was thrown into prison for a certain revolt in the city , and for murder .

nama: Failet ménde témorwén Yesue utorghét, féyo fá kor norayai ár mérnafefaf.
english: Then Pilate spoke to them again , wanting to release Jesus ,

nama: Wénde fá ménj tarnyangérwén keyan, “Téngwamend, Téngwamendǃ”
english: but they shouted , saying , “ Crucify ! Crucify him !”

nama: Nambinotmé wéikor fá norayai, “Némamén? Némé yaufi yémon yafrotam? Yéndon ámb yau yáne fifi yinjon yáfaf krot. Féyo yéndon so yéfmotan soramé téngéfrangon fá.”
english: He said to them the third time , “ Why ? What evil has this man done ? I have found no capital crime in him . I will therefore chastise him and release him .”

nama: Wénde fá minde kutnawét ménjtaye, “Téngwamendǃ” a yéfene minde ke efalo namndai Yesue waméghét.
english: But they were urgent with loud voices , asking that he might be crucified . Their voices and the voices of the chief priests prevailed .

nama: Féyo Failetém yéfene ménde efalo yiyátoyéng.
english: Pilate decreed that what they asked for should be done .

nama: Yémon yéngéumyoi Barabas efe yélawayénd kwéfkwéf sifayan gafamanafé ásméghmén a ár ngimén, Yesu yéngéumyoi yéfene méndefaf. Yesu wafatarégh wénan yénamndaménd
english: He released him who had been thrown into prison for insurrection and murder , for whom they asked, but he delivered Jesus up to their will .

nama: Njam fiyaram yéngémnjoyénd Yesu, kété ár yétkwén Saimon témorwén Sairene méngotumén, efe ténmorwén álighan ámb tesenot, a Yesuene wafatarégh wén yéfayoyénd yáne faderan térsawéng Yesue sémta.
english: When they led him away, they grabbed one Simon of Cyrene , coming from the country, and laid the cross on him to carry it after Jesus .

nama: Tárfár árém Yesu táitotawét, amaf tangwafnyangérwén efe ye kéngéndawét yánemén.
english: A great multitude of the people followed him , including women who also mourned and lamented him .

nama: Yesu néngawengoi a emndai fá, “Jerusalemén amaf, fém yau ye nendati tanemén. Fém ye nendati féfenjomén a féfenjo ambumtértérafenemén.
english: But Jesus , turning to them , said , “ Daughters of Jerusalem , don’ t weep for me , but weep for yourselves and for your children .

nama: Efogh yéna yéném njam fémofem so korayangi, 'Frengégh yém ambumofnar amafafet, árké kafkalam ambum yau yéráftam a ndenéyameyo nono yau tafamndawétǃ'
english: For behold , the days are coming in which they will say , ‘ Blessed are the barren , the wombs that never bore , and the breasts that never nursed .’

nama: Fá so norayat mband tunakéfafefaf, 'Kénuyangi téfefafǃ' a némbne mband tunakéfafefaf, 'Ténmafarngi yéndǃ'
english: Then they will begin to tell the mountains , ‘ Fall on us !’ and tell the hills , ‘ Cover us .’

nama: Ménamén njam árém yéné rokar ewafrotat njam wén ghérsé yém, némé so nufrote táf sértan?”
english: For if they do these things in the green tree , what will be done in the dry ?”

nama: Ámb sómbio ár, tárwén oro téfnár, ndenáyo tangémnjowét Yesufé naméghét kérotio.
english: There were also others , two criminals , led with him to be put to death.

nama: Njam fá nufaryénd yu yétkwén Golgota, “Yáne fifi Sénko sot sifayé,” kété yémofem enamndaménd Yesuf yémafé sómbio oro téfnárafé ámb yáne tambénta, ámb yáne fatrata.
english: When they came to the place that is called “ The Skull ”, they crucified him there with the criminals , one on the right and the other on the left.

nama: Yesu norayai, “Afé, tawawalinda yéfene yaufi, fá mafina em némé yémofem yafrotat.” A yémofem Yesuene sáláme kawaftawét ménaye dais kembneye.
english: Jesus said , “ Father , forgive them , for they don’ t know what they are doing .” Dividing his garments among them , they cast lots .

nama: Ár tárfár tawakayongérwén téfandawét yam ufroghan, limánégh árém sénkér tawafrotawét Yesue. Yémofem korayawét, “Yémon tawanjane ámb ár. Fáyo kawanjarngé, njam fá yém Ngánjánene Keriso, yáne waferghkaf ambum.”
english: The people stood watching . The rulers with them also scoffed at him , saying , “ He saved others . Let him save himself , if this is the Christ of God , his chosen one !”

nama: Fiyaré enmormén si tawafrotawét. Yémofem yénmarsaménd njérmat wéri nu yáyot,
english: The soldiers also mocked him , coming to him and offering him vinegar ,

nama: a norayayénd, “Fém njam ném Ju árfene warsagh ár, fémyo kawanjarǃ”
english: and saying , “ If you are the King of the Jews , save yourself !”

nama: Kété témorwén farogh férén yá tukén, árké yémndetat, “Yéné fiyém Ju árfene warsagh ár.”
english: An inscription was also written over him in letters of Greek, Latin, and Hebrew: “ THIS IS THE KING OF THE JEWS .”

nama: Ámb oro téfnár tamangérwén yá téndon, yémo yémndayéng Yesu, “Fém fété ném Keriso? Kawanjar fémyo a yénd ténmanjareǃ”
english: One of the criminals who was hanged insulted him , saying , “ If you are the Christ , save yourself and us !”

nama: Wénde ámb oro téfnáram yarnaméng fá a yémndai, “Fefaf Ngánján férfér té yém? Fém ndenéyameyo féu ném.
english: But the other answered , and rebuking him said , “Don’ t you even fear God , seeing you are under the same condemnation ?

nama: Yénd ámb rérero tékrátan yéném mérne, ménamén téfenjo yaufimén yéndfem tékrát yérsuwam. Wénde yéné árom yaufi yau yafrotam.”
english: And we indeed justly , for we receive the due reward for our deeds , but this man has done nothing wrong.”

nama: Féyo yémon yémndai, “Yesu, yénd táf wafarota fém njam néngém fenjo Ngánjánene limánghét.”
english: He said to Jesus , “ Lord , remember me when you come into your Kingdom.”

nama: Yesum yawangoi yá, “Yéndon némndetan fém efalo, sénonjo yénd fémafé so yénre áuwégh méngotuan.” Yesuene Kérmén
english: Jesus said to him , “Assuredly I tell you , today you will be with me in Paradise .”

nama: Efoghméf témorwén, a kwéfkwéfam yu yafaryéng kétánotio séite karéf efogh náyátoi,
english: It was now about the sixth hour , and darkness came over the whole land until the ninth hour .

nama: ménamén efogh nékmboi atremngogh. Wáwefnogh méngon sénjté sáláme tamangérwén nénatiraryéng tukta nde yuwot sómbio karéf.
english: The sun was darkened, and the veil of the temple was torn in two .

nama: Yesu minde nutnayéng, “Afé, fene ngángat tane mbérmbér yérametan.” Njam yémon yéné si norayai, fá kér táf yémormén.
english: Jesus , crying with a loud voice , said , “ Father , into your hands I commit my spirit !” Having said this , he breathed his last .

nama: Rom fiyaré sénko árom yinjoi némé kufrotau, Ngánján tuwetau a norayai, “Efalo yiyátoi yéné ár témorwén mbarkánd.”
english: When the centurion saw what was done , he glorified God , saying , “ Certainly this was a righteous man .”

nama: Njam méinyotio ár efe káumendawét téfandawét néméyam kufrotau, ghérghérsisamén wéfan káutánawét a nénguwanoyénd.
english: All the multitudes that came together to see this , when they saw the things that were done , returned home beating their chests .

nama: Wénde méinyotio fá efe mat tamorwén yánemén a amaf tawafnyangérwén efe kuwaitotau yáfaf kétándmé Galili yu, nayu nénokayoyénd yam téfandawét ufroghan. Yesuene mband raméghmén
english: All his acquaintances and the women who followed with him from Galilee stood at a distance , watching these things .

nama: Kété témorwén ár yétkwén Josef, Ju sénko árfene áumengégh utmanégh ár, mer a mbarkánd ár,
english: Behold , there was a man named Joseph , who was a member of the council , a good and righteous man

nama: emon yau yéfene mwighé wafroghyam efalo yiyátoi. Fá kétándmé yénmormén Judia árfene tesen Aramatiat a fá kawanjetau Ngánjánene limánégh ufarghét.
english: ( he had not consented to their counsel and deed ), from Arimathaea, a city of the Jews , who was also waiting for God ’s Kingdom.

nama: Fá yéngmormén Failetefaf ámoghét Yesuene fifimén.
english: This man went to Pilate , and asked for Jesus ’ body .

nama: Féyo yémon yeworyéng yuwot, sáláme fiyarghét ménát mbéwé méngon kémghét kété ámb ár ánde yau yélawayénd
english: He took it down and wrapped it in a linen cloth , and laid him in a tomb that was cut in stone , where no one had ever been laid .

nama: Yéné ásáfogh tafrotau wékeye Fraide séiten ménamén Safat rényégh kaka témorwén.
english: It was the day of the Preparation , and the Sabbath was drawing near.

nama: Yéné amaf efe Yesufé enmormén kétándmé Galili yuta yéngwaitoyénd Josef mbéwé fandaghét a ndernáye yékmayénd yáne fifi.
english: The women who had come with him out of Galilee followed after , and saw the tomb and how his body was laid .

nama: Fá néngangoyénd méngot mer wimafé wékwér frengéghét. Wénde fá kenawét Safatan ndené fété Mosesene nák.
english: They returned and prepared spices and ointments . On the Sabbath they rested according to the commandment .

nama: Sande tándái akwan, amafam tangérsawét mer wimafé wékwér árkéméné yénfrendaménd a néngwanoyénd mbéwafaf.
english: But on the first day of the week , at early dawn , they and some others came to the tomb , bringing the spices which they had prepared .

nama: Yémofem yinjoyénd wím feghkaf mbéwata,
english: They found the stone rolled away from the tomb .

nama: wénde fá njam nélawayénd, yémofem yau yinjoyénd Yuré Yesuene fifi.
english: They entered in , and didn’ t find the Lord Jesus ’ body .

nama: Njamandio fá mwighayan kéwérsotawét Yesuene fifi árkamé yémorwén, tekofnaye sómbio ár nufaryayénd ghékéf waufaroghe kwayaghé sálámeyafé yéfene téndota nokayeyayénd.
english: While they were greatly perplexed about this , behold , two men stood by them in dazzling clothing .

nama: Yéné férféran amaf ninyayénd mbandot, wénde yéné árém emndayénd fá, “Fémofem némamén yéronjati kér árfene sifayan efe yém ghérsé?
english: Becoming terrified , they bowed their faces down to the earth . The men said to them , “ Why do you seek the living among the dead ?

nama: Fá siyém yéna yau yém! Fá té nénganoǃ Mé kawafarotangi fém ndernáye tamndetau, táf fémafé njam mé témorwén Galili yuwon,
english: He isn’ t here , but is risen . Remember what he told you when he was still in Galilee ,

nama: 'Ároene Ambum so téramangi yaufi árfene ngángat, wafatarégh wénan so yénamndat a nambio efghon so kanongé wéikor.'”
english: saying that the Son of Man must be delivered up into the hands of sinful men and be crucified , and the third day rise again ?”

nama: Táf nawafarotayénd yáne si.
english: They remembered his words ,

nama: Njam fá nénangoyénd kétándmé mbéwata, yémofem ewaufroyénd méinyotio némé téfandawét 11 waitogh árét a méinyotio ámb árfet.
english: returned from the tomb , and told all these things to the eleven and to all the rest .

nama: Meri Makdalin, Joana, Meri Jemse yátmé, ámb amaf efe tamorwén yémafé ewaufroyénd Yesuene muyafé árét.
english: Now they were Mary Magdalene , Joanna , and Mary the mother of James . The other women with them told these things to the apostles.

nama: Wénde yémofem efalo yau eyátoyénd yéfene si, ménamén yéfene si afrogh témorwén yéfeyot ndenanit onon ár kar korayawét.
english: These words seemed to them to be nonsense , and they didn’ t believe them .

nama: Wénde Fité táf fété nurtotam a nétonam mbéwé yafoghét. Fité néngáwefnoi, engwinjoi sálámero tákmangérwén kénaghkaf, a fá néngwanoi uwérsoghan témorwén némé té nufrotam. Endmé áligh Emausét
english: But Peter got up and ran to the tomb . Stooping and looking in , he saw the strips of linen lying by themselves , and he departed to his home , wondering what had happened .

nama: Yéné efghonyo sómbio ár tangérwén Jerusalemta kétán Emausét 11 kilomité
english: Behold , two of them were going that very day to a village named Emmaus , which was sixty stadia from Jerusalem .

nama: Yémofem téngwarunwét endmé yéfe kénjúnro némé yam kufrotau.
english: They talked with each other about all of these things which had happened .

nama: Njamandio fá ngoraiwét a téngwarunwét mérne, Yesu fáyo yénmormén a tayotau yémafé.
english: While they talked and questioned together , Jesus himself came near , and went with them .

nama: Wénde yémofem yau yayamngeyayénd Yesu.
english: But their eyes were kept from recognizing him .

nama: Yémon emotangeyai fá, “Némamén fémofem yarunyét táf fém seyowé?” Fá áligh nékmbeyayénd, ghérghérsisé sáfafé.
english: He said to them , “ What are you talking about as you walk , and are sad ?”

nama: Ámb témorwén yétkwén Klofas, yémotai fá, “Fém némé wan téfnár ném Jerusalemén a mafina ném némé yam nufrotat yéné efghon?”
english: One of them , named Cleopas , answered him , “ Are you the only stranger in Jerusalem who doesn’ t know the things which have happened there in these days ?”

nama: Yesum emotangeyai, “Némé yam nufrotat?” Yémofem yawangeyayénd, “Yesu Najaretmén. Fá témorwén Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár wafté kér ro sian a sélngwélafé yam wafroghan Ngánján sáfrére a méinyotio ár.
english: He said to them , “ What things ?” They said to him , “ The things concerning Jesus the Nazarene , who was a prophet mighty in deed and word before God and all the people ;

nama: Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a téfene limánégh árém yémnjoyénd a yéramayénd krot, a yénamndaménd wafatarégh wénan.
english: and how the chief priests and our rulers delivered him up to be condemned to death , and crucified him .

nama: Wénde téfene méghmégh nafayoi nde fá so témorwén emo so tanjarngai Israil. Nambio efogh sénonjo yém yéné yam té kufrotat.
english: But we were hoping that it was he who would redeem Israel . Yes , and besides all this , it is now the third day since these things happened .

nama: Féyo ámb amaf téfene mérénmén sélngwél yéramayénd. Fá tangém mbéwafaf sénonjo tándái akwan
english: Also , certain women of our company amazed us , having arrived early at the tomb ;

nama: wénde yau yinjoyénd Yesuene fifi. Fá nénangoyénd téfefaf yénmaufroyénd téfe ndené fá yinjongi njafar si résagh ár, efe noraya ndené fá siyém ghérsé yém.
english: and when they didn’ t find his body , they came saying that they had also seen a vision of angels, who said that he was alive .

nama: Féyo ámb téfene mérénmén ár néngwanoyénd mbéwafaf a yinjoyénd ndené fété amaf némé kafrotawét, wénde Yesu yéné amafam yau yinjoyénd.”
english: Some of us went to the tomb and found it just like the women had said , but they didn’ t see him .”

nama: Fá norayai yéfefaf, “Nderé mwighafnar fém em, a nderé táikér yéfandati efalo yátoghét tikfan méinyotio Ngánjánene mat yátogh árém némé korayawétǃ
english: He said to them , “ Foolish people , and slow of heart to believe in all that the prophets have spoken !

nama: Kerisoe áfrat témorwén tékratot soramé fá nélawai yánjo ndimbal kwayaghat?”
english: Didn’ t the Christ have to suffer these things and to enter into his glory ?”

nama: Yémon sie yérnyai Moseseta a méinyotio ámb Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár, yémon tawawafenau yéfeyot némé té korayau méinyotio Ngánjánene sian yánjomén.
english: Beginning from Moses and from all the prophets , he explained to them in all the Scriptures the things concerning himself .

nama: Yémofem kaka méngotu yéngiyátoyénd ándan fá tangmorwén, Yesu awaingétro téngmorwén.
english: They came near to the village where they were going , and he acted like he would go further .

nama: Wénde yémofem yamnendayénd Yesu ménjtaye, “Yéndfé kámnjongém ménamén yéférte.” Féyo fá néngwanoi yéfefaf ámnjoghét.
english: They urged him , saying , “ Stay with us , for it is almost evening , and the day is almost over .” He went in to stay with them .

nama: Fá njam námnjoi njamke sifayan yémafé, yémon féskaf flawé yékafai, kánjo yéramai a yétfoi ewarametam yéfeyot.
english: When he had sat down at the table with them , he took the bread and gave thanks. Breaking it , he gave it to them .

nama: Féyo táf yéfene ghékéf nasawéryénd a yáyamngoyénd efe Yesu témorwén, a fá néngolindai kétándmé yéfene ghékéfta.
english: Their eyes were opened and they recognized him ; then he vanished out of their sight .

nama: Fá korayawét yéfenjo kénjúnro, “Téfene tikéf nakérnat téfene kénjún njamandio fá korayau téfefaf endén a si yénmasawéryéng téfeyot?”
english: They said to one another , “Weren’ t our hearts burning within us while he spoke to us along the way , and while he opened the Scriptures to us ?”

nama: Fá wékeye nuwanoyénd a kangotawét Jerusalemét. Kété fá ewinjoyénd 11 waitogh ár a ámb ár emafé káumendawét
english: They rose up that very hour , returned to Jerusalem , and found the eleven gathered together , and those who were with them ,

nama: a korayawét, “Efalo yémǃ Yuré té nénano a nufar Saimonefaf.”
english: saying , “ The Lord is risen indeed , and has appeared to Simon !”

nama: Féyo sómbioyam ewaufreyayénd némé kufrotau yéfefaf endén, a ndernáye yémofem Yesu yayamngeyayénd Yesum njam féskaf flawé ewatfeyai. Yesu nufaryéng yánjo waitogh árfefaf
english: They related the things that happened along the way , and how he was recognized by them in the breaking of the bread.

nama: Njamandio fá mé korayawét yénémamén, Yesu fáyo nénokayoi yéfene kénjún a norayayéng yéfefaf, “Krufrat féfefaf so yémǃ”
english: As they said these things , Jesus himself stood among them , and said to them , “Peace be to you .”

nama: Yéné mérén férféram ewifoi ndené kemnawét nde yémofem kar yinjoyénd bérsebérse.
english: But they were terrified and filled with fear, and supposed that they had seen a spirit .

nama: Fá norayai yéfefaf, “Némamén fém néworsotati, némamén féfene mwighé déudéu nanote?
english: He said to them , “ Why are you troubled ? Why do doubts arise in your hearts ?

nama: Tafandangi tane sómbio ngángé a sómbio kafkaf. Yénd yéndio efalo fété wémǃ Kwiyánja yénd a kwéfandangi. Bérsebérse yau yém fifiyafé a sotafé, fémofem kés wéfandati yénd fété wém.”
english: See my hands and my feet , that it is truly me . Touch me and see , for a spirit doesn’ t have flesh and bones , as you see that I have .”

nama: Njam fá korayau yénémamén, yémon tawauyafotau yáne ngángé kabu a kafkaf.
english: When he had said this , he showed them his hands and his feet .

nama: Yémofem mé tétambnawét efalo yau tiyátotawét ménamén áuwégh a sélngwélafé yammén, yémon emotayéng fá, “Féfene ámb némndafi té ewam yéna nénet?”
english: While they still didn’ t believe for joy , and wondered , he said to them , “ Do you have anything here to eat ?”

nama: Yémofem yaramayénd Yesue bélamén wagif mbarmbar,
english: They gave him a piece of a broiled fish and some honeycomb.

nama: a yémon yékafai a yerai ténetau yéfene ghékfan.
english: He took them , and ate in front of them .

nama: Fá norayai yéfefaf, “Yéné fiyém némé yénd korayawén táf yénd njam mé ténmorwén fémafé. Méinyotio si efalo so náyátote némé yéfarotaménd tanemén Mosesene nák kénjún, Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene Buk a Sams.”
english: He said to them , “ This is what I told you while I was still with you , that all things which are written in the law of Moses , the prophets , and the psalms concerning me must be fulfilled .”

nama: Féyo yémon ewasawéryéng yéfene mwighé mat áyátoghét Buk si némé yéfarotaménd.
english: Then he opened their minds , that they might understand the Scriptures .

nama: Yémon ewaufroi yéfeyot, “Yéné fiyém némé yéfarotaménd tanemén. Keriso so tékrátan yém a kénanongé kétándmé kérta nambiomén efghon,
english: He said to them , “ Thus it is written , and thus it was necessary for the Christ to suffer and to rise from the dead the third day ,

nama: a yaufi awengoghmén a wányányéghmén so yaitotat yáne yétkwénan méinyotio yuwomé so térnyangi kétándmé Jerusalemta.
english: and that repentance and remission of sins should be preached in his name to all the nations , beginning at Jerusalem .

nama: Fém em fandagh ár yéné yammén.
english: You are witnesses of these things .

nama: Yéndon ewáfáretan fém némat tane Afam unyéghofnar si norayai. Wénde tesenan so nawanjetati kétánotio njafar tukta waftaye kéneworngé féfefaf.” Yesuene uyoghmén
english: Behold , I send out the promise of my Father on you . But wait in the city of Jerusalem until you are clothed with power from on high .”

nama: Yémon njam elimai Betani tesenta, Yesum ngángé euyoi a efrendai fá.
english: He led them out as far as Bethany, and he lifted up his hands and blessed them .

nama: Njamandio fá táfrendawéng, yémon engfrangoi fá táf nénguyoi njafarot.
english: While he blessed them , he withdrew from them and was carried up into heaven .

nama: Féyo yémofem yáwefnoyénd Yesue a kangotawét Jerusalemét ndimbal áuwéghafé.
english: They worshiped him and returned to Jerusalem with great joy ,

nama: A fá túmén kawanjetawét wáwefnogh méngon méinyotio efghon, Ngánján tuwétawét. Yesu narmboi njafarot (Luk 24.50-51)|src="IB04179gr.tif" size="col" copy="by Farid Faadil. © Biblica, Inc. Used with permission. All rights reserved worldwide." ref="24.50-51"
english: and were continually in the temple , praising and blessing God . Amen.

nama: Tane fronde bukan, Tiafilus, yéndo yéfarotamén ménamén méinyotio Yesum némé wafrogh ewafngoi a watamegh
english: The first book I wrote, Theophilus , concerned all that Jesus began both to do and to teach ,

nama: a tawarametau yánjo muyafé árét efe yémo té ewaferyéng watamegh yam Ngánján Mbérmbér kénjúmé, a féyo efogh nawerai fá njam yéngwanayéng njafar tukét.
english: until the day in which he was received up, after he had given commandment through the Holy Spirit to the apostles whom he had chosen .

nama: Yáne tékrát soramé, fá auyafogh nufngoi fáyo yéné árfefaf a efalo si waufrogh ewafngoi ndené yénd ghérsé wém. Fá njam nufaryéng yéfefaf safét 40 efogh soramé a korayau Ngánjánene limánéghmén.
english: To these he also showed himself alive after he suffered , by many proofs , appearing to them over a period of forty days and speaking about God ’s Kingdom.

nama: Ámb efghon, yémofem njam njamke tánetawét yémafé, yémo emndai, “Yau téfrangongi Jerusalem, wénde nawanjetati yéné merot tane Afam némé unyéghofnar si té emndai, fémofem té káyáretawét némamén yénd korayawén.
english: Being assembled together with them , he commanded them , “Don’ t depart from Jerusalem , but wait for the promise of the Father , which you heard from me .

nama: Joném nuwan tawalitotau, wénde nambio efogh soramé fém so Ngánján Mbérmbére ewalitote.”
english: For John indeed baptized in water , but you will be baptized in the Holy Spirit not many days from now .”

nama: Féyo njam fá nafángoyénd Yesufé, yémofem yémotayénd fá, “Yuré, fém féyotaro ném yéné efghon Israil yu sái yérameta wéikor?”
english: Therefore , when they had come together , they asked him , “ Lord , are you now restoring the kingdom to Israel ?”

nama: Yémo emndai fá, “Yéné féfeyot yau mat efogh o efoghféneféne em, wénde Ngánjánro mat yém.
english: He said to them , “ It isn’ t for you to know times or seasons which the Father has set within his own authority .

nama: Wénde fémofem so tawinjongi wafté táf Ngánján Mbérmbér njam yéném féfefaf, a fém so em tane si ghékéf fandagh ár Jerusalem kénjún, méinyotio Judian a Samarian a kétánotio mband marat árkamé yiyato.”
english: But you will receive power when the Holy Spirit has come upon you . You will be witnesses to me in Jerusalem , in all Judea and Samaria , and to the uttermost parts of the earth .”

nama: Yéné soramé fá njam yéné si norayai, fá táf nuwanoi yéfene méinyotio ghékfanro, njafar kwamkwamam yéngwamoi yéfene ghékéfta.
english: When he had said these things , as they were looking , he was taken up , and a cloud received him out of their sight .

nama: Fá mé tawewotawét njafarot fá njam téngmorwén, sélngwéle sómbio ár kwayaghé sálámefé nokayeyayénd yéfe téndota.
english: While they were looking steadfastly into the sky as he went , behold , two men stood by them in white clothing ,

nama: Fá norayangeyayénd, “Ár Galili yumén, fém némamén yéna ewakai néwewetati njafarot? Yéné Yesuyo efe té yéngwanang féfe tambén njafarot, so nénangote yéné endmayo fémofem kés yéfandati néngwano njafarot.” Yémofem yaferyénd Matias
english: who also said , “ You men of Galilee , why do you stand looking into the sky ? This Jesus , who was received up from you into the sky , will come back in the same way as you saw him going into the sky .”

nama: Féyo fá nénangoyénd Jerusalemét kétándmé mband tunakéf Olif tambén nayuofnar kétán Jerusalemét.
english: Then they returned to Jerusalem from the mountain called Olivet , which is near Jerusalem , a Sabbath day ’ s journey away .

nama: Fá njam nufaryénd, narmboyénd ámb saté méngo kénjút ánde fá tamorangérwén. Fá kété tamorwén Fité, Jon, Jems a Endru, Filif a Tomas, Batolome a Metyu, Jems Alfasene ambum a Saimon efe ménde témorwén ndené Ju ár so kawanjetawét fáyo yau Rom waftayan, a Judas Jemsene ambum.
english: When they had come in , they went up into the upper room where they were staying , that is Peter , John , James , Andrew, Philip , Thomas , Bartholomew, Matthew , James the son of Alphaeus, Simon the Zealot, and Judas the son of James .

nama: Fá méinyotio túmén káumendawét Ngánjánafé orayéghét méinyotio amaf a Yesuene amé Meri a Yesuene nénngnéf.
english: All these with one accord continued steadfastly in prayer and supplication, along with the women and Mary the mother of Jesus , and with his brothers.

nama: Yéné efghon Fité nokayoi 120 efalo yátogh ár mérén kénjún
english: In these days , Peter stood up in the middle of the disciples ( and the number of names was about one hundred twenty ), and said ,

nama: a norayai, “Fútaréf, Buk si so nufrote árkéméné Ngánján Mbérmbér korayau fronde Deifidene mbírmbírta némé korayau Judasenemén, efe náyátoyéng wambégh ár yéfeyot emofem Yesu yerayénd,
english: “Brothers, it was necessary that this Scripture should be fulfilled , which the Holy Spirit spoke before by the mouth of David concerning Judas , who was guide to those who took Jesus .

nama: Judas ámb tém téfene kénjún a si waitogh ár.”
english: For he was counted with us , and received his portion in this ministry .

nama: Judasém mani ewanai yaufi ásáfoghmén, yémon yanayéng mband, kété numai yáne fifi néfnoi marataye a yáne ghérghér nétoryénd.
english: Now this man obtained a field with the reward for his wickedness; and falling headlong , his body burst open and all his intestines gushed out .

nama: Méinyotio ár Jerusalemén náyárayénd yénémamén, féyo yémofem yéné sifayé témndetawét yéfenjo sie Akeldama, yáne fifi siyém “Férék sifayé.”
english: It became known to everyone who lived in Jerusalem that in their language that field was called ‘Akeldama,’ that is , ‘ The field of blood.’

nama: Fité norayai, “Fété yékai Sams bukan, 'Yáne sifayé so yém fanfnero, efe yau so yémor yáne sifayan,' a 'Ámb árom téngwanangé yáne limánégh sifayé.'
english: For it is written in the book of Psalms , ‘ Let his habitation be made desolate . Let no one dwell in it ;’ + 1:20 Psalms 69:25 and , ‘ Let another take his office .’ + 1:20 Psalms 109:8

nama: Yénémamén so fété tékafangém ámb ár efe yéndfé té téném méinyotio efghon njam Yuré Yesufé yénd tényotau,
english: “ Of the men therefore who have accompanied us all the time that the Lord Jesus went in and out among us ,

nama: kétamé yéné efghon Joném njam nue yálitotam Yesu kétánotio fá néngwanoi téfe tambén. Ámbiro so kénamndangé ghékéf fandagh ár yéndfé Yesuene anoghmén.”
english: beginning from the baptism of John to the day that he was received up from us , of these one must become a witness with us of his resurrection.”

nama: Féyo sómbio ár euyafeyayénd, Matias a Josef Barsabas efe témorwén yétkwén Jéstus.
english: They put forward two : Joseph called Barsabbas, who was also called Justus , and Matthias .

nama: Féyo fá Ngánjánjafé koraiwét, “Yuré, fém mat ném méinyotio árfene tikéf. Ténmauyafo téfe yéné sómbiota fémo efe té yékaf
english: They prayed and said , “ You , Lord , who know the hearts of all men , show which one of these two you have chosen

nama: ménát téngwanangé Yesuene muyafé ásáfogh, árkéméné Judasém yéfrango a yéngém kétán ánde kérté so tanangé.”
english: to take part in this ministry and apostleship from which Judas fell away , that he might go to his own place .”

nama: Féyo yémofem wén kembne yérnyayénd ménát so tinjongayénd efe Ngánjánam yafer, a wén nuyáyéng Matiasefaf, féyo fá nafghayéng kétán ámb 11 Yesuene muyafé ár kés tamorwén.
english: They drew lots for them , and the lot fell on Matthias ; and he was counted with the eleven apostles.

nama: Njam Fentikost efogh yénmormén, fá náumendaménd ámbiro sifayat.
english: Now when the day of Pentecost had come , they were all with one accord in one place .

nama: Sunsune ke yénmormén ndenanit ndimbal mbormbornit njafarta a yafoi méinyotio méngo ánde fá tamorangérwén.
english: Suddenly there came from the sky a sound like the rushing of a mighty wind , and it filled all the house where they were sitting .

nama: Féyo yémofem yinjoyénd némé kéretau ndenanit fés kánkékánkénit árkéméné nófarnayénd a námnjoyénd ámbiroámbiro árfefaf kété.
english: Tongues like fire appeared and were distributed to them , and one sat on each of them .

nama: Méinyotio ár tamorwén Ngánján Mbérmbér wafoghkaf a Ngánján Mbérmbéram eméindai nufngoyénd si fénatayero orayégh. Fetikos efogh: fés kankékanké efalo yátogh árfene sénkoyan (Acts 2.3)|src="IB04181gr.tif" size="col" copy="Farid Faadil. © Biblica, Inc. Used with permission. All rights reserved worldwide." ref="2.3"
english: They were all filled with the Holy Spirit and began to speak with other languages , as the Spirit gave them the ability to speak .

nama: Kété tamorangérwén Jerusalemén Ngánján férférafé Ju ár fénaté ndimbal yumén mband maratan.
english: Now there were dwelling in Jerusalem Jews , devout men , from every nation under the sky .

nama: Yémofem njam yéné ke náyárayénd, ár mérén enmormén nafghayénd mwighé déudéuafé, ménamén ámbiroámbiro ár káyáretawét yéfenjo sie korayawét.
english: When this sound was heard, the multitude came together and were bewildered , because everyone heard them speaking in his own language .

nama: Minde sélngwélafé, fá korayangi, “Yéné ár efe norayat ndenanit Galili yumén ár em.
english: They were all amazed and marveled , saying to one another , “ Behold , aren’ t all these who speak Galileans ?

nama: Ndernáye so náyáretam téfenjo si yéfe tambén?
english: How do we hear, everyone in our own native language ?

nama: Yénd yéné yéném Farsiamén, Medemén, Elammén, Mesofotamiyamén, Judiamén, Kafadokiamén, Fontosmén, Esiamén,
english: Parthians , Medes , Elamites , and people from Mesopotamia , Judea , Cappadocia , Pontus , Asia ,

nama: Frigiamén, Famfiliamén, Ijifmén, Sailen kaka Libiamén, wan ár kétándmé Rommén,
english: Phrygia , Pamphylia , Egypt, the parts of Libya around Cyrene , visitors from Rome , both Jews and proselytes ,

nama: Ju ár a fénaté yumén wáwefnogh ár, Kéretamén a Arabmén, yéndfem eyáretam fá norayat téfenjo sie, yéné ndimbal yammén némé Ngánjánam tawafrotauǃ”
english: Cretans and Arabians— we hear them speaking in our languages the mighty works of God !”

nama: Sélngwélafé a mwighé déudéuafé, fá namotayénd ámbiroámbiroe, “Némé fifi yém?”
english: They were all amazed and were perplexed , saying to one another , “ What does this mean ?”

nama: Wénde ámb árém tawértawét a emndayénd, “Yémofem tánetat totér wéri nu.” Fitam si táitotau ár mérnat
english: Others , mocking , said , “ They are filled with new wine .”

nama: Féyo Fité nokayoi 11 waitogh árfé, yáne kém narmboi a si kafrotau ár mérnan, “Fém Judiamén ár a méinyotio efe emor Jerusalem kénjún, yéndon so ewawafenan yéné yam féfeyot, káyárangi merkéráye yéndon némé norayan.
english: But Peter , standing up with the eleven , lifted up his voice and spoke out to them , “ You men of Judea and all you who dwell at Jerusalem , let this be known to you , and listen to my words .

nama: Yéné ár sem wéri yau em, ndené kés nemnati. Sénonjo siyém 9 aklokro akwǃ
english: For these aren’ t drunken , as you suppose , seeing it is only the third hour of the day .

nama: Wéndende, némé té kufrote téfefaf yém Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Joel némé korayau,
english: But this is what has been spoken through the prophet Joel :

nama: “Ngánján noraye, 'Sénonjo kerker efghon, yéndo so téngwasurén tane Mbérmbér méinyotio árfefaf, a féfene ambum a mérésmérés so nafrotat Ngánjánene si, a féfene totér árém ghékéf waingégh yam so efandat, a féfene ákif onjo so ekém.
english: ‘ It will be in the last days , says God , that I will pour out my Spirit on all flesh . Your sons and your daughters will prophesy . Your young men will see visions . Your old men will dream dreams .

nama: Wénde tane faiofnar ásáfogh árfet, ár a amaf, yéndon so téngwasurén tane Mbérmbér yéné efghon, fá so nafrotat Ngánjánene si.
english: Yes, and on my servants and on my handmaidens in those days , I will pour out my Spirit , and they will prophesy .

nama: Yéndon so sélngwélafé yam ewauyafotan njafaran a ufarogh yam mband mbanmbanan, férék, fés a sénjté kwam.
english: I will show wonders in the sky above , and signs on the earth beneath : blood, and fire , and billows of smoke .

nama: Efogh so kawengongé kwéfitat a ghérare so kawengongé férkot yéné soramé Yurane efogh yéném ndimbal a ndimbal kwayaghafé.
english: The sun will be turned into darkness , and the moon into blood, before the great and glorious day of the Lord comes .

nama: A méinyotio ár efe kómnendangi Yurane yétkwénan, fá so kawanjarngi.'
english: It will be that whoever will call on the name of the Lord will be saved .’

nama: “Israilmén ár, káyárangi yénémamén, Yesu Najaretmén ár témorwén Ngánjánam efe yuyafoi féfeyot fénataye wafroghyamafé, sélngwélafé yam a ufarogh yamafé, árkéméné Ngánjánam tawafrotau féfefaf yáne kénjúmé ndené fété fém mat em féfenjomén.
english: “ Men of Israel , hear these words ! Jesus of Nazareth , a man approved by God to you by mighty works and wonders and signs which God did by him among you , even as you yourselves know ,

nama: Ngánján fá mat témorwén némé kufrotau, a yáne fronde mwighé yanayénd njam Yesu ngi yafngoyénd, a fémofem yékmayénd krot yénamndaménd wafatarégh wénan Téndo árém.
english: him , being delivered up by the determined counsel and foreknowledge of God , you have taken by the hand of lawless men , crucified and killed;

nama: Wénde Ngánjánam yanoi kérta, yaloi kér tékrát tambén, ménamén kéram yau so terangé.
english: whom God raised up , having freed him from the agony of death , because it was not possible that he should be held by it .

nama: Deifid norayai yánemén, “'Yéndo yéfandan Yuré túmén ta frondeta. Ménamén fá tane kaka yém, yénd yau so nasambnetan.
english: For David says concerning him , ‘ I saw the Lord always before my face, for he is on my right hand , that I should not be moved .

nama: Féyo tane tikéf siyém nasnete a tane kánké náuwete, tane fifi so ndenéyameyo nene kamnangan,
english: Therefore my heart was glad , and my tongue rejoiced . Moreover my flesh also will dwell in hope ,

nama: ménamén fémo yau so kwéfrango kér árfé, o tumyo fene njúnnjúnofnar ár sái nornda mbéwé méngon.
english: because you will not leave my soul in Hades, neither will you allow your Holy One to see decay .

nama: Fém mat té náyátoi tafaf ghérsé endmén, fémo yénd so kwafo ménaye áuwéghe fene sáfrére.'
english: You made known to me the ways of life . You will make me full of gladness with your presence .’ + 2:28 Psalms 16:8-11

nama: “Fútaréf, yéndon so ewaufrotan efaloe ndené áki Deifid kér yémormén a yiyatotaménd a yáne mbéwé méngo yéna yém yéné efghon.
english: “Brothers, I may tell you freely of the patriarch David , that he both died and was buried , and his tomb is with us to this day .

nama: Wénde fá témorwén Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár a mat namndai ndené Ngánjánam némé yémndetam ndené yáne áki so kámnjongé yáne limánégh ámnjogh sifayan.
english: Therefore , being a prophet , and knowing that God had sworn with an oath to him that of the fruit of his body, according to the flesh, he would raise up the Christ to sit on his throne ,

nama: Deifidém téfandau soramé yu a korayau Kerisoene anoghmén, fá ndené korayau Ngánjánam yau so téfrangongé kér kénjún o yau so tumyongé yáne fifi kérkfot mbéwé méngon.
english: he foreseeing this , spoke about the resurrection of the Christ , that his soul wasn’ t left in Hades, and his flesh didn’ t see decay .

nama: Ngánjánam té yanoyéng Yesu ghérsat, a yénd yéné yéném fandagh ár efaloe.
english: This Jesus God raised up, to which we all are witnesses .

nama: Fá té yuyoi Ngánjánene tambén ngángat, ndené fété Ngánjánam némé té norayai, yémon té yumyoi Afé tambén Ngánján Mbérmbér a té yénmasuryéng némé fémofem sénonjo yéfandati a náyáretati.
english: Being therefore exalted by the right hand of God , and having received from the Father the promise of the Holy Spirit , he has poured out this which you now see and hear.

nama: Ménamén Deifid yau yáfáretam njafarot, wénde fáyo norayai, 'Yuré norayai tane Yurafaf, “Kámnjo tane tambén ngángata
english: For David didn’ t ascend into the heavens , but he says himself , ‘ The Lord said to my Lord , “ Sit by my right hand

nama: kétánotio yéndo so tákman fene mék téfnár fene kafkaf mbanmbanan.”'
english: until I make your enemies a footstool for your feet .”’

nama: “Féyo méinyotio Israil ár mat kamndangi ndené fémofem yéné Yesu té ténamndati wafatarégh wénan, wénde Ngánjánam té yiyátoi Yuré a Keriso.”
english: “ Let all the house of Israel therefore know certainly that God has made him both Lord and Christ , this Jesus whom you crucified .”

nama: Njam árém Fité yiyárayénd yéné si snorayai, fá táf nuyáyénd tikfan a norayayénd Fitafaf a ámb Yesuene muyafé árfefaf, “Fútaréf, némé yéndfem so ewafrotam?”
english: Now when they heard this , they were cut to the heart , and said to Peter and the rest of the apostles, “Brothers, what shall we do ?”

nama: Fitam ewawangoi, “Kawengongi walitoghét, fém méinyotio, Yesu Kerisoene yétkwénan ménát féfene yaufiyam so mwighafnar tawayangé. A Ngánjánam so tawaramangé Ngánján Mbérmbér.
english: Peter said to them , “ Repent and be baptized, every one of you , in the name of Jesus Christ for the forgiveness of sins, and you will receive the gift of the Holy Spirit .

nama: Yéné unyéghofnar si sem féfeyot a féfene ambumafet a méinyotio efe nayu em, ndenáyo méinyotio efe Yuram téfene Ngánjánam so tamotangé yandio.”
english: For the promise is to you and to your children , and to all who are far off, even as many as the Lord our God will call to himself .”

nama: Fitam tárfár sie tawawéngsotau fá, a yémon tamndetau, “Fém kawanjarngi yéné yaufi saté árta.”
english: With many other words he testified and exhorted them , saying , “ Save yourselves from this crooked generation !”

nama: Fá emofem yáne si waitogh yumyoyénd walitogh ewafngoi, a táf 3,000 ár farun nafayoyénd yéné efghon. Efalo yátogh árfene áumengégh
english: Then those who gladly received his word were baptized. There were added that day about three thousand souls .

nama: Fá naramayénd ámb efogh Yesuene muyafé árfefaf watameghét a áumengéghét, féskaf flawé faloghét a Ngánjánafé orayéghét.
english: They continued steadfastly in the apostles’ teaching and fellowship , in the breaking of bread, and prayer .

nama: Méinyotio ár férféram ewifoi a tárfár sélngwélafé yam a ufarogh yam téfandawét Yesuene muyafé árfefaf.
english: Fear came on every soul , and many wonders and signs were done through the apostles.

nama: Méinyotio efalo yátogh ár náumendayénd a tafalotawét yéfenjo rokar.
english: All who believed were together , and had all things in common .

nama: Yémofem tawafnamotawét yéfenjo ásáfogh sifayé a méndefé rokar, yémofem tawarametawét yéfeyot efe káronjawét.
english: They sold their possessions and goods , and distributed them to all , according as anyone had need .

nama: Méinyotio efghon fá túmén káumendawét wáwefnogh méngo sifayan. Yémofem tatfotawét féskaf flawé yéfenjo méngo kénjún a mérne tánetawét áuwéghafé a mer tikfe,
english: Day by day , continuing steadfastly with one accord in the temple , and breaking bread at home , they took their food with gladness and singleness of heart ,

nama: Ngánjáne wagh tawerémndawét a tayamnetawét mer méinyotio árém. A Yuram farun ámb ár efayoi méinyotio efghon fá efe ewanjaryéng.
english: praising God and having favor with all the people . The Lord added to the assembly day by day those who were being saved .

nama: Ámb efghon Fité a Jon tayowéng wáwefnogh méngot Ngánjánafé orayéghét 3 aklok séite karfe.
english: Peter and John were going up into the temple at the hour of prayer , the ninth hour .

nama: Ámb ár aknyégh áre témorwén kétamayo áráfégh fá yénérsaménd kétán wáwefnogh méngo sésafnet yétkwén Merfifi, ánde fá tumnjongayénd túmén efghon ómnengét yéfefaf efe tangmorwén wáwefnogh méngot.
english: A certain man who was lame from his mother ’s womb was being carried , whom they laid daily at the door of the temple which is called Beautiful , to ask gifts for the needy of those who entered into the temple .

nama: Yémo njam ewinjeyai Fité a Jon wáwefnogh méngo élaughétro tárwén, yémo emotangeyai ménát maniot.
english: Seeing Peter and John about to go into the temple , he asked to receive gifts for the needy.

nama: Fitam yéfandayéng mbarkánde fá, ndenéyameyo Joném. Féyo Fitam yémndai, “Yénd ténfandangeǃ”
english: Peter , fastening his eyes on him , with John , said , “Look at us .”

nama: Féyo yéné árom ewarameyai utmanégh, ndené kemnau némndafi kar so tarameyayénd.
english: He listened to them , expecting to receive something from them .

nama: Féyo Fitam yémndai, “Tane ámb yau yém manikéf o gol, wénde némé tane yém, yéndo so kémaraman fe. Yesu Keriso Najaretmén yáne yétkwénan, kokai áligh kufngoǃ”
english: But Peter said , “ I have no silver or gold , but what I have , that I give you . In the name of Jesus Christ of Nazareth , get up and walk !”

nama: Fitam yerai tambén ngángata, yémo yáutánam okayoghét, táfandio ároene kafkaf a kagh muyafé namndeyayénd.
english: He took him by the right hand and raised him up . Immediately his feet and his ankle bones received strength .

nama: Fá natnaméng yánjo kafkafe a áligh nufngoi. Féyo fá nuwanoyénd yémafé wáwefnogh méngot, tiyotawéng a kátnawéng tuwetau Ngánján.
english: Leaping up , he stood and began to walk . He entered with them into the temple , walking , leaping , and praising God .

nama: Njam méinyotio árém yinjoyénd fá álighan a Ngánjánene waghan,
english: All the people saw him walking and praising God .

nama: yémofem yáyámngoyénd fá yéné ár efe túmén témorangérwén ómnengéghan wáwefnogh méngo sésafne yétkwén Merfifi, a fá sunsun emormén a sélngwélafé yammén némé kufrotau yáfaf. Fité korayau wáwefnogh méngo sifayan
english: They recognized him , that it was he who used to sit begging for gifts for the needy at the Beautiful Gate of the temple . They were filled with wonder and amazement at what had happened to him .

nama: Njamandio ómnengégh ár kaweretau Fité a Jonefaf, méinyotio ár sélngwél emormén kénérsawét yéfefaf yéné sifayat yétkwén Solomonene méngo sifayat.
english: As the lame man who was healed held on to Peter and John , all the people ran together to them in the porch that is called Solomon ’s, greatly wondering .

nama: Njam Fitam yéné yinjoi, fá norayai yéfefaf, “Israilmén ár, némamén yéné yammén fém sélngwél em? Némamén fémofem ghékfe yénmámnjotati yénd ndenanit téfenjo wafté a Ngánján wáwefnogh yame yéndfem kar yéné ár yéméindangem álighét?
english: When Peter saw it , he responded to the people , “ You men of Israel , why do you marvel at this man ? Why do you fasten your eyes on us , as though by our own power or godliness we had made him walk ?

nama: Ebraamene Ngánján, Aisekene Ngánján, Jeikofene Ngánján, téfene ákifene Ngánján, tuwetawét yáne faiofnar ásáfogh ár Yesu. Fémofem yéramayénd fá kétán ngiot a fémofem yékenayénd Failetene sáfrére, soramé yémon mwighé yáitoi yáyot umyoghét.
english: The God of Abraham, Isaac , and Jacob , the God of our fathers , has glorified his Servant Jesus , whom you delivered up and denied in the presence of Pilate , when he had determined to release him .

nama: Fémofem yékenayénd Njúnnjúnofnar a Mbarkánd Ár a namotayénd ndené ngi téfnár tumyongi féfefaf.
english: But you denied the Holy and Righteous One and asked for a murderer to be granted to you ,

nama: Fémofem yésmetaménd ghérsé téfén ár, wénde Ngánjánam yanoyéng kérta. Yénd yéné yéném fandagh ár yénémamén.
english: and killed the Prince of life , whom God raised from the dead , to which we are witnesses .

nama: Ndimbal mwighaye Yesuene yétkwéne, yéné ár efe fémofem yéfandati a mat em, fá muyafé náyáto. Yéné siyém Yesuene yétkwéne a ndimbal mwighaye árké yéném yá kénjúmé yéramayéng yéné mer yátoghét yáyot, árkéméné fémofem méinyotio yéfandati. Wáwefnogh méngo, Solomonene méngo (Acts 3.11)|src="LB00248B.TIF" size="col" copy="Louise Bass, © 1994 The British & Foreign Bible Society." ref="3.11"
english: By faith in his name , his name has made this man strong , whom you see and know . Yes, the faith which is through him has given him this perfect soundness in the presence of you all .

nama: “Fútaréf, yénd mat wém ndené féfene wafroghyam siyém mwighé kwéfkwéf em, ndenéyameyo féfene limánégh ár tamorwén.
english: “ Now , brothers, I know that you did this in ignorance, as did also your rulers.

nama: Wénde yéné yém ndernáye Ngánjánam efalo yiyátote némé fá korayau méinyotio yánjo Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kénjúmé, korayawéng ndené yéné Kerisom tékrát so yéfande.
english: But the things which God announced by the mouth of all his prophets , that Christ should suffer , he thus fulfilled .

nama: Kakenangi yaufita a kawengongi Ngánjánefaf, ménát féfene yaufi so tawawayangé, ménát Yurata frengégh so yéném,
english: “ Repent therefore , and turn again , that your sins may be blotted out , so that there may come times of refreshing from the presence of the Lord ,

nama: wamarogh efogh so kawerangé kétamé Yurata a Ngánjánam Yesu so ténmáfáretangé, efe yém Keriso efe té yuyafoi féfeyot.
english: and that he may send Christ Jesus , who was ordained for you before ,

nama: Yesu nawanjete njafaran kétán yéné efogh kawerangé Ngánjáneyot ménát Ngánjánam so ewafarnje méinyotio rokar, némé unyéghofnar si norayayéng tándái yánjo njúnnjúnofnar Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kénjúmé.
english: whom heaven must receive until the times of restoration of all things , which God spoke long ago by the mouth of his holy prophets .

nama: Moses norayai, 'Yuré féfene Ngánjánam so tunjangé Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár ndené fété yénd swém féfenjo ár kénjún, fémofem táf yiyáretati némat fém njam emndeta.
english: For Moses indeed said to the fathers, ‘ The Lord God will raise up a prophet for you from among your brothers, like me . You shall listen to him in all things whatever he says to you .

nama: Efe yau náyáretat yéné Ngánjánene mat yátogh ároefaf Ngánjánam so titérmbongé yéfenjo árta.'
english: It will be that every soul that will not listen to that prophet will be utterly destroyed from among the people .’

nama: “Kétándmé Samuel yénanotio sénonjo, méinyotio Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár kénorayawét némé ufroghan sénonjo em.
english: Yes , and all the prophets from Samuel and those who followed after , as many as have spoken , also told of these days .

nama: A fém srem Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene ambum a fém ewafnyang Ngánjánefaf némé mwighé yéréindam féfekifé. Yémon norayai Ebraamefaf, 'Fene áki ambum kénjún méinyotio ár yéné mbandan frengéghan so em.'
english: You are the children of the prophets , and of the covenant which God made with our fathers , saying to Abraham, ‘ All the families of the earth will be blessed through your offspring.’

nama: Njam Ngánjánam yuyoi yánjo faiofnar ásáfogh ár, yémo yénmáfáretam fá fronde féfefaf Ju árfefaf frengéghét ménát awengogh féfenjo yaufita ámbiroámbiroe.”
english: God , having raised up his servant Jesus, sent him to you first to bless you , in turning away every one of you from your wickedness .”

nama: Ghéngén wárogh ár a wáwefnogh méngo wanjengégh sénko ár a Saduki ár enmormén Fité a Jonefaf njamandio koraiwét árfefaf.
english: As they spoke to the people , the priests and the captain of the temple and the Sadducees came to them ,

nama: Fá nékwan tamorwén ménamén Yesuene muyafé árém tawaufrowét árét Yesuene kénjún ndernáye kér ár so nanotat.
english: being upset because they taught the people and proclaimed in Jesus the resurrection from the dead .

nama: Yémofem ewereyayénd Fité a Jon. Fá kwéfkwéf méngon elaweyayénd. Fá so kawanjengwét kaitau, ménamén férégh témorwén
english: They laid hands on them , and put them in custody until the next day , for it was now evening .

nama: Wénde tárfár ár efe náyárayénd si efalo yiyátoyénd, a yéné efghon áyárégh ár náyátoyénd 5,000 ár.
english: But many of those who heard the word believed , and the number of the men came to be about five thousand .

nama: Ámb efghon, limánégh ár, sénko ár a nák watamegh ár nafángoyénd Jerusalem kénjún.
english: In the morning, their rulers, elders , and scribes were gathered together in Jerusalem .

nama: Anas limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár kété témorwén, a Kayafas, Jon, Aleksendé a ámb efe limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár mérénmén tamorwén.
english: Annas the high priest was there , with Caiaphas , John , Alexander, and as many as were relatives of the high priest.

nama: Yémofem enémnjéménd yéfene sáfrére Fité a Jon a mogh ewafngeyayénd fá, “Némé waftaye o némé yétkwéne yéné ásáfogh ewafrot?”
english: When they had stood Peter and John in the middle of them , they inquired , “ By what power , or in what name , have you done this ?”

nama: Féyo Fité, Ngánján Mbérmbér wafoghkaf, norayai yéfefaf, “Limánégh ár a árfene sénko árǃ
english: Then Peter , filled with the Holy Spirit , said to them , “ You rulers of the people and elders of Israel,

nama: Njam té yénd yénmot mer ásáfoghmén aknyégh ároenemén efe mer namndai a ndernáye mer náyátoi,
english: if we are examined today concerning a good deed done to a crippled man , by what means this man has been healed ,

nama: fém fái mat kamndangi, a méinyotio Israilmén ár. Yéné siyém Najaretmén Yesu Keriso yáne yétkwénan, efe fémofem yénamndaménd wénde efe Ngánjánam yanoyéng kérta, yéné ár yakai féfene sáfrére merro.
english: may it be known to you all , and to all the people of Israel , that in the name of Jesus Christ of Nazareth , whom you crucified , whom God raised from the dead , this man stands here before you whole in him .

nama: Yesu siyém ndenanit wím, “'wím fémofem méngo ramégh árém yékenayénd, árké té namndé néndkéf sérasér.'
english: He is ‘ the stone which was regarded as worthless by you , the builders , which has become the head of the corner .’

nama: Wanjarégh siyém endefaf yau so tinjongi, ménamén ámb yétkwén yau yém mband maratan yéramai árét árkéménaye yénd so ténmanjarngé.”
english: There is salvation in no one else , for there is no other name under heaven that is given among men , by which we must be saved !”

nama: Yémofem njam ewinjeyayénd Fité a Jon férférofnar koraiwét a mat náyátoyénd ndenénde fá tárwén skulofnar o ménd ár, fá sélngwél emormén a fá mat tamorwén ndenénde yéné ár Yesufé tamorwén.
english: Now when they saw the boldness of Peter and John , and had perceived that they were unlearned and ignorant men , they marveled . They recognized that they had been with Jesus .

nama: Wénde ménamén yémofem yinjoyénd aknyégh ár efe mer namndai tawakayongérwén yémafé, féyo némé si yau norayayénd.
english: Seeing the man who was healed standing with them , they could say nothing against it .

nama: Féyo Ju sénko árém ewafáretangeyayénd téndot Ju sénko árfene áumengéghta, mérne nafghayénd a si taruindawét.
english: But when they had commanded them to go aside out of the council , they conferred among themselves ,

nama: Fá namotayénd, “Yéndfem némé yam so yafrotam yéné sómbio árfefaf? Méinyotio ár tamorangérwén Jerusalemén fá mat em nde némé yémofem sélngwélafé yam yafroménd árkéméné yéndfem yau so tékenangém.
english: saying , “ What shall we do to these men ? Because indeed a notable miracle has been done through them , as can be plainly seen by all who dwell in Jerusalem , and we can ’ t deny it .

nama: Wénde yéné yam kémboghét marat mété káyátongé árfe kénjún, féyo yénémamén yéndfem mat yéné ár so táyátem yau so norayét yéné yétkwénan ámb árfefaf.”
english: But so that this spreads no further among the people , let ’s threaten them , that from now on they don’ t speak to anyone in this name .”
