nama: Féyo wéikor emotangeyayénd yéné sómbio ár a táikér si emndéménd fá yau so norayét o ewatamet Yesuene yétkwéne.
english: They called them , and commanded them not to speak at all nor teach in the name of Jesus .

nama: Wénde Fité a Jonfem ewawangeyayénd, “Fém kemnangi kor ndené mbarkánde Ngánjánene ghékfan yém ár so tiyáré o Ngánján.
english: But Peter and John answered them , “ Whether it is right in the sight of God to listen to you rather than to God , judge for yourselves ,

nama: Yénd yau so kékmbongém sian téfén yéndfem némé tafandam a káyáretam.”
english: for we can ’t help telling the things which we saw and heard.”

nama: Kémbogh si soramé, yémofem engéumieyayénd. Yémofem ámb yau end ewinjoyénd ndernáye so fá tékrátan takmeyayénd, ménamén méinyotio árém Ngánján tuwetawét ménamén némé nufrotam.
english: When they had further threatened them , they let them go, finding no way to punish them , because of the people ; for everyone glorified God for that which was done .

nama: Yéné ár efe Ngánjánam mer yiyátoi 40 yunjéf té yáindai. Efalo yátogh árfene Ngánjánafé orayégh
english: For the man on whom this miracle of healing was performed was more than forty years old .

nama: Fá njam engéfrangeyayénd, Fité a Jon néngangeyayénd kétán yéfenjo árfefaf a tawaufrowét méinyotio limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a limángégh árém némé korayawét yéfefaf.
english: Being let go , they came to their own company and reported all that the chief priests and the elders had said to them .

nama: Fá njam káyáretawét yénémamén, féyo yémofem kém efghayénd mérne oraighan Ngánjánefaf, fá norayayénd, “Yurafene Yuré, fémo yafrotam njafar, mband a arakaf, a méinyotio rokar yéné kénjún.
english: When they heard it , they lifted up their voice to God with one accord and said , “O Lord , you are God , who made the sky , the earth , the sea , and all that is in them ;

nama: Fém korayau Ngánján Mbérmbére fenjo faiofnar ásáfogh ár, téfene afé Deifidefafmé, “'Némamén mband marat nékw em a némamén árém fifiofnar mwighé nemnat?
english: who by the mouth of your servant David , said , ‘ Why do the nations rage , and the peoples plot a vain thing ?

nama: Mbandmén warsagh ár kafrendawét ngiot a limángégh ár náumendat mérne Yurafé ásméghét a wéi yémafé Keriso.'
english: The kings of the earth take a stand , and the rulers plot together , against the Lord , and against his Christ .’ + 4:26 Christ (Greek) and Messiah (Hebrew) both mean Anointed One. + 4:26 Psalms 2:1-2

nama: Efalo yátogh ár mé Ngánjánjafé koraiwét, “Erod a Fontius Failet kafángotawét mérne yémafé Téndo árfé a Israilmén árfé yéné ndimbal tesen kénjún ménát fene njúnnjúnofnar ásáfogh ár Yesue ngiot, efe fémon té yiyátoi Keriso.
english: “ For truly , both Herod and Pontius Pilate , with the Gentiles and the people of Israel , were gathered together against your holy servant Jesus , whom you anointed ,

nama: Yémofem méinyotio yam tawafrotawét, fém mat kénmorwén frondeyo fene waftaye a méndeyan soramé nufrotam.
english: to do whatever your hand and your counsel foreordained to happen .

nama: Yuré, kéreta yéfene nékw téfanda a fémon taméinda fenjo faiofnar ásáfogh ár fene siot so norayat férférofnar.
english: Now , Lord , look at their threats, and grant to your servants to speak your word with all boldness ,

nama: Fenjo ngángé tásáfote ménát mer yátoghét a ufarogh yam a sélngwélafé yam wafroghét, Yesuene yétkwén kénjúmé, fene njúnnjúnofnar faiofnar ásáfogh ár.”
english: while you stretch out your hand to heal ; and that signs and wonders may be done through the name of your holy Servant Jesus .”

nama: Soramé fá Ngánjánjafé koraiwét, yéné sifayan ánde kafángotawét kété kásámbnetau. Féyo fá Ngánján Mbérmbéram ewafoi a Ngánjánene si táitotawét férférofnar. Efalo yátogh árém tafalotawét yéfenjo rokar
english: When they had prayed , the place was shaken where they were gathered together . They were all filled with the Holy Spirit , and they spoke the word of God with boldness .

nama: Méinyotio efalo yátogh ár tamorwén ámbiro tikfan a mwighayan. Efe ámb yau korayau ndené yéfene rokar yéfendro tamorwén, wénde yémofem tafalotawét yéfene némé tamorwén.
english: The multitude of those who believed were of one heart and soul . Not one of them claimed that anything of the things which he possessed was his own , but they had all things in common .

nama: Minde waftafé Yesuene muyafé ár ménjté tamorwén afroghan Yuré Yesuene kér anoghmén. Ngánjánene ngárám kafamndau méinyotio árfefaf.
english: With great power , the apostles gave their testimony of the resurrection of the Lord Jesus . Great grace was on them all .

nama: Kété ámb ár yau káronjau rokarot yéfene kénjún. Efe mband a méngo yuré tamorwén yémofem tatérnawét a térarégh mani tanérsawét
english: For neither was there among them any who lacked , for as many as were owners of lands or houses sold them , and brought the proceeds of the things that were sold ,

nama: a takmetawét Yesuene muyafé árfene kafkafot, a tawarametawét yéfeyot efe káronjawét maniot.
english: and laid them at the apostles’ feet ; and distribution was made to each , according as anyone had need .

nama: Josef, Lefi mérénmén kétamamén Sáifres, efe Yesuene muyafé ár tanmotawét Banabas, yáne yétkwénone fifi siyém “Wawéngsogh ár ambum,”
english: Joses, who by the apostles was also called Barnabas ( which is , being interpreted , Son of Encouragement ), a Levite , a man of Cyprus by race ,

nama: yéramai yánjo mband maniot a yékmai mani Yesuene muyafé árfene kafkafot.
english: having a field, sold it and brought the money and laid it at the apostles’ feet .

nama: Ámb ár yétkwén Ananias, yátnofé tárwén Safairafé, yémofem mband yérameyayénd maniot.
english: But a certain man named Ananias, with Sapphira his wife , sold a possession ,

nama: Yémon ámb mani ewerai yandio, a yatén mat témorwén méinyotio yénémamén, a wénde enwanai ámbro a ekmai Yesuene muyafé árfene kafkafot.
english: and kept back part of the price , his wife also being aware of it , then brought a certain part and laid it at the apostles’ feet .

nama: Féyo Fité norayai, “Ananias, ndernayan Sáifram fene tikéf yafoi ménát fémon tawinde Ngánján Mbérmbéroe a fémon ewer fendio ámb mani fémon árké ewan mbandmén?
english: But Peter said , “Ananias, why has Satan filled your heart to lie to the Holy Spirit and to keep back part of the price of the land ?

nama: Fronde fene mband témorwén, soramé fémon yétérnai maniot. Mband résagh soramé, yéné mani náyátoi fene. Némayam fém néméindam yéné yamot? Fém yau kuinde árfefaf wénde Ngánjánefaf.”
english: While you kept it , didn’ t it remain your own ? After it was sold , wasn’ t it in your power ? How is it that you have conceived this thing in your heart ? You haven’ t lied to men , but to God .”

nama: Njam Ananias náyárai yéné si, fá táf fété nuyai krotio. A ndimbal férféram ewanai méinyotio efe náyárayénd némé yam nufrotam.
english: Ananias, hearing these words , fell down and died . Great fear came on all who heard these things .

nama: Féyo totér ár nénuwanoyénd yáne fifi yéfinaménd, a yéngwanayénd a mband yaramayénd.
english: The young men arose and wrapped him up , and they carried him out and buried him .

nama: Nambio efoghféneféne soramé yáne amaf yénmormén, yau mat náyátoi némé nufrotam.
english: About three hours later, his wife , not knowing what had happened , came in .

nama: Fitam amaf yémotai, “Ta kwaufro, yéné fai fiyém fém a Ananias yéné mbandmén sewaneyayénd?” Amafom yawangoi, “A, yéné fai fété yém.”
english: Peter answered her , “ Tell me whether you sold the land for so much .” She said , “ Yes , for so much .”

nama: Fité norayai amafoefaf, “Némamén fémofem yéné mwighé kemarét Yurane Mbérmbér ufoghét? Kéretaǃ Yéné totér ár emofem fene ár tiyatotat kété ewakai méngo sésafneyan, a fém yémofem ndenéyameyo so nérsat.”
english: But Peter asked her , “ How is it that you have agreed together to tempt the Spirit of the Lord ? Behold , the feet of those who have buried your husband are at the door , and they will carry you out .”

nama: Táf fété amaf nuyai yáne kafkafot krotio. Féyo yéné totér ár nélawayénd a amaf yinjoyénd kérwén, yéngwanayénd yiyatotaménd a yánjarfé esareyayénd.
english: She fell down immediately at his feet and died . The young men came in and found her dead , and they carried her out and buried her by her husband.

nama: Ndimbal férféram ewanai méinyotio Yesuene mérén a méinyotio ár efe náyárayénd yénémamén némé nufrotam. Yesuene muyafé árém tárfár ár mer táyátotawét
english: Great fear came on the whole assembly , and on all who heard these things .

nama: Yesuene muyafé árém tawafrotawét tárfár ufarogh yam a sélngwélafé yam árfene sáfan. A méinyotio Yesuene efalo yátogh ár túmén kafángotawét Solomonene méngo sifayan.
english: By the hands of the apostles many signs and wonders were done among the people . They were all with one accord in Solomon ’s porch .

nama: Fá férfér tamorwén ufényéghét yéfefaf, wéndende árém mer si korayawét yéfenemén
english: None of the rest dared to join them ; however , the people honored them .

nama: Tárfár árém a amafam efalo tiyátotawét Yuré a yéné téfnan ndimbal mérén kénáyátotau.
english: More believers were added to the Lord , multitudes of both men and women .

nama: Yéné téfnan, árém tanérsawét enjne téfnár endét a takmetawét tatayafé a yameyafé ménát Fitane mbanmban so kuitau yéné árfefaf táf Fité njam kawaindau endmé.
english: They even carried out the sick into the streets and laid them on cots and mattresses, so that as Peter came by , at least his shadow might overshadow some of them .

nama: Ndenayo ár mérén náumendaménd Jerusalem tesenmén, tanérsawét yéfenjo enjne téfnár a efe yaufi mbérmbéram tawasérmbotau a méinyotio mer káyátotawét. Yesuene muyafé árét tékrát tawarametawét
english: The multitude also came together from the cities around Jerusalem , bringing sick people and those who were tormented by unclean spirits ; and they were all healed .

nama: Féyo limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a ámb yáne wáutárégh ár Saduki mérénmén waramnjagh ár náyátoyénd.
english: But the high priest rose up , and all those who were with him ( which is the sect of the Sadducees ), and they were filled with jealousy

nama: Yémofem Yesuene muyafé ár ewerayénd a elawayénd marataye kwéfkwéf méngon.
english: and laid hands on the apostles, then put them in public custody.

nama: Wénde yéné sémbáran Yurane njafar si résagh árom kwéfkwéf méngo sésafne esawéryéng a enéutoryéng.
english: But an angel of the Lord opened the prison doors by night , and brought them out and said ,

nama: Yémon emndai, “Nguwanongi, kokayongi wáwefnogh méngo sifayan, a árét yéné tawaufrongi méinyotio totér ghérsamén si.”
english: “ Go stand and speak in the temple to the people all the words of this life .”

nama: Táf njam akw yéfawéryéng fá nélawayénd wáwefnogh méngo sifayat, ndernáye té njafar si résagh árom emndai, a ár watamegh ewafngoyénd. Limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár a yáne mérén eumendayénd Sanedrin árké yém méinyotio Israilmén sénko árfene áumengégh, féyo ewáfáretaménd wanjengégh ár kwéfkwéf méngot Yesuene muyafé árét wasroghét yéfefaf.
english: When they heard this , they entered into the temple about daybreak and taught . But the high priest and those who were with him came and called the council together , with all the senate of the children of Israel , and sent to the prison to have them brought .

nama: Wénde njam nufaryénd kwéfkwéf méngofaf, yémofem yau ewinjoyénd. Féyo fá néngangoyénd a nafroyénd,
english: But the officers who came didn’ t find them in the prison . They returned and reported,

nama: “Yéndfem yinjongém kwéfkwéf méngo sésafne manéghkaf, kwéfkwéf méngo wanjengégh árfé tawakayongérwén sésafnefaf, wénde yéndfem njam esawérngém, efe yau ámb yinjongém kénjún.”
english: “ We found the prison shut and locked , and the guards standing before the doors , but when we opened them , we found no one inside !”

nama: Njam wáwefnogh méngo wanjengégh sénko ár a limánégh ghéngén wárogh ár káyáretau afrogh si, fá katambnawét némé mété nufrota Yesuene muyafé árfefaf.
english: Now when the high priest, the captain of the temple , and the chief priests heard these words , they were very perplexed about them and what might become of this .

nama: Ámb ár yénmormén norayai, “Kéretangiǃ Yéné ár efe elawangi kwéfkwéf méngon ewakai wáwefnogh méngo sifayan ár ewatametat.”
english: One came and told them , “ Behold , the men whom you put in prison are in the temple , standing and teaching the people .”

nama: Wáwefnogh méngo wanjengégh sénko ár nuwanoi yánjo ásáfogh árfé Yesuene muyafé ár enwasroyénd. Yémofem yau wauwirorghe enwasroyénd ménamén fá férfér tamorwén árém mété wíme tawafiyátowét.
english: Then the captain went with the officers , and brought them without violence, for they were afraid that the people might stone them .

nama: Yesuene muyafé ár njam enémnjoyénd, yémofem ewakayoyénd Ju árfene sénko árfene áumengégh sáfrére ménát limánégh ghéngén wárogh árom sái tamotau.
english: When they had brought them , they set them before the council . The high priest questioned them ,

nama: Fá norayai, “Yéndfem ewaramangém táikér si féfeyot ménát yau sái ewatametat yéné yétkwénan, wénde fémofem féfenjo watameghe Jerusalem té yafongi a yéné téfnan féfenjo mwighaye yényátongi Yesuene krot.”
english: saying , “Didn’ t we strictly command you not to teach in this name ? Behold , you have filled Jerusalem with your teaching , and intend to bring this man ’s blood on us .”

nama: Fité a ámb Yesuene muyafé árém yawangoyénd, “Yénd so kámyongém wafroghét Ngánjánefaf yau árfefafǃ
english: But Peter and the apostles answered , “ We must obey God rather than men .

nama: Téfene ákiafene Ngánjánam yanoi Yesu kétándmé kérta-efe fémofem yésmetaménd wafatarégh wénan yamayénd.
english: The God of our fathers raised up Jesus , whom you killed, hanging him on a tree .

nama: Ngánjánam yuyoyéng fá yánjo tambén ngángat ndené fété warsagh ár a wanjarégh ár ménát yémon yéné yafrote Israilmén ár so nakenat yéfenjo yaufita a Ngánján so tawalindangé.
english: God exalted him with his right hand to be a Prince and a Savior , to give repentance to Israel , and remission of sins.

nama: Yénd fandagh ár yéném yéné yammén, a ndenáyo Ngánján Mbérmbér efe Ngánjánam yéramai yéfeyot efe námyotat yáfaf áyárghét.”
english: We are his witnesses of these things ; and so also is the Holy Spirit , whom God has given to those who obey him .”

nama: Njam fá náyárayénd yéné si, fá nékwafé namndayénd a ménde tamorwén krot sái tákmangayénd.
english: But they , when they heard this , were cut to the heart, and were determined to kill them .

nama: Wénde Farasi ár yétkwén témorwén Gamaliel, nák watamegh ár, efe tutémndawét méinyotio árém, fá nokayoi Ju árfene sénko árfene áumengégh kénjún a si ewaramai yéné ár so tautoreyayénd téndot ménát fáro kénjún so korayangayénd.
english: But one stood up in the council , a Pharisee named Gamaliel , a teacher of the law , honored by all the people , and commanded to put the apostles out for a little while .

nama: Féyo nokayoi siot yéfefaf, “Israilmén ár, kor kemnangi merkéráye némé fémofem wafroghét yafngongi yéné árfefaf.
english: He said to them , “ You men of Israel , be careful concerning these men , what you are about to do .

nama: Ámb efghon, ár kété témorwén yáne yétkwén Téudas, efe kuindawéng nde ndimbal kar témorwén, 400 ár nufnyayénd yáfaf. Wénde fá yésmetaménd, méinyotio yáne waitogh ár nófarnayénd a yáne imángégh yamot nefoi.
english: For before these days Theudas rose up , making himself out to be somebody ; to whom a number of men , about four hundred , joined themselves . He was slain; and all , as many as obeyed him , were dispersed and came to nothing .

nama: Yá soramé, Judas Galili yumén nufaryéng yétkwén kayogh efghon, ár mérén tanlimndau nékwafé. Fá wéi yésmetaménd krotio, a yáne méinyotio waitogh ár semormén nófarnayénd.
english: After this man , Judas of Galilee rose up in the days of the enrollment, and drew away some people after him . He also perished, and all , as many as obeyed him , were scattered abroad .

nama: Yéné téfnan yéndo ewawéngsotan fém. Yéné ár tafrangongiǃ Fá so nguwanongi. Némé yau so yafrotamǃ Njam yéfene mwighé o wafroghyam yém árfe tambén, so kefongé.
english: Now I tell you , withdraw from these men and leave them alone . For if this counsel or this work is of men , it will be overthrown .

nama: Wénde njam Ngánjáneta yéném, fémofem yéné ár yau so takmbongi, fém fémyo so kawinjongi Ngánjánafé ásmégh ár.”
english: But if it is of God , you will not be able to overthrow it , and you would be found even to be fighting against God !”

nama: Yáne si ewanayénd yémofem. Yémofem emotayénd Yesuene muyafé ár kénjút ényawéghét a fá fémogh ewafngoyénd. Féyo yémofem emndayénd fá yau so norayat Yesuene yétkwénan, a fá tangéumyend a nguwanongi.
english: They agreed with him . Summoning the apostles, they beat them and commanded them not to speak in the name of Jesus , and let them go .

nama: Yesuene muyafé árém yéfrangoyénd Ju sénko árfene áumengégh áuwéghafé ménamén fá Yesuene yétkwén téfnan tékrátan tamorwén.
english: They therefore departed from the presence of the council , rejoicing that they were counted worthy to suffer dishonor for Jesus ’ name .

nama: Méinyotio efghon wáwefnogh méngo sifayan a méngomé, fá yau nékmboyénd watameghan a mer si waitoghan Yesu Kerisoenemén.
english: Every day , in the temple and at home , they never stopped teaching and preaching Jesus , the Christ .

nama: Yéné efghon njam efalo yátogh ár wékeye tárfár káyátotawét, Grik si téfnár tawafnyangérwén yéfefaf káwatarnawét Ibru si téfnárfefaf. Fá korayawét, “Njam fémofem Ibru si téfnár tafénawét njamke kétán kwirafefaf méinyotio efghon, fémofem yau ewarametati féyotaroyan njamke Grik si kwirafet.”
english: Now in those days , when the number of the disciples was multiplying , a complaint arose from the Hellenists against the Hebrews , because their widows were neglected in the daily service .

nama: Féyo yénémamén 12am eumendayénd méinyotio efalo yátogh ár a norayayénd, “Kor yau mbarkánd yém téfeyot Ngánjánene si ásáfogh sái nawaneta ménáyan njamke faloghan.
english: The twelve summoned the multitude of the disciples and said , “ It is not appropriate for us to forsake the word of God and serve tables .

nama: Fútaréf, tawaferngi sefen ár féfenjo kénjúmén efe féfene matkaf em a Ngánján Mbérmbér afoghkaf a káfeté mwighafé. Yéndfem yéné ásáfogh so tawaramangém yéfeyot.
english: Therefore , select from among you , brothers, seven men of good report , full of the Holy Spirit and of wisdom , whom we may appoint over this business .

nama: Yénd yéndio so karamangém méinyotio efogh Ngánjánafé oraighan a si waitoghan.”
english: But we will continue steadfastly in prayer and in the ministry of the word .”

nama: Yéné si orayéghmén méinyotio ár náuwetaménd. Yémofem Stifen yaferyénd, yéné ár ndimbal mwighé afoghkaf a Ngánján Mbérmbérafé, ndenéyameyo Filif, Frokorus, Nikanor, Timon, Farmanas a Nikolas kétamamén Antiok yumén efe témorwén Téndo ár soramé náyátoi Ju árfé wáwefnogh ár.
english: These words pleased the whole multitude . They chose Stephen , a man full of faith and of the Holy Spirit , Philip , Prochorus , Nicanor , Timon , Parmenas , and Nicolaus, a proselyte of Antioch,

nama: Yémofem eramayénd yéné ár Yesuene muyafé árfene ngángat, efe Ngánjánjafé korayawét a ngángé efayoyénd yéfefaf.
english: whom they set before the apostles. When they had prayed , they laid their hands on them .

nama: Féyo Ngánjánene si marat náyátoyéng. Efalo yátogh ár Jerusalemén wékeye tárfár káyátotawét, a ndenéyameyo tárfár ghéngén wárogh ár námyoyénd áyárghét kétán ndimbal mwighafaf. Stifen yerayénd
english: The word of God increased and the number of the disciples greatly multiplied in Jerusalem . A great company of the priests were obedient to the faith .

nama: Stifen, yéné ár Ngánjánene ngárám afoghkaf a waftafé, yémon tawafrotau ndimbal sélngwélafé yam a ufarogh yam árfene kénjún.
english: Stephen , full of faith and power , performed great wonders and signs among the people .

nama: Wénde ámb Ju ár kétamamén tamorwén Sairene a Aleksandriamén a Silisia a Esia yumén efe korayawét ndené yénd siyéném Yuwek ár. Yéné ár éwigh nufngoyénd Stifenfé,
english: But some of those who were of the synagogue called “ The Libertines ”, and of the Cyrenians , of the Alexandrians, and of those of Cilicia and Asia arose, disputing with Stephen .

nama: wénde fá féyotarofnar tamorwén yémafé éwighét ménamén Stifen témorwén káfeté mwighafé a Ngánján Mbérmbéroene muyayan korayau.
english: They weren’ t able to withstand the wisdom and the Spirit by which he spoke .

nama: Yémofem kwankwane ewaferyénd ámb ár ndené siot, “Yéndfem té yiyárayém Stifen yaufi si korayau Mosesefaf a Ngánjánefaf.”
english: Then they secretly induced men to say , “ We have heard him speak blasphemous words against Moses and God .”

nama: Féyo yéné ende yémofem ewasemnayénd ár, sénko ár, a nák watamegh ár. Yémofem yénmerayénd Stifen yénémnjoyénd Ju árfene sénko árfene áumengégh sáfrére.
english: They stirred up the people , the elders , and the scribes , and came against him and seized him , then brought him in to the council ,

nama: Yémofem yéfunayénd unyégh si, efe norayayénd, “Yéné ár yau kékmbongé wanyogh si orayégh yéné wáwefnogh méngo sifayamén a nákmén.
english: and set up false witnesses who said , “ This man never stops speaking blasphemous words against this holy place and the law .

nama: Yéndfem fété tiyáretawém fá korayau ndené yéné Najaretmén Yesum so yirone yéné sifayé a so ewengote ákiafene nák Mosesém árkéméné té ewafnamoi téfefaf.”
english: For we have heard him say that this Jesus of Nazareth will destroy this place , and will change the customs which Moses delivered to us .”

nama: Méinyotio efe tamorangérwén Ju árfene sénko árfene áumengéghan Stifen yémofem téfandawét yáne sáf náyátoi ndenanit njafar si résagh árnit.
english: All who sat in the council , fastening their eyes on him , saw his face like it was the face of an angel.

nama: Féyo limánégh ghéngén wárogh árom yémotai Stifen, “Yéné wátaranégh efalo em?”
english: The high priest said , “ Are these things so ?”

nama: Yéné ámoghmén yémo yawangoi, “Fútaréf a afaf, kénáyárangi tafafǃ Minde kwayaghafé téfene Ngánján nufaryéng kétán téfene áki Ebraamefaf njam fá mé témorwén Mesofotamiyan, táf fronde njam fá témorangérwén Aranan.
english: He said , “Brothers and fathers , listen. The God of glory appeared to our father Abraham when he was in Mesopotamia , before he lived in Haran ,

nama: Ngánjánam yémndai, 'Téfrango fenjo yu a fenjo ár, a kuwano kétán árké mband yéndon so kémauyafon.'
english: and said to him , ‘ Get out of your land and away from your relatives , and come into a land which I will show you .’

nama: “Féyo yémon yéfrangoi Kaldia árfene mband a námnjoi Aranan. Yárefane kér soramé, Ngánjánam yéngwáfáretam fá yéné mbandot ánde fém sénonjo emor.
english: Then he came out of the land of the Chaldaeans and lived in Haran . From there , when his father was dead, God moved him into this land where you are now living .

nama: Ngánjánam yau yaramai ámb mband yéna. Wénde Ngánjánam unyéghofnar si yémndai fá, 'Fém a fene ákif fe soramé mband so tawaramangé.' Yéné efghon Ebraam ambumofnar témorwén.
english: He gave him no inheritance in it , no , not so much as to set his foot on . He promised that he would give it to him for a possession , and to his offspring after him , when he still had no child .

nama: Ngánján korayau yáfaf yéné ende, 'Féfene ákif so em dabi ár ámb árfene ndimbal yuwon yau yéfenjo ndimbal yuwon, fá so em árfene faiofnar ásáfogh ár a so taftawét 400 yunjéf.
english: God spoke in this way : that his offspring would live as aliens in a strange land , and that they would be enslaved and mistreated for four hundred years .

nama: Wénde yéndon so tékrátan tékman yéné ndimbal yu faiofnar ásáfoghétro ár eyátotat, a soramé yuwon fá so kéntorngi yéné ndimbal yuta a so wáwefnotat ta yéné sifayan.'
english: ‘ I will judge the nation to which they will be in bondage ,’ said God , ‘ and after that they will come out and serve me in this place .’

nama: Ngánján a Ebraam si yéreinyéménd ghéngan néféghmén. Ebraam nénamndai Aiseke yárefé a ghéngan yanfai 8 efogh yáne áráfégh soramé. Soramé Aisek nénamndai Jeikofe yárefé, a Jeikof nénamndai 12 ambumafene yéferafé.
english: He gave him the covenant of circumcision . So Abraham became the father of Isaac , and circumcised him the eighth day . Isaac became the father of Jacob , and Jacob became the father of the twelve patriarchs .

nama: “Jeikofene ambumam waramnjagh yafngoyénd yéfenngén Josef, yémofem fá yéramayénd Ijifét faiofnar ásáfogh ár. Wénde Ngánjánafé fá tárwén
english: “ The patriarchs , moved with jealousy against Joseph , sold him into Egypt. God was with him

nama: a Ngánjánam tambetau fá kétándmé méinyotio yánjo kértata. Farawa Ijifmén warsagh árom méndefé téfandau Josef ménamén Ngánjánam yaramai káfeté mwighé, yéné téfnan Farawam yémndai Ijif yu limánéghét a méinyotio yáne méngo.
english: and delivered him out of all his afflictions , and gave him favor and wisdom before Pharaoh , king of Egypt. He made him governor over Egypt and all his house .

nama: “Féyo káukáu nuyai Ijif a Kanan yuwon, káukáuam yénérsam ndimbal yauyau njamke téfnan a téfene ákif njamkefnar náyátoyénd.
english: Now a famine came over all the land of Egypt and Canaan , and great affliction . Our fathers found no food .

nama: Njam Jeikof náyárayéng ndené rais kété tamorwén Ijifén, yémo ewáfáretam yáne ambum efe téfene náyátoyénd ákif fronde yafoghan.
english: But when Jacob heard that there was grain in Egypt, he sent out our fathers the first time .

nama: Yéfene yénamayo yafoghan, Josefém ewaufroi yánafet efe fá témorwén, a Farawa mat náyátoi Josefene mérénmén.
english: On the second time Joseph was made known to his brothers, and Joseph ’s family was revealed to Pharaoh .

nama: Yéné soramé, Josefem ewáfáretam yárefé Jeikofeyot a yáne méinyotio mérén, 75 méinyotio.
english: Joseph sent and summoned Jacob his father and all his relatives , seventy-five souls .

nama: Féyo Jeikof néwanoi Ijifét, ánde Jeikof a téfene ákif kér emormén.
english: Jacob went down into Egypt and he died , himself and our fathers ;

nama: Yéfene fifi enwangotaménd kétán Sekemét a ekmayénd mbéwé méngon Ebraamém árké yanayéng Amorene ambumta Sekemmén manie.
english: and they were brought back to Shechem and laid in the tomb that Abraham bought for a price in silver from the children of Hamor of Shechem .

nama: “Efogh kaka kénáyátotau Ngánjánam yánjo si efalo sái tiyátongai Ebraamefaf, téfene ár marat té náyáto Ijifén.
english: “ But as the time of the promise came close which God had sworn to Abraham, the people grew and multiplied in Egypt,

nama: Féyo totér warsagh ár efe mat yau témorwén Josefenemén nénamndai warsagh ár Ijifén.
english: until there arose a different king who didn’ t know Joseph .

nama: Yémon yaufiyam tawafrotau téfene ár a tawasérmbotau téfene ákif wáfareghe tawáfáretau ménát yéfene totér ráfégh ambumtértér wighét krot.
english: The same took advantage of our race and mistreated our fathers , and forced them to abandon their babies , so that they wouldn’ t stay alive.

nama: “Yéné efghon Moses náráftam a Ngánjánene ghékfan fá kéretau mer ambum. Nambio ghérare kénjún yémon tarawenau yárefane méngon.
english: At that time Moses was born , and was exceedingly handsome to God . He was nourished three months in his father ’s house .

nama: Njam yémon yénmutoryéng, Farawane mérsom yérnyai yandio ambumot.
english: When he was abandoned, Pharaoh ’s daughter took him up and reared him as her own son .

nama: Moses méinyotio káfeté mwighé yatametaménd Ijif árém a témorwén wafté kér ro sian a wafroghan.
english: Moses was instructed in all the wisdom of the Egyptians. He was mighty in his words and works .

nama: “Njam Moses témorwén 40 yunjéf, yémon mwighé yaitotam yafoghét yánjo Israil árfefaf.
english: But when he was forty years old , it came into his heart to visit his brothers, the children of Israel .

nama: Mosesém yinjoi ámb ár Israilmén Ijifmén árom tusérmbotau, féyo fá nuwanoi yá wáutárghét a fai wangoghét Ijifmén ár yésmetam.
english: Seeing one of them suffer wrong , he defended him and avenged him who was oppressed , striking the Egyptian.

nama: Moses kéma kemnau ndené yánjo árém kar so tayamngongayénd ndené Ngánjánam fá télimndau yéfe wanjarghét, wénde yémofem yau yáyámngoyénd.
english: He supposed that his brothers understood that God , by his hand , was giving them deliverance ; but they didn’ t understand .

nama: Ámb kwéfon Moses yénmormén sómbio Israilmén ár ewinjeyai ásméghan. Yémon yéta krufrát taramwéng yéné sie, 'Ár sómbár, fémro ere fútarfé, fém némamén nawaghanét?'
english: “ The day following , he appeared to them as they fought, and urged them to be at peace again , saying , ‘Sirs, you are brothers. Why do you wrong one another ?’

nama: “Wénde yéné árom efe tusérmbotau yá fútar, yémon yéférngotai Moses téndot a norayai, 'Emo fém niyátoi limánégh árot a téfe ghékéf fayoghét?
english: But he who did his neighbor wrong pushed him away, saying , ‘ Who made you a ruler and a judge over us ?

nama: Fémo yénd krot wafngo ndenéyame Ijifmén ár káye fémon yénau tésmete?'
english: Do you want to kill me as you killed the Egyptian yesterday ?’

nama: Njam Mosesém yéné si náyárai, fá nuwanoi Midian mbandot dábi náyátoi nawerai amaf sómbio ambumafé náyátoi.
english: Moses fled at this saying , and became a stranger in the land of Midian , where he became the father of two sons .

nama: “40 yunjéf soramé, njafar si résagh ár nufaryéng Mosesefaf kéghat fés kánkékánké kénjúmé fanfne yuwon mband tunakéf yétkwén Sainai kaka.
english: “ When forty years were fulfilled , an angel of the Lord appeared to him in the wilderness of Mount Sinai , in a flame of fire in a bush.

nama: Njam Mosesém yéné fés yinjoyéng, fá sélngwél yémormén. Njamandio fá yéngmormén kaka fandaghét, yémon náyárai Yurane kém:
english: When Moses saw it , he wondered at the sight . As he came close to see , the voice of the Lord came to him ,

nama: 'Yénd wém Ngánján endeyot táwefnotawét féfene ákiam, Ebraam, Aisek, a Jeikof.' Moses ngernger témorwén férférafé fandaghét.
english: ‘ I am the God of your fathers : the God of Abraham, the God of Isaac , and the God of Jacob .’ Moses trembled and dared not look .

nama: “Féyo Yuram yémndai, 'Tafitrar fenjo sandol, yéné sifayé ánde fém némakai siyém njúnnjúnofnar mband.
english: The Lord said to him , ‘ Take off your sandals , for the place where you stand is holy ground .

nama: Yéndon té téfandan tane árfene tékrát Ijifén tekfifi. Yénd té kénáyáretan yéfene ye ke a yéné téfnan yénd néneworén yéfe wanjarghét. Sénonjo kuwano, yéndon so kémangon Ijifét.'
english: I have surely seen the affliction of my people who are in Egypt, and have heard their groaning . I have come down to deliver them . Now come , I will send you into Egypt.’

nama: “Yéné Mosesyo féu yém efe yémofem yékenayénd yéné siafé, 'Emo fém téfene limánégh ár a ghékéf fayogh ár niyáto?' Ngánjánam yáfáretam yéfe limánéghét a wanjarghét, njafar si résagh ár kénjúmé efe nufaryéng yáfaf kéghatan.
english: “ This Moses whom they refused, saying , ‘ Who made you a ruler and a judge ?’— God has sent him as both a ruler and a deliverer by the hand of the angel who appeared to him in the bush.

nama: Mosesém enéutoryéng Ijifta, sélngwélafé yam a ufarogh yam tawafrotau Ijif kénjún, kété Férkat Árákafan a fanfne yuwon 40 yunjéf.
english: This man led them out , having worked wonders and signs in Egypt, in the Red Sea , and in the wilderness for forty years .

nama: “Yéné Moses fiyém emo tawaufrotau Israil árét, 'Ngánjánam so yénmáfárete féfeyot Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár ndené yénd swém féfenjo árta.'
english: This is that Moses who said to the children of Israel , ‘ The Lord our God will raise up a prophet for you from among your brothers, like me .’

nama: Fá fiyém efe témorwén Israil árfé káumendawét fanfne yuwon; fá témorwén téfene ákiafé njam njafar si résagh ár efe korayau yáfaf Sainai Mband tunakfan, a yémon Ngánjánene akegh si ewinjoi a téfeyot ewafnamoi.
english: This is he who was in the assembly in the wilderness with the angel that spoke to him on Mount Sinai , and with our fathers , who received living revelations to give to us ,

nama: “Wénde téfene ákif yau námyoyénd wafroghét a yémofem yékenayénd a fá ménde tamorwén Ijifét angoghét.
english: to whom our fathers wouldn’ t be obedient , but rejected him and turned back in their hearts to Egypt,

nama: “Yémofem yémndayénd Aron, 'Téfe ténmawafrota némbne ngánján efe so yém téfene limánégh ár. Ménamén yéné ár Moses emo yénmutoryéng yénd Ijifta, yénd mat yau yéném némé nufrotam yáfafǃ'
english: saying to Aaron, ‘ Make us gods that will go before us , for as for this Moses who led us out of the land of Egypt, we don’ t know what has become of him .’

nama: “Yéné efghon yémofem yafrotaménd unyéghunyégh mewang ndenanit kau. Yémofem ghéngén tanérsawét kétán a téménd yafrotaménd utmanéghafé némé yéfenjo ngángaye tafrotawét.
english: They made a calf in those days , and brought a sacrifice to the idol , and rejoiced in the works of their hands .

nama: Wénde Ngánjánam sém ewawengoi a engéumyoi kénd, ghérare, a efogh wáwefnoghét. Ndenaye fété nátém némé té yéfarotaménd Ngánjánene mat yátogh árfene bukan, “'Fém Israilmén ár! Fémofem ta yau kwémarsati ghéngén a ramégh rokar 40 yunjfan fanfne yuwon.
english: But God turned away and gave them up to serve the army of the sky , as it is written in the book of the prophets , ‘ Did you offer to me slain animals and sacrifices forty years in the wilderness , O house of Israel ?

nama: Fémofem té térsati Molek mewangoene némbne farai méngo a féfenjo ngánján Réfan kénd, árké mewangoe fémofem tawefnotati. Féyo yéndon so tawitrombon kétán Babilonét.'
english: You took up the tabernacle of Moloch , the star of your god Rephan , the figures which you made to worship , so I will carry you away + 7:43 Amos 5:25-27 beyond Babylon.’

nama: “Téfene ákifem térsawét Farai méngo Ngánján ánde korayau fanfne yuwomé. Yéné ásáfogh témorwén Ngánjánam némé yauyafotam Mosese wafroghét.
english: “ Our fathers had the tabernacle of the testimony in the wilderness , even as he who spoke to Moses commanded him to make it according to the pattern that he had seen ;

nama: Ámb yunjéf soramé, téfene ákifem emofem yanayénd farai méngo kétándmé yéferafafeta térsawét yémafé fá njam tayotau Josuwafé a yanayénd mband kétándmé ndimbal yuta árké Ngánjánam ewitérmboi yéfene sáfrére. A kété tékmangérwén kétánotio Deifidene efogh nawerai.
english: which also our fathers , in their turn , brought in with Joshua when they entered into the possession of the nations whom God drove out before the face of our fathers to the days of David ,

nama: Deifidém tayamnetau Ngánjánene ménde a yémotai ndené yéndon so yéfrendan Jeikofene Ngánjánene ámnjogh sifayé.
english: who found favor in the sight of God , and asked to find a habitation for the God of Jacob .

nama: Wénde Solomon yémormén emo méngo yérametam yáyot.
english: But Solomon built him a house .

nama: “Wénde Minde tukén Ngánján yau yémor ár wafroghmén méngon. Ndené Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár noraye,
english: However, the Most High doesn’ t dwell in temples made with hands , as the prophet says ,

nama: “'Yuré noraye, 'Njafar siyém tane limánégh ámnjogh sifayé, a yéné mband siyém tane kafkaf enaghfaf. Fém féyotarofnar em méngo sái yérametati tayot. Yénd méndefnar wém tane enagh sifayat.
english: ‘ heaven is my throne , and the earth a footstool for my feet . What kind of house will you build me ?’ says the Lord . ‘ Or what is the place of my rest ?

nama: Tane ngángayam ewafrotam méinyotio rokar.'
english: Didn’ t my hand make all these things ?’

nama: “Fém áyáréghofnar árǃ Fém sem tikéf táikér a téngan dudu efalo sifaf. Fém ndené fété em féferafaf kés em. Fémofem túmén Ngánján Mbérmbér yékarotatiǃ
english: “ You stiff-necked and uncircumcised in heart and ears , you always resist the Holy Spirit ! As your fathers did , so you do .

nama: Féfene ákifem esmetaménd méinyotio Ngánjánene mat yátogh árǃ Ndenéyameyo yémofem esmetaménd fá efe korayawét Mbarkánd Ároene álighmén, Keriso efe fémofem yékenangi a yesmangi krotio.
english: Which of the prophets didn’ t your fathers persecute ? They killed those who foretold the coming of the Righteous One , of whom you have now become betrayers and murderers .

nama: Fém yéné féyém Ngánjánene nák ewanayénd njafar si résagh ároene kénjúmé wénde yau námyoyénd wafroghét.” Stifen wíme yafiyátotat
english: You received the law as it was ordained by angels, and didn’ t keep it !”

nama: Njam stifén noyarai ndené, Ju sénko ár nékw nawérayénd a sén tangsotawét.
english: Now when they heard these things , they were cut to the heart , and they gnashed at him with their teeth .

nama: Wénde Stifen témorwén Ngánján Mbérmbér afoghkaf, njafar tuk téfandau a Ngánjánene ndimbal kwayaghé yinjoi, a Yesu takayongérwén Ngánjáne tambén.
english: But he , being full of the Holy Spirit , looked up steadfastly into heaven and saw the glory of God , and Jesus standing on the right hand of God ,

nama: Fá norayai, “Kéretangi, yéndon yéfandan njafar tuk sauréghkaf a Ároene Ambum yakai Ngánjáne tambénǃ”
english: and said , “ Behold , I see the heavens opened and the Son of Man standing at the right hand of God !”

nama: Féyo Yémofem ngángaye ewamoyénd téngan a kutnawét tukén, méinyotio ár nénguférmoyénd yáfaf,
english: But they cried out with a loud voice and stopped their ears , then rushed at him with one accord .

nama: tutonawét tesenta a wíme tafiyátotawét. Yéné efghon ghékéf fandagh árém yéfenjo farun sáláme tafitérnawét a totér ambum Solene kafkaf mbanmbanan takmetawét.
english: They threw him out of the city and stoned him . The witnesses placed their garments at the feet of a young man named Saul .

nama: Njam fá tafiyátotawét wíme, Stifen Ngánjánafé koraiwét, “Yuré Yesu, tane mbérmbér tumyo.”
english: They stoned Stephen as he called out , saying , “ Lord Jesus , receive my spirit !”

nama: Féyo Stifen budme niyai nutnai, “Yuré, kémawalindangé yéfene yaufiyam.” Fá njam norayai yéné, kér yémormén. Árém wíme tafiyatotawét Stifen, Solém téfandau (Acts 7.58-60)|src="IB04183gr.tif" size="col" copy="Farid Faadil. © Biblica, Inc. Used with permission. All rights reserved worldwide." ref="7.58-60"
english: He kneeled down and cried with a loud voice , “ Lord , don’ t hold this sin against them !” When he had said this , he fell asleep .

nama: Sol namyoi stifén tésmetawét kérotio. Yesuene mérén ngimén niroryénd Yéné efghon ndimbal ngi marat namndai Jerusalem Yesuene mérénfaf, méinyotio efalo yátogh ár niroryénd Judian a Samarian, wénde Yesuene muyafé árro tamorangérwén Jerusalemén.
english: Saul was consenting to his death. A great persecution arose against the assembly which was in Jerusalem in that day . They were all scattered abroad throughout the regions of Judea and Samaria , except for the apostles.

nama: Ngánján férférafé árém Stifen yiyatotaménd mbandan a ghérghérsisé tamorwén minde.
english: Devout men buried Stephen and lamented greatly over him .

nama: Wénde Solém yiroréng Yesuene mérén. Fá téngmorwén méngot a ámb méngot, ár a amaf, taweretau a talawetau kwéfkwéf méngot. Filif Samaria kénjún
english: But Saul ravaged the assembly , entering into every house and dragged both men and women off to prison .

nama: Fá efe nófarnayénd si táitotawét yénamé árkamé fá tayotawéng.
english: Therefore those who were scattered abroad went around preaching the word .

nama: Filif nuwanoi tesenot Samaria yuwot a si táitotau Kerisoenemén kété.
english: Philip went down to the city of Samaria and proclaimed to them the Christ .

nama: Njam tárfár árém tiyárawét Filif a téfandawét ufarogh yam yémon tawafrotau, fá káyáretawét merkéráye fá némé korayau.
english: The multitudes listened with one accord to the things that were spoken by Philip when they heard and saw the signs which he did .

nama: Yaufi mbérmbér kétonawét ár tárfár tambén kefé, a tárfár aknyégh ár a wawér ár mer táyátotau.
english: For unclean spirits came out of many of those who had them . They came out , crying with a loud voice . Many who had been paralyzed and lame were healed .

nama: Féyo ndimbal áuwéghafé tamorwén yéné tesenan. Saimon ghar téfnár
english: There was great joy in that city .

nama: Ár yétkwén Saimon kété témorwén emo ghar ngiyam tawafrotau ndimbal tesenan a méinyotio ár tawarsotau sélngwélafé yame Samarian. Fá kawarsau ndené minde waftafé kar témorwén,
english: But there was a certain man , Simon by name , who used to practice sorcery in the city and amazed the people of Samaria , making himself out to be some great one ,

nama: a méinyotio ár yéné ndimbal tesenan, waftafé ár a waftafnar ár, yémofem tiyáretawét a yéné si korayawét ndenáye, “Yéné ár siyém minde waftafé yém Ngánjánam yéné wafté yaram.”
english: to whom they all listened, from the least to the greatest , saying , “ This man is that great power of God .”

nama: Yémofem fá táitotawét ménamén yémon sélngwélafé yam tawafrotau túmén yánjo ghar yame.
english: They listened to him because for a long time he had amazed them with his sorceries .

nama: Wénde njam yémofem efalo yiyátoyénd Filif Ngánján limánéghmén mer si waitoghan a Yesu Kerisoene yétkwénmén, féyo ár a amaf nuan walitogh ewafngoi.
english: But when they believed Philip preaching good news concerning God ’s Kingdom and the name of Jesus Christ , they were baptized, both men and women .

nama: Saimoném efalo yiyátoi a nuwan yálitotam. A Filif táitotau méinyotio yuwomé, árkamé tiotau sélngwél témorwén ménáyan ndimbal ufarogh yam a fénaté wafroghyam yémon tafandau.
english: Simon himself also believed . Being baptized, he continued with Philip . Seeing signs and great miracles occurring, he was amazed .

nama: Njam Yesuene muyafé ár Jerusalemén náyárayénd nde Samaria méngotu árém Ngánjánene si té yumyongi, yémofem engwáfáreménd Fité a Jon kétán Samaria.
english: Now when the apostles who were at Jerusalem heard that Samaria had received the word of God , they sent Peter and John to them ,

nama: Njam fá nufareyayénd, Ngánjánafé orayégh tafrowét totér efalo yátogh árfet ménát yémofem Ngánján Mbérmbér so tanangayénd,
english: who , when they had come down , prayed for them , that they might receive the Holy Spirit ;

nama: ménamén Ngánján Mbérmbér yau somé yénmormén yéné árfefaf, fronde fá té árém ewalitotaménd Yuré Yesuene yétkwénan.
english: for as yet he had fallen on none of them . They had only been baptized in the name of Christ Jesus .

nama: Fité a Jon ngángé fáyo ewafngeyayénd sénkoyan, yumyoyénd Ngánján Mbérmbér.
english: Then they laid their hands on them , and they received the Holy Spirit .

nama: Njam Saimoném yinjoi nde Ngánján Mbérmbér té yumyoyénd táf Yesuene muyafé árém ngángé efayeyayénd yéfefaf, yémon mani ewauyafeyai,
english: Now when Simon saw that the Holy Spirit was given through the laying on of the apostles’ hands , he offered them money ,

nama: ndené siafé, “Kwaramend yéné wafté ménát endefefaf yéndon téu efayotan tane ngángé so Ngánján Mbémbér ndenáyo yumyotatǃ”
english: saying , “ Give me also this power , that whomever I lay my hands on may receive the Holy Spirit .”

nama: Fitam yawangoi, “Fém fenjo maniafayo so néngém tuot fését fémafayo, ménamén fém nemne Ngánján ramégh wafté kar manie résaghét yém!
english: But Peter said to him , “ May your silver perish with you , because you thought you could obtain the gift of God with money !

nama: Fene sifayé yéna yau yém yéné ásáfoghan, ménamén fene tikéf yau yém mbarkánd Ngánjánene sáfrére.
english: You have neither part nor lot in this matter , for your heart isn’ t right before God .

nama: Kawengo yéné yaufita a orayégh kufngo Yurafaf ménát so tawalindangé fene yaufi mwighamén.
english: Repent therefore of this , your wickedness , and ask God if perhaps the thought of your heart may be forgiven you .

nama: Yéndon fém néfandan waramnjagh ár ném a fenjo yaufiyam némumbetat.”
english: For I see that you are in the poison of bitterness and in the bondage of iniquity.”

nama: Saimoném yawangoi, “Orayégh kufngo Yurafaf tanemén ménát némé fém noraye yau so nufrote tafaf.”
english: Simon answered , “ Pray for me to the Lord , that none of the things which you have spoken happen to me .”

nama: Yéné soramé fá Yurane si kafrowét, Fité a Jon nangeyayénd Jerusalemét, mer si taitowét tárfár Samaria méngotuamé. Filif a Etiofiyamén ár
english: They therefore , when they had testified and spoken the word of the Lord , returned to Jerusalem , and preached the Good News to many villages of the Samaritans .

nama: Yurane njafar si résagh ár norayai Filifefaf, “Kuwano náikái endét, yéné fanfne end kétándmé Jerusalemta kétán Gasa.”
english: Then an angel of the Lord spoke to Philip , saying , “Arise, and go toward the south to the way that goes down from Jerusalem to Gaza . This is a desert .”

nama: Féyo yémon áligh yérnyai, a néndkéfan yémon yéfángoi Etiofiyamén ár, mani wanjengégh sénko ár Kandake, yáne fifi warsagh amaf Etiofiyamén. Yéné ár téngmorwén kétán Jerusalemét wáwefnoghét,
english: He arose and went ; and behold , there was a man of Ethiopia, a eunuch of great authority under Candace , queen of the Ethiopians, who was over all her treasure , who had come to Jerusalem to worship .

nama: a fá néngangoi méngotuot téfayongérwén osafene roagh kitarayan, taftau Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár Aisayane buk.
english: He was returning and sitting in his chariot, and was reading the prophet Isaiah .

nama: Ngánján Mbérmbéram yémndai Filif, “Kuwano kétán yéné osafene roagh kitarafaf a kaka kété fai némor.”
english: The Spirit said to Philip , “ Go near , and join yourself to this chariot.”

nama: Féyo Filif táf néngenngoi osafene roagh kitarafaf a yiyárayéng ár taftau Aisaya Ngánjánene mat yátogh ároene buk. Filifém yémotai, “Fém mat té náyátote némamén fémon yafte?”
english: Philip ran to him , and heard him reading Isaiah the prophet , and said , “ Do you understand what you are reading?”

nama: Fá norayai, “Yénd ndernáye mat so káyáton, táfandro ámb árom njam ta wawafena?” Féyo yéné téfnan yémon yumyoi Filif armboghét yémafé ámnjoghét.
english: He said , “ How can I , unless someone explains it to me ?” He begged Philip to come up and sit with him .

nama: Yéné Buk saté siyém yémo taftau, “Fá télimndawét sifnit kétán ngifaf, a sif tosanit síf néfégh téfnároene sáfrére siofnar, yémon yau yáne mbírmbír yasawéryéng.
english: Now the passage of the Scripture which he was reading was this , “ He was led as a sheep to the slaughter . As a lamb before his shearer is silent, so he doesn’ t open his mouth .

nama: Fá yewonaménd a yanayénd yáne mbarkánd. Fá ambumofnar yémormén, féyo efe yau so noraye yáne ákiambumafenemén. Ménamén yáne ghérsé té yanayénd yéné mbandta.”
english: In his humiliation , his judgment was taken away. Who will declare His generation ? For his life is taken from the earth .” + 8:33 Isaiah 53:7,8

nama: Árom yémotai Filif, “Ta kwaufro, endenemén Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár norayai, yánjomén o ámb ároenemén?”
english: The eunuch answered Philip , “ Who is the prophet talking about ? About himself , or about someone else ?”

nama: Féyo Filifém waitogh yawafngoi yéné Aisayane Buk satayan a yaufroi mer si Yesuenemén.
english: Philip opened his mouth , and beginning from this Scripture , preached to him about Jesus .

nama: Njamandio fá tangérwén endmé, fá nufareyayénd nufaf a árom norayai, “Kéreta, nu siyém. Yénd ménde wém walitoghét.”
english: As they went on the way , they came to some water ; and the eunuch said , “ Behold , here is water . What is keeping me from being baptized?”

nama: A yémon yémndai wawerégh ár ose résaghmén kémboghét. Féyo Filif a ár nuwot neworeyayénd, a Filifém nuan yalitoyéng fá.
english: He commanded the chariot to stand still , and they both went down into the water , both Philip and the eunuch , and he baptized him .

nama: Njam fá nénurteyayénd nuta, Yurane Mbérmbéram Filif táf fété yéngwanayéng, a ár yau yinjoi wéikor, wénde néngwanoi endmé áuwéghafé.
english: When they came up out of the water , the Spirit of the Lord caught Philip away , and the eunuch didn’ t see him any more , for he went on his way rejoicing .

nama: Wénde Filif nufaryéng Ajotus tesenot a téngmorwén mer si téngwaitotau méinyotio tesenamé kétánotio fá nufaryéng Kaisariat.
english: But Philip was found at Azotus. Passing through , he preached the Good News to all the cities until he came to Caesarea .

nama: Sol ménj térnyangérwén Yesuene waitogh ár ngiot. Fá néngwanoyéng limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároefaf
english: But Saul , still breathing threats and slaughter against the disciples of the Lord , went to the high priest

nama: a yémon yémotai férénot áumengégh méngofaf Damaskos ndimbal tesenan, ménát yémon njam tinjongai ámb ár a amaf emofem Yesuene End táitotawét, yémon so tangémnjau ndené fété kwéfkwéf méngo ár kétán Jerusalemét.
english: and asked for letters from him to the synagogues of Damascus , that if he found any who were of the Way , whether men or women , he might bring them bound to Jerusalem .

nama: Yémon njam kaka Damaskos yéngiyátoi álighan, táf fété njafarmén kwayaghayam yétremngoi a yarendai fá.
english: As he traveled, he got close to Damascus , and suddenly a light from the sky shone around him .

nama: Fá nuyáyéng mbandot a sioene kém náyárai ndené, “Sol, Sol, némamén yénd fémon wesmete?” Nambio ár budmé neitat ghékéf wafaréghkaf (Acts 9.4)|src="CN01934B.tif" size="col" copy="© 1996 David C Cook. Used by permission." ref="9.4"
english: He fell on the earth , and heard a voice saying to him , “ Saul , Saul , why do you persecute me ?”

nama: Sol namotai, “Yuré, efe fém ném?” Yémon yawangoi, “Yénd wém Yesu, efe fémon yesmete.
english: He said , “ Who are you , Lord ?” The Lord said , “ I am Jesus , whom you are persecuting . + 9:5 TR adds “It’s hard for you to kick against the cattle prods.”

nama: Sénonjo kokai a kuwano ndimbal tesenot, a ár kété yém yémon so kénémndangé némé so fémon yafrote.”
english: But rise up and enter into the city , then you will be told what you must do .”

nama: Yéné ár emafé endmé tangmorwén Solfé nokayoyénd siofnar; fá náyárayénd sioene kém wénde yau efe yinjoyénd.
english: The men who traveled with him stood speechless , hearing the sound , but seeing no one .

nama: Sol nurtotam mbandta, wénde njam yémon ghékéf esawéryéng yémon némé yau ámb yinjoi. Féyo yémofem ngángayan yerayénd a téngémnjawét Damaskosét.
english: Saul arose from the ground , and when his eyes were opened, he saw no one . They led him by the hand and brought him into Damascus .

nama: Nambio efogh fá ghékéf kwéfkwéf yémorangérmén, njamke nu yau enetam.
english: He was without sight for three days , and neither ate nor drank .

nama: Damaskosén kété témorwén waitogh ár yétkwén Ananias. Yuram yémotai ghékéf waingéghe, “Ananiasǃ” Yémon yawangoi, “Wai, Yuré.”
english: Now there was a certain disciple at Damascus named Ananias. The Lord said to him in a vision , “Ananias!” He said , “ Behold , it ’ s me , Lord .”

nama: Yuram yémndai, “Kuwano Judasene méngot Mbarkánd Endmé a kamota Tarsusmén ár yétkwén Sol, fá Ngánjánafé oraighan yém.
english: The Lord said to him , “Arise and go to the street which is called Straight , and inquire in the house of Judah for one named Saul , a man of Tarsus . For behold , he is praying ,

nama: Ghékéf waingéghe yémon téfandau ár yétkwén Ananias ténmorwén yáfaf a ngángé efayoi a yáne ghékéf nasawéryénd a nawafarnjaménd wéikor.”
english: and in a vision he has seen a man named Ananias coming in and laying his hands on him , that he might receive his sight .”

nama: Ananiasém yawangoi, “Yuré, yéndon káyáretawén tárfár si yéné ároenemén ménamén yémon tékrát tawarametau fene árfet Jerusalemén.
english: But Ananias answered, “ Lord , I have heard from many about this man , how much evil he did to your saints at Jerusalem .

nama: A fá téném yénan si muyafé limánégh ghéngén wárogh ároe tambén ménát yéfe werghét méinyotio efe norayat fene yétkwénan.”
english: Here he has authority from the chief priests to bind all who call on your name .”

nama: Wénde Yuré norayai Ananiasefaf, “Kuwanoǃ Yéné ár siyém tane waferéghkaf ménát tane si résaghét Téndo árét a yéfene warsagh ár a Israilmén ár.
english: But the Lord said to him , “ Go your way , for he is my chosen vessel to bear my name before the nations and kings , and the children of Israel .

nama: Yéndon so yauyafotan yáyot nderé mámáfi yémon so yáyarete tane yétkwén téfnan.”
english: For I will show him how many things he must suffer for my name ’s sake .”

nama: Féyo Ananias néngwanoi a nénglawayéng méngo kénjún. Ngángé efayoi Solefaf, fá norayai, “Fútar Sol, Yuré Yesu, efe nufar fefaf endén fém njam kéném endmé yénan, yénd yémon kwémáfárete ménát fém so ghékéf kéreta a kémafongé Ngánján Mbérmbéram.”
english: Ananias departed and entered into the house . Laying his hands on him , he said , “Brother Saul , the Lord , who appeared to you on the road by which you came , has sent me that you may receive your sight and be filled with the Holy Spirit .”

nama: Táf fété ndélindnit nuyai Solene ghékéfta, a néretai. Fá nokayoi a nuan yálitotam,
english: Immediately something like scales fell from his eyes , and he received his sight . He arose and was baptized.

nama: a yáne njamke soramé, yáne muyé nawafarnjam kétánotio. Sol témorangérwén Damaskosén a Jerusalemén Sol yémorangérmén ámb efogh waitogh árfé Damaskosén.
english: He took food and was strengthened . Saul stayed several days with the disciples who were at Damascus .

nama: Yémon táf fété si waitogh yérnyai áumengégh méngon ndené Yesu siyém Ngánjánene Ambumǃ
english: Immediately in the synagogues he proclaimed the Christ, that he is the Son of God .

nama: Efe méinyotio náyárayénd sélngwél emorméng a namotayénd, “Yéné ár fiyém emo tásmetau Yesuene waitogh ár Jerusalemén. Fá fété téném waitogh árfet werghét ndené fété kwéfkwéf méngo ár limánégh ghéngén wárogh árfefaf.”
english: All who heard him were amazed , and said , “Isn’ t this he who in Jerusalem made havoc of those who called on this name ? And he had come here intending to bring them bound before the chief priests!”

nama: Solene si waitogh minde waftafé káyátotau a Ju ár féyotarofnar tamorwén Fole wawangoghét Damaskosén ménamén yémon tawauyafotau Yesu siyém Keriso.
english: But Saul increased more in strength , and confounded the Jews who lived at Damascus , proving that this is the Christ .

nama: Tárfár efogh soramé, ámb Ju árém mwighé táitotawét Sole ngiot,
english: When many days were fulfilled , the Jews conspired together to kill him ,

nama: wénde Sol mat náyátoi yéfene mwighé. Efogh sémbár fá kumnjotawét tesen sésafnen Sole ngiot.
english: but their plot became known to Saul . They watched the gates both day and night that they might kill him ,

nama: Wénde yánjo waitogh árém yanayénd Sol sémbáran a ndimbal yáfe tewonawét tesen áráke sémta.
english: but his disciples took him by night and let him down through the wall , lowering him in a basket .

nama: Njam Sol yénmormén Jerusalemét, fá yéta karametau ufnyéghét waitogh árfefaf, wénde fá méinyotio férfér tamorwén yánemén, yémofem efalo yau tiyátotawét nde fá fété yém waitogh ár.
english: When Saul had come to Jerusalem , he tried to join himself to the disciples ; but they were all afraid of him , not believing that he was a disciple .

nama: Wénde Banabasém yénmasroi Sol kétán Yesuene muyafé árfefaf. Banabasém ewaufroi yéfe ndernáye Solém endén yinjoi Yuré a norayai Yuré yáfaf, a ndernáye Damaskosén yémon si táitotau férférofnar Yesuene yétkwénan.
english: But Barnabas took him and brought him to the apostles, and declared to them how he had seen the Lord on the way , and that he had spoken to him , and how at Damascus he had preached boldly in the name of Jesus .

nama: Sol a Yesuene muyafé árfé tamorangérwén kimndawét férférofnar Jerusalemén, korayau férférofnar Yurane yétkwénan.
english: He was with them entering into Jerusalem ,

nama: Sol korayau a kéwitawét Grik si Ju árfé, wénde yémofem yéta ngiot térametawét.
english: preaching boldly in the name of the Lord Jesus . He spoke and disputed against the Hellenists, but they were seeking to kill him .

nama: Njam efalo yátogh ár mat náyátoyénd yénémamén, yémofem yéngwasroyénd Sol Kaisaria tesenot a yéngwatembayénd Tarsus tesenot.
english: When the brothers knew it , they brought him down to Caesarea and sent him off to Tarsus .

nama: Féyo Yesuene mérén yénamé Judia, Galili yu a Samaria, yémofem tayamnetawét krufrát yéné efghon. Ngánján Mbérmbéram tawáutánau muyafé sái kamndangayénd, ár tárfár káyátotawét a Yurane férférafé tamorangérwén. Enias a Dorkas
english: So the assemblies throughout all Judea , Galilee , and Samaria had peace and were built up . They were multiplied , walking in the fear of the Lord and in the comfort of the Holy Spirit .

nama: Njamandio Fité karendau ámb yuwomé, fá kété néngwanoi Ngánjánene efalo yátogh ár yafoghét Lida méngotuot.
english: As Peter went throughout all those parts, he came down also to the saints who lived at Lydda .

nama: Kété yémon yinjoi ár yétkwén Enias, aknyégh ár efe yéknyangérmén 8 yunjéf.
english: There he found a certain man named Aeneas, who had been bedridden for eight years because he was paralyzed .

nama: Fité norayai yáfaf, “Enias, Yesu Kerisom fém mer so kényátonga. Kokai a fenjo yame tékna.” Táf fété Enias nokayoi.
english: Peter said to him , “Aeneas, Jesus Christ heals you . Get up and make your bed !” Immediately he arose.

nama: Méinyotio efe kété tamorangérwén Lidan a Saronén, fá yinjoyénd a awengogh nufngoyénd Yurafaf.
english: All who lived at Lydda and in Sharon saw him , and they turned to the Lord .

nama: Jofa tesenan kété témorwén waitogh ár amaf yétkwén Tabita, Grik yétkwéne siyém Dorkas, emo túmén tawafrotau mer yam a tawáutánau yauyau ár.
english: Now there was at Joppa a certain disciple named Tabitha , which when translated means Dorcas . This woman was full of good works and acts of mercy which she did .

nama: Yéné efghon amaf enjne nawerai kér yémormén, a yáne fifi nue yumbnaménd a yarmboyénd méngo kénjút.
english: In those days , she became sick and died . When they had washed her , they laid her in an upper room .

nama: Lida méngotu témorwén Jofa tesen kaka, féyo njam waitogh ár náyárayénd ndené Fité témorwén Lida méngotuan, yémofem ewáfáreménd sómbio ár yáfaf a taufrend yá, “Wékeye álighét.”
english: As Lydda was near Joppa , the disciples , hearing that Peter was there , sent two men to him , imploring him not to delay in coming to them .

nama: Fitaf néngwanoyénd yémafé, a njam fá nufaryénd, fá néngarmboi méngo kénjút. Méinyotio kwiram yarendayénd fá, ye kendawét a tauyafongi sáláme a ámb sáláme Dorkasém árké enamndam njam yémafé mé ghérsé tamorwén.
english: Peter got up and went with them . When he had come , they brought him into the upper room . All the widows stood by him weeping , and showing the tunics and other garments which Dorcas had made while she was with them .

nama: Fitam fá méinyotio eutonam méngo saté kénjúta, féyo fá budme niyai a Ngánjánafé koraiwét. Nde fá néngawengoi kér amafoefaf, fá norayai, “Tabita, kano.” Táf fété Amafom ghékéf ensawéryéng, a féyo amofom yéfandayéng Fité a námnjoi.
english: Peter sent them all out , and knelt down and prayed . Turning to the body , he said , “ Tabitha , get up !” She opened her eyes , and when she saw Peter , she sat up .

nama: Yémon ngángayan yérai a yamarotai okayoghét. Féyo yémon emotayéng Yesuene efalo yátogh ár a kwiré, ewauyafoi yéfeyot ghérsé amaf.
english: He gave her his hand and raised her up . Calling the saints and widows , he presented her alive .

nama: Kér anoghmén si marat náyátoi yénamé Jofa tesenamé a tárfár árém efalo Yuré yiyátoyénd.
english: This became known throughout all Joppa , and many believed in the Lord .

nama: Fité yémorangérmén Jofa tesenan tárfár efogh yémafé wérár ghéngan watorégh árfé yétkwén Saimon.
english: He stayed many days in Joppa with a tanner named Simon .

nama: Kaisaria tesenan ár yétkwén témorwén Konelias, Rom fiyarafene sénko ár emo tawanjetau 100 fiyaré yéné yétkwén siyém Italiamén fiyaré mérén.
english: Now there was a certain man in Caesarea , Cornelius by name , a centurion of what was called the Italian Regiment,

nama: Fá méinyotio yánjo mérnafé tamorwén Ngánján férférafé ár a wáwefnogh ár; yémon tawarametau rokar marataye yéfe áronjagh árfet a túmén Ngánjánafé koraiwét.
english: a devout man , and one who feared God with all his house , who gave gifts for the needy generously to the people , and always prayed to God .

nama: Ámb efghon séite witmé karéf 3 aklokan yáfaf nofatanam ghékéf waingégh yam. Yémon yinjoi Ngánjánene njafar si résagh ár, efe yénmormén yáfaf a yémndai, “Koneliasǃ”
english: At about the ninth hour of the day , he clearly saw in a vision an angel of God coming to him and saying to him , “ Cornelius !”

nama: Koneliasém yinjoi férférafé a yémotai, “Némé yém, Yuré?” Njafar si résagh árom yawangoi, “Ngánján náuwéte fene Ngánjánafé orayéghmén a rokar raméghmén yauyau árét.
english: He , fastening his eyes on him and being frightened , said , “ What is it , Lord ?” He said to him , “ Your prayers and your gifts to the needy have gone up for a memorial before God .

nama: Sénonjo ár tawáfáreta Jofa tesenot ár yétkwén Saimon yá wangoghét efe ámb yétkwén yanmotat Fité.
english: Now send men to Joppa , and get Simon , who is also called Peter .

nama: Fá tamorarwén Saimonfé, wérár ghéngan watorégh árofé, endene méngo arakaf téndon témorwén.”
english: He is staying with a tanner named Simon , whose house is by the seaside.

nama: Njam njafar si résagh ár efe korayau yáfaf néngolindai, Koneliasém ewanmeyai yáne sómbio faiofnar ásáfogh ár a Ngánján férférafé fiyaré.
english: When the angel who spoke to him had departed, Cornelius called two of his household servants and a devout soldier of those who waited on him continually .

nama: Koneliasém si ewaufrotam yéfeyot méinyotio némé kufrotau yáfaf a soramé engwáfáretai fá Jofa tesenot. Fitam yéfandam ghékéf waingégh yam
english: Having explained everything to them , he sent them to Joppa .

nama: Ámb efghon séite karéfta Koneliasene faiofnar ásáfogh ár tangmorwén endmé a kaka tengiyátotawét Jofa ndimbal tesen, Fité narmbotam méngo semsotot ámnjogh sifayat Ngánjánafé orayéghét.
english: Now on the next day as they were on their journey and got close to the city , Peter went up on the housetop to pray at about noon .

nama: Fité siogham yifoi njamke nénet, a njam njamke frengéghkaf tamorwén, yémon ghékéf waingéghe téfandawéng ámb yam Ngánjáneta.
english: He became hungry and desired to eat , but while they were preparing, he fell into a trance .

nama: Yémon yinjoi njafar nasawéryéng a ámb yam ndené kéretau marat sálámenit kénewonau fo mband kwéndkwénd féyotaroyan.
english: He saw heaven opened and a certain container descending to him , like a great sheet let down by four corners on the earth ,

nama: Yéné marat sálámeyan kété tamorwén méinyotio fénataye wérár a fute aroghagh wérár a men.
english: in which were all kinds of four-footed animals of the earth , wild animals , reptiles , and birds of the sky .

nama: Féyo Ngánján norayai yáfaf, “Kokai, Fité. Fémon tásmeta a eneta.” Fitane ghékéf waingégh (Acts 10.9-12)|src="IB04195gr.tif" size="col" copy="Farid Faadil. © Biblica, Inc. Used with permission. All rights reserved worldwide." ref="10.9-12"
english: A voice came to him , “Rise, Peter , kill and eat !”

nama: Fitam yawangoi, “Yau, Yuré. Yéndo yaufifi enetamén tayot ufi yém.”
english: But Peter said , “ Not so , Lord ; for I have never eaten anything that is common or unclean .”

nama: Ngánján norayai yáfaf wéikor ndené, “Yau. Fémo so enete. Yau noraya ndené mámáfi em némé Ngánjánam ewafrota mer.”
english: A voice came to him again the second time , “ What God has cleansed , you must not call unclean .”

nama: Yéné yam nufrotam nambinotma, a táf fété yéné sáláme yénamayo nangoi njafarot.
english: This was done three times , and immediately the thing was received up into heaven .

nama: Njam Fité mé katambnau ghékéf waingéghoene fifimén, ár engwáfáretam Koneliasém fá namotayénd ánde Saimonene méngo yém a nékmboyénd méngo sésafnefaf.
english: Now while Peter was very perplexed in himself what the vision which he had seen might mean , behold , the men who were sent by Cornelius , having made inquiry for Simon ’s house , stood before the gate ,

nama: Fá namotayénd, “Yéna wan téfnár yém yáne yétkwén Saimon Fité?”
english: and called and asked whether Simon , who was also called Peter , was lodging there .

nama: Njam Fité mé kemnau yéné ghékéf waingéghmén, Ngánján Mbérmbéram yémndai, “Saimon, nambio árém fém néronjat.
english: While Peter was pondering the vision , the Spirit said to him , “ Behold , three men seek you .

nama: Féyo kokai a kewor. Yau nautémnda yémafé álighét, ménamén yéndon tanwáfáretan fá.”
english: But arise, get down , and go with them , doubting nothing ; for I have sent them .”

nama: Fité néneworyéng a yéné ár emndai, “Yénd yéné fwém fémofem efe yéronjati. Némamén fém taném?”
english: Peter went down to the men , and said , “ Behold , I am he whom you seek . Why have you come ?”

nama: Yéné árém yawangoyénd, “Yénd téném kétándmé Konelias Rom fiyaré sénko ároe tambén. Fá siyém mbarkánd a Ngánján férférafé ár, efe yutémndat méinyotio Ju árém. Njúnnjúnofnar njafar si résagh árom yémndai ár tangwáfáreta yáne méngot ménát yémon so niyárete némé fém so noraye.”
english: They said , “ Cornelius , a centurion , a righteous man and one who fears God , and well spoken of by all the nation of the Jews , was directed by a holy angel to invite you to his house , and to listen to what you say .”

nama: Féyo Fitam eumyoi yéné ár yáne méngot. Féyo yáne wan téfnár náyátoyénd. Fité kété Koneliasene méngon Ámb efghon Fité káfrendau yémafé álighét, a ámb efalo yátogh ár kétamamén Jofa tesenmén néngwanoyénd yémafé.
english: So he called them in and provided a place to stay. On the next day Peter arose and went out with them , and some of the brothers from Joppa accompanied him .

nama: Ámb efghon Fité nufaryéng Kaisaria tesenot. Konelias kawanjetau yáyot a eumendai méinyotio yáne mérén a kaka fútaréf.
english: On the next day they entered into Caesarea . Cornelius was waiting for them , having called together his relatives and his near friends .

nama: Njam Fité nénglawai méngot, Koneliasém yéfángoi a yáwefnoi yáne kafkafot utmanéghafé.
english: When Peter entered , Cornelius met him , fell down at his feet , and worshiped him .

nama: Wénde Fitam yéméindai fá anoghét a yémndai, “Kokai, yau wáwefnota tayot. Yénd ndené fété wém fém yéf ném.”
english: But Peter raised him up , saying , “ Stand up ! I myself am also a man.”

nama: Fité a Konelias koraiwét, yéné soramé Fité nénglawai méngo kénjút ewinjoi ár mérén.
english: As he talked with him , he went in and found many gathered together .

nama: Fité norayai yéfefaf, “Fém Téndo ár mer mat em téfene Ju árfene nák, Ju ár yau so Téndo árfene méngot nélawetat a nawaréindat Téndo árfé. Wénde Ngánjánam ta té wauyafoi yéndon efe yau so kénkarotangén ndené fém ném yaufi o njúnnjúnafé.
english: He said to them , “ You yourselves know how it is an unlawful thing for a man who is a Jew to join himself or come to one of another nation, but God has shown me that I shouldn’ t call any man unholy or unclean .

nama: Yénémamén njam fémofem tangwáfáretati tafaf, yénd kwéném ámoghofnar. Yénd namotan féfefaf, 'Némamén yénd fémofem kwarawetati?'”
english: Therefore I also came without complaint when I was sent for . I ask therefore , why did you send for me ?”

nama: Koneliasém yawangoi, “Fo efogh soramé yénd kwémorwén tanjo méngo kénjún Ngánjánafé oraighan yéné efoghféneféneyan, 3 aklok séite karéf. Sunsune ár nufaryéng álálégh sálámeyafé tane sáfrére.
english: Cornelius said , “ Four days ago, I was fasting until this hour ; and at the ninth hour , I prayed in my house , and behold , a man stood before me in bright clothing

nama: A njafar si résagh ár norayai, 'Konelias, Ngánján té náyáré fene Ngánjánafé orayéghmén a némawafarote fene rokar raméghmén yauyau árét.
english: and said , ‘ Cornelius , your prayer is heard , and your gifts to the needy are remembered in the sight of God .

nama: Ár tawáfáreta Jofa tesenot Saimonefaf efe yanmotat Fité. Fá siyém wan téfnár Saimon, wérár ghéngan watorégh ár, endene méngo yém arakaf téndon.'
english: Send therefore to Joppa and summon Simon , who is also called Peter . He is staying in the house of a tanner named Simon , by the seaside. When he comes , he will speak to you .’

nama: Féyo yéndon tangwáfáretan feyot táf fété, a nderé mer yém fém kés kéném. Sénonjo yénd méinyotio yéna yéném Ngánjánene sáfrére ménát méinyotio si áyárghét Yuram fém kénmáfárete téfe waufroghét.”
english: Therefore I sent to you at once , and it was good of you to come . Now therefore we are all here present in the sight of God to hear all things that have been commanded you by God .”

nama: Féyo Fitam si yérnyai: “Yéndon sénonjo yáyamngon efalo yém Ngánjánam yau yuyafote witmaro ménde yam
english: Peter opened his mouth and said , “ Truly I perceive that God doesn’ t show favoritism;

nama: wénde eumyote ár méinyotio yumén emofem férférafé yéfandat fá a ewafrotat némé yém mbarkánd.
english: but in every nation he who fears him and works righteousness is acceptable to him .

nama: Fém si mat em Ngánjánam yénmáfáretam Israil árfefaf, táitotau mer si krufrátmén Yesu Keriso kénjúmé, efe Yuré yém méinyotio árét.
english: The word which he sent to the children of Israel , preaching good news of peace by Jesus Christ — he is Lord of all —

nama: Fém mat em némé kufrotawét Judia kénjúmé, nénarnyai kété Galili yuwon walitogh soramé Joném si táitotau.
english: you yourselves know what happened , which was proclaimed throughout all Judea , beginning from Galilee , after the baptism which John preached ;

nama: Ndernáye Ngánjánam yaferyéng Yesu Najaretmén Ngánján Mbérmbére a waftaye, a ndernáye fá tiyotawéng mer tawafrotau a mer táyátotau méinyotio fá efe tamorwén Sáifroene wafté mbanmbanan, ménamén Ngánjánafé fá tárwén.
english: how God anointed Jesus of Nazareth with the Holy Spirit and with power , who went about doing good and healing all who were oppressed by the devil , for God was with him .

nama: “Yénd fandagh ár yéném méinyotio yammén yémon stawafrotau Ju yuwon a Jerusalemén. Yémofem yésmetaménd fá yénamayo yamayénd wafatarégh wénan,
english: We are witnesses of everything he did both in the country of the Jews and in Jerusalem ; whom they also killed, hanging him on a tree .

nama: wénde Ngánjánam yanoi fá kérta nambio efogh soramé ménát fandaghét,
english: God raised him up the third day and gave him to be revealed,

nama: méinyotio árém yau yinjoyénd, wénde fandagh árémro efe Ngánjánam tándái ewaferyéng, ndené yénd emafé tánetawém njamke a nu yémafé soramé fá nanoi kérta.
english: not to all the people , but to witnesses who were chosen before by God , to us , who ate and drank with him after he rose from the dead .

nama: Yémon yénémndayéng yénd si waitoghét árét a afroghét ndené fá siyém ámbiro efe Ngánjánam yaferyéng ndené fété mogh ár ghérsé a kér árét.
english: He commanded us to preach to the people and to testify that this is he who is appointed by God as the Judge of the living and the dead .

nama: Méinyotio Ngánjánene mat yátogh árém nafrotat yánemén ndené méinyotio árém emofem efalo yiyátotat fá tawalindangé yéfene yaufimén yáne yétkwén kénjúmé.”
english: All the prophets testify about him , that through his name everyone who believes in him will receive remission of sins.”

nama: Njamandio Fité mé korayau yéné si, Ngánján Mbérmbér néneworyéng yéfefaf efe méinyotio káyáretawét yéné si.
english: While Peter was still speaking these words , the Holy Spirit fell on all those who heard the word .

nama: Ju efalo yátogh ár efe té nénuwanoyénd Fitafé sélngwél emormén ndené Ngánján Mbérmbéroene tambén té nasuryéng ndenéyameyo Téndo árét,
english: They of the circumcision who believed were amazed , as many as came with Peter , because the gift of the Holy Spirit was also poured out on the Gentiles .

nama: ménamén yémofem táyáretawét fá ámb yumén sie korayawét a tuwetawét Ngánján. Féyo Fité norayai,
english: For they heard them speaking in other languages and magnifying God . Then Peter answered,

nama: “Yémofem té yanangi Ngánján Mbérmbér ndené fété yéndfem. Árké árom yau so takmbongé nu walitoghét.”
english: “ Can anyone forbid these people from being baptized with water ? They have received the Holy Spirit just like us .”

nama: Yénémaménnde yémon emndai fá fété so ewalitote Yesu Kerisoene yétkwénan. Féyo yémofem yamnendayénd Fité ámnjoghét yémafé nambio efghotro.
english: He commanded them to be baptized in the name of Jesus Christ . Then they asked him to stay some days .

nama: Yesuene muyafé ár a efalo yátogh árém Judia yuwomé náyárayénd ndené Téndo árém ndenéyameyo yanangi Ngánjánene si.
english: Now the apostles and the brothers who were in Judea heard that the Gentiles had also received the word of God .

nama: Njam Fité néngwanoyéng Jerusalemét, Ju efalo yátogh árém tanangotawét fá
english: When Peter had come up to Jerusalem , those who were of the circumcision contended with him ,

nama: a norayai, “Fém tangém Téndo árfene méngot a yémafé tánetati njamke.”
english: saying , “ You went in to uncircumcised men and ate with them !”

nama: Fitam tawaufrotau méinyotio si yéfefaf némé kété kufrotau kétándmé ufrogh,
english: But Peter began , and explained to them in order , saying ,

nama: “Yénd kwémorwén ndimbal tesenan Jofan Ngánjánafé oraighan, a yéndo yinjoyén ghékéf waingégh yam. Yéndon yinjoyén ámb rokar ndenanit marat sáláme kénewonau kétándmé njafarta fo kwéndkwéndafé, a kénewonau kétán yénd ánde kwémorwén.
english: “ I was in the city of Joppa praying , and in a trance I saw a vision : a certain container descending , like it was a great sheet let down from heaven by four corners. It came as far as me .

nama: Yénd néngretayén kénjút ewinjoyén fo ghambérafé wérár, munjan wérár, fute aroghagh wérár a men.
english: When I had looked intently at it , I considered , and saw the four-footed animals of the earth , wild animals , creeping things , and birds of the sky .

nama: Yénd náyárayén si kwémndetau ndené, 'Kokai, Fité. Tásmeta a táneta.'
english: I also heard a voice saying to me , ‘Rise, Peter , kill and eat !’

nama: “Yénd nuwangoyén, 'Yau, Yuré. Njúnnjúnafé a fenjfenjafé wérár yau nélawai tane sénfnet.'
english: But I said , ‘ Not so , Lord , for nothing unholy or unclean has ever entered into my mouth .’

nama: “Ngánján norayai kétamé njafarta wéikor, 'Yau. Fémo so enete. Yau noraya ndené mámáfi em némé Ngánjánam ewafrota mer.'
english: But a voice answered me the second time out of heaven , ‘ What God has cleansed , don’ t you call unclean .’

nama: Yéné yam kufrotau nambinotma, a yéné sáláme yénamayo nangoi njafarot wéikor.
english: This was done three times , and all were drawn up again into heaven .

nama: “Táf fété nambio ár efe enwáfáretaméng tafaf kétándmé Kaisaria tesenta nékmboyénd méngon ánde yénd kwémorangérwén.
english: Behold , immediately three men stood before the house where I was , having been sent from Caesarea to me .

nama: Ngánján Mbérmbéram wémndayéng yau nautémnda álighét yémafé. Yéné siks fútarfé ndenáyo nénuwanoyém yéndfé, a yénd nénglawayém Rom fiyaré sénko ár Koneliasoene méngot.
english: The Spirit told me to go with them without discriminating. These six brothers also accompanied me , and we entered into the man ’s house .

nama: Koneliasém yénmaufroi téfe ndernáye yémon yinjoi njafar si résagh ár yane méngon a yéné njafar si résagh ár norayai, 'Ár ewáfáreta kétán Jofa tesenot Saimonefaf efe yanmotat Fité.
english: He told us how he had seen the angel standing in his house and saying to him , ‘ Send to Joppa and get Simon , who is called Peter ,

nama: Fitam so féfe enwarse si árké kénjúmé fém a méinyotio mérén so kawanjarngi.'
english: who will speak to you words by which you will be saved , you and all your house .’

nama: “Njamandio yéndon yérnyayén si, Ngánján Mbérmbér yénmormén yéfefaf ndenéyameyo ndernáye yémormén téfefaf frondeyan.
english: As I began to speak , the Holy Spirit fell on them , even as on us at the beginning.

nama: Féyo yénd nawafarotayén némé Yuré norayai, 'Joném tawalitotau nue, wénde fém so ewalitote Ngánján Mbérmbére.'
english: I remembered the word of the Lord , how he said , ‘ John indeed baptized in water , but you will be baptized in the Holy Spirit .’

nama: Kwayaghayan yéné yém ndené Ngánjánam ewaramai yéfe ndené sáfot tambén téfe sinmaramai, emofem efalo yiyátoyém Yuré Yesu Keriso; yénémamén yéndo yau so tékmbongayén némé Ngánjánam tafrotau.”
english: If then God gave to them the same gift as us when we believed in the Lord Jesus Christ , who was I , that I could withstand God ?”

nama: Njam fá náyárayénd yénémamén, fá nékmboyénd éwigh a Ngánjánro tuwetawét, korayawét, “Féyo Ngánjánam mwighé ewaramai Téndo árét yaufita awengoghét ghérsat.” Yesuene mérén Antiok tesenan
english: When they heard these things , they held their peace and glorified God , saying , “ Then God has also granted to the Gentiles repentance to life !”

nama: Fá efe té nófarnayénd ménáyan Stifenene ngian soramé eyotaméng ndenáye Fonisiya, Sáifras, a Antiok, tawaufrotawét si Ju árfetro.
english: They therefore who were scattered abroad by the oppression that arose about Stephen traveled as far as Phoenicia , Cyprus , and Antioch, speaking the word to no one except to Jews only .

nama: Wénde ámb ár kétamamén Sáifras a Sairene tesenmén, nuwanoyénd kétán Antiokét a si yérnyayénd Téndo árét, yéfe tawaufrotawét mer si Yuré Yesuenemén.
english: But there were some of them , men of Cyprus and Cyrene , who , when they had come to Antioch, spoke to the Hellenists, preaching the Lord Jesus .

nama: Yurane ngángé témorwén yéfefaf, a tárfár téndo árém efalo yiyátoyénd a nawengoyénd yéfene yaufita Yurafaf.
english: The hand of the Lord was with them , and a great number believed and turned to the Lord .

nama: Njam Yesuene mérén náyárayénd Jerusalemén yénémamén ndené tárfár téndo ár nawengoyénd Yurafaf, féyo yémofem yéngwáfáretaménd Banabas kétán Antiok tesenot.
english: The report concerning them came to the ears of the assembly which was in Jerusalem . They sent out Barnabas to go as far as Antioch,

nama: Njam fá néngufaryéng a yinjoyéng Ngánjánene frengégh, fá áuwéghan témorwén a tawawéngsotau fá méinyotio ménát efalo sái em Yurafaf méinyotio yéfenjo tikfe.
english: who , when he had come , and had seen the grace of God , was glad . He exhorted them all , that with purpose of heart they should remain near to the Lord .

nama: Banabas témorwén mer ár, Ngánján Mbérmbérafé a ndimbal mwighé wafoghkaf, yémon tárfár ár tánémnjau kétán Yurafaf.
english: For he was a good man, and full of the Holy Spirit and of faith , and many people were added to the Lord .

nama: Féyo Banabas nuwanoyéng kétán Tarsus tesenot Sole ronjaghét,
english: Barnabas went out to Tarsus to look for Saul .

nama: a yémon njam yinjoi Sol, Banabasém yénmasroi fá kétán Antiok tesenot. Ámbiro méinyo yunjéf, Banabas a Sol tafángowét Yesuene mérén a tawatamewét tárfár ár. Waitogh ár tawanmotawét árém frondefifi Kerisoene ár Antiok tesenan.
english: When he had found him , he brought him to Antioch. For a whole year they were gathered together with the assembly , and taught many people . The disciples were first called Christians in Antioch.

nama: Yéné efghon ámb Ngánjánene mat yátogh ár tanmorwén kétándmé Jerusalemta Antiok tesenot.
